name: Voter Action Project
subject: Texas did it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
After a filibuster, the Texas state Senate passed these extreme new districts this morning. This didn't need to happen, but vengeful partisans who want to restrict voting and protect their power are worried about next year's elections and want to tilt the playing field in advance. They know they can't win on their unpopular polices while the economy is tanking and Trump's tariffs make everything more expensive.
Extreme gerrymandering is just another form of voter suppression. RUSH $25 or more right now to stand with us in favor of fair maps and equal representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082325_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Texas House Approves Redistricting Maps, Just as Trump Wanted [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082325_2&amount=25]
Team: As much as we wanted to stop them, Texas's new gerrymandered maps will pass the state legislature today and be signed into law shortly thereafter.
President Trump pressured Texas legislators into " aggressively partisan congressional map " — and possibly five new seats in the U.S. House next year for his party.
Needless to say, this didn't need to happen. While opponents of voting rights run Texas and have for decades, their state was already extremely gerrymandered to protect their own power. These new maps aim to dilute the voting power of the state’s Black and brown voters, harming Texans around the state and making it harder for them to have their voices heard in their elections.
Whether it's Texas, or Florida, or Indiana (or California and New York) or any other state that's considering partisan gerrymanders, this constant escalation will only silence more potential voters and leave citizens less pleased with their elections and their representation.
Extreme partisan gerrymanders depress turnout and drive down voter enthusiasm for participation in our elections. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today in Texas and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082325_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=082325_2&amount=35]
President Obama said it best this week: " Over the long term, we shouldn't have political gerrymandering in America, just a fair fight between Republicans and Democrats based on who's got better ideas ."
He continued: " Texas is taking direction from a partisan White House and gerrymandering in the middle of a decade to try and maintain the House despite their unpopular policies ". This gerrymandering effort is simply a Trump/MAGA protection program.
It's also clear this is a racial gerrymander. For every 445,000 white Texans, there will be one congressional representative. That number rises for Hispanic Texans to 1.4 million residents for the same representation. For Black Texans, it takes 2 million residents for the same level of representation.
Fair maps and fair representation would mean those numbers were equal. Fair maps wouldn't look like a swirling vortex meant to grab *just enough* voters of certain demographics or party registration to spread them out and dilute their strength. Fair representation wouldn't be pushed through mid-decade at the request of a desperate president trying to distract from a failing economy and his involvement with an underage sex scandal.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=082325_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082325_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082325_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Tonight in Kalamazoo, Abdul and I stood alongside thousands of people who are sick and tired of our corrupt political system.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250823-783&t=1001&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250823-783&t=1002&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter -

The system is just not working for the average American.

Not wages. Not healthcare. Not housing. Not educational opportunity. Not
retirement security.

I know it’s a “radical” idea, but we need a government that represents
working people, not oligarchs.

That’s what this moment demands — and that’s exactly why I’m proud to
support my friend Abdul El-Sayed for U.S. Senate in Michigan.

[ Bernie ]Bernie and Abdul

Tonight in Kalamazoo, Abdul and I stood with thousands of people who are
sick and tired of our corrupt political system. Corporate PACs have too
much power over our democracy. Abdul is running to change that, and push
for policies that will make life better for working people:

* Overturning the Citizens United Supreme Court decision.
* Making it easier for workers to join unions.
* Passing Medicare for All.
* Raising the minimum wage. And so much more.

Peter,
the status quo politics is simply not good enough. We must elect bold,
progressive leaders who are ready to stand up to the billionaire class and
fight for all of us.

Abdul has the knowledge, experience, and courage we need in the Senate to
take on this broken system. But if he’s going to win, he needs our help
right now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250823-2-ak?amount=27&refcode=em20250823-783&refcode2=802_251025_35czxY&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY ]That’s why I’m asking you to donate $27 — or whatever you can afford —
to Abdul’s campaign for U.S. Senate. He’s the only candidate in this race
who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, which means his campaign
is fueled entirely by grassroots support.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250823-2-ak?amount=27&refcode=em20250823-783&refcode2=802_251025_35czxY&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY ]Donate $27 ››

If we stand together, we can build a government that works for all of us —
not just the wealthy few. Let’s do it.

In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=802%2E251025%2E35czxY

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

subject: A message from former President Barack Obama to Democratic donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
If we’re going to elect Democrats and save our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, here’s what we need to do:
#
**Former President Obama has a message for Democratic donors:**
_"What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren."_
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94138?refcode=em20250823-9321&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9321%2E614464%2EAAbtJt)**
**If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us.**
Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like YOU, Peter.
**That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today.** But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors.
**We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can.[So please, if you’re able to today, chip in $5 or more to support our work to elect Democrats in all 50 states »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94138?refcode=em20250823-9321&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9321%2E614464%2EAAbtJt)**

name: The Democrats
subject: Information you deserve to know:
body:
While we have your attention...
---
Derek, **You may have seen that California Governor Gavin Newsom succeeded in calling for a special election to redraw the state’s maps and defend fair representation.** Here’s the information you deserve to know: Donald Trump and his allies are seeing the polls, and they’re hearing the anger from people all over the country. They know their agenda is historically unpopular, and so they’re trying to rig the 2026 elections in their favor. That’s why Republicans in Texas just passed a gerrymandered congressional map that could give them FIVE extra seats. And it’s why Republicans in states like Indiana and Missouri are looking to follow suit. But Democrats are fighting back. In California, Governor Newsom just signed the Election Rigging Response Act, in an effort to level the playing field and help make sure voters determine who controls the House of Representatives — _not Donald Trump._ **We can’t stand back and watch our democracy disappear district by district and state by state. We all have a role to play in fighting back.** **[That’s why Democrats are using every tool at our disposal to fight back against Republicans’ gerrymandering schemes. If this work matters to you, pitch in $3 to support the Democratic Party today:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250823_4411_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4419_22930333_Z3MZE-&akid=4419%2E22930333%2EZ3MZE-)**

clean_body: While we have your attention... Derek, You may have seen that California Governor Gavin Newsom succeeded in calling for a special election to redraw the state’s maps and defend fair representation. Here’s the information you deserve to know: Donald Trump and his allies are seeing the polls, and they’re hearing the anger from people all over the country. They know their agenda is historically unpopular, and so they’re trying to rig the 2026 elections in their favor. That’s why Republicans in Texas just passed a gerrymandered congressional map that could give them FIVE extra seats. And it’s why Republicans in states like Indiana and Missouri are looking to follow suit. But Democrats are fighting back. In California, Governor Newsom just signed the Election Rigging Response Act, in an effort to level the playing field and help make sure voters determine who controls the House of Representatives — not Donald Trump. We can’t stand back and watch our democracy disappear district by district and state by state. We all have a role to play in fighting back. - If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | - ** | - | | - | - | | - | - ** This is just the beginning of our fight. name: Senator Markwayne Mullin
subject: I’ve bled in The Octagon as a professional fighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Buddy Carter for Senate
body:
I’ve cut weight, gone on runs before the sun rose, and grinded as a college wrestler to make something of my life.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zndtjdrs7fhtvf82r8a7ugg51vcji7l918ikvlmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)Hey - this is Markwayne Mullin.
I've bled in The Octagon as a professional fighter.
I've cut weight in a sweatsuit, gone on long runs before the sun rose, and grinded as a college wrestler to make something of my life.
Fights don't scare me - especially when we're standing up to a bully.
That's just how my brain is wired. And that's how I think about politics, too. I'm not afraid of a knock-down, drag-out political brawl to make the country a better place.
[So here's my tale of the tape about the biggest race in the country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvuic8a4ig3g9l3nuhm5um7u827eroorgn8d4qg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs26bsr40olvntn6km5eohhp4dljqhfjtr4hvjpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)The Georgia Senate seat is the main event in the Midterm Elections. Without a doubt, this will be the biggest, most expensive race in the country. The Democrat machine knows it. That's why they're ready to unleash hell against anyone who dares to stand up to them.

Luckily, we have a tough-as-nails fighter who is 100% MAGA in this race - his name is Buddy Carter.

I know Buddy well. I served with him as he represented Georgia in the US House. He's been on Team Trump since day one, and he's never backed down to the liberal mob bullies.

Not once.

He's got the chops to bring down Senator Jon Ossoff and return this Senate seat to the voters who helped send President Trump back to the White House. That's why I've personally supported his campaign. [Now I'm respectfully asking you to support Buddy Carter's Senate campaign.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn7bnc5lop86hccf0j29fjpbbeikcmu848f9uo7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)[SUPPORT BUDDY CARTER
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z16heocoo7bcubi6lloaqidthqauectavc9ddg0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zstefpsfv8i8a7olir3470qkjt3ql1659slvaqpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)The truth is - whatever happens in this race will send shockwaves through the entire country.
The ONLY path for Democrats to win back the Senate runs through Georgia. And if they do, they'll build an ANTI-TRUMP FIREWALL that will bring the President's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.
If that's not a fight worth having, I don't know what is.
Jon Ossoff may have the entire liberal mob in his corner, but he's VULNERABLE. He's got a rap sheet of ultra-liberal votes a mile long. He even had the gall to vote against banning men in women's sports AND voted to kill no tax on tips AND called for the President's impeachment.
He's going to have to answer for all that. Unfortunately, he's WAY ahead in the fundraising race.
That's why I'm taking the time to write all this. Buddy Carter needs our help to win. And if all of MAGA comes together and pitches in a few bucks a piece, that's how we catch up and win back this Senate seat.
I've seen what real grit looks like. Buddy's got it.
[I'm kindly asking you to pitch in a few bucks directly to Buddy Carter today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z585r03fc6htg67umm5iq9a8l70klo3rju567a98_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)
Thank you,
Markwayne Mullin
MAGA Senator (R-OK)
* * *
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsivlb1mpk5gjnutu9org6525s058jmdut07d0uo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)Thank you for reading this message from Buddy Carter for Senate HQ!
Before you go, consider this...
This next election is our best chance to send Jon Ossoff packin' and win back the all-important Senate seat in Georgia. But this won't be easy - Ossoff's been rakin' in more cash than any other Senate fundraiser this year.
That's why I'm sending out this urgent plea. Now that I've officially thrown my hat into the ring, I'm countin' on good folks like you to lend a hand.
[Can you spare a few bucks to help me defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff and win back this seat for MAGA?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4nd1tdeblqp22nik3rstv1btels62la6r4bu52o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)[PLEASE DONATE HERE
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdkd7md88bu1ehh71pt8ickphl788e4hrosvdsq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)[Buddy Carter for Senate Website](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlg986aq5c8lpgute4t3kkuvjlubte64i4nbg3so_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1h69or1c9h2bs)| | Paid for by Buddy Carter for Senate
---
PO Box 10570
Savannah, GA 31412

| | Patriot, This is important. A new poll of my race against John Cornyn was just released. This new Emerson College Poll of the Texas GOP Senate Primary shows Fake Republican John Cornyn up by just 1 point! name: Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA
subject: Hallie and Brady should still be alive
body:
Let me explain what’s going on...

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,[**I’m writing you today on behalf of NumbersUSA because I need your name on this petition right away.**** **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjtner7nnaupasu4elibtdiqpf63ghq6b1dmde3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs)
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj5540cbgl5hi0do6htq770cs1e97d94j2h8hjb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs)
---
Let me explain what’s going on...Hallie Helgeson and Brady Heiling had recently graduated high school -- they’d both lettered in three sports and fallen in love along the way. They had their whole lives in front of them. That all changed when their car collided with an SUV driving the wrong direction on the highway.The SUV’s driver was a criminal illegal alien.She’d already been convicted of driving drunk back in 2020, and when she took a breathalyzer test at the scene of the crime she blew a 0.208 -- more than double the legal limit. This all happened in Dane County, Wisconsin just outside of Madison. That’s important for two reasons:
---
1. It’s nowhere near our Southern border, and
2. Dane County is a “Sanctuary” county.

---
So when the Radical Left tries to tell you that illegal aliens aren’t hurting anyone and that this crisis isn’t spreading across our country......I want you to think about Hallie and Brady. Two teenagers whose lives were cut short because they took a drive on a Wisconsin highway.They weren’t “looking for trouble...”They weren’t “in the wrong neighborhood...”They weren’t “asking for it.”If this can happen in suburban Wisconsin, it can happen anywhere.All it takes is a couple of open borders politicians declaring their county a “sanctuary” county......and suddenly the illegal aliens can commit heinous crimes in your community with no fear of being deported.Do you remember when Barack Obama talked about the “fundamental transformation” of our country?Well this is it. **[And if you want to put a stop to it, then I’d like to introduce you to my friends at NumbersUSA.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgchrfske60iqp2mqk6umasvlmip409ilh3f1488_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs) ** They’ve got a plan to deport the illegal aliens before their crime and chaos takes root in your community. [**It comes down to three simple steps:**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpsc0aptga0cl1m88136629rq75r86dubi3gc26o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs)
---
1. **Rally public support for ICE’s work**
2. **Cut off federal funding for “Sanctuary” counties and cities**
3. **Deport every criminal illegal alien**

---
And that list is in that order on purpose.If #1 doesn’t happen then #2 and #3 never will. Because AOC, Gavin Newsom, Tim Walz, and J.B. Pritzker are using their bully pulpit every single day to undermine support for ICE and turn the American people against the deportations.Even when it’s children working on a marijuana farm and protestors shooting at ICE agents, they find a way to make ICE the villain of the story. **[To counter their lies, NumbersUSA brings together 8 million members calling for one thing: an America First immigration policy.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf1vt926nbsmun7277fk4ptloa6t79c682ctbvug_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs) **They are the largest single-issue advocacy group in the country and with a donation of $27 today, you can join their ranks.Up here on Capitol Hill, they’re a force.You might notice when the White House makes a statement on immigration or when the Speaker’s office or Majority Leader Thune announce legislation, NumbersUSA is often the only immigration group mentioned. And when RINOs try to slip in provisions that will weaken our immigration policy, it’s NumbersUSA that sounds the alarm.** ** [**NumbersUSA brings the voice of the American people right into the halls of Congress by directing thousands of grassroots patriots to email, call, or mail a petition to their members.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4p41b4n1c7nvpubpo1bjuqv5t9ios0ag66bb2io_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs) I’ve seen it firsthand -- and it works. Whether it was Ted Kennedy’s amnesty package back in 2007 or the “Dignity Act” just a few weeks ago that would’ve added 17 million permanent foreign workers -- they are relentless in protecting our country’s immigration integrity.Remember those three steps I mentioned before?I said they were simple -- not easy.But we’re at a critical moment right now.We’re either going to deport the illegal alien criminals and keep our communities safe and whole.Or we’re going to stop here and start counting down to when a Democrat grants mass amnesty.And in the meantime, we’ll keep seeing news stories like Hallie and Brady’s -- where dangerous illegal aliens are hurting and killing Americans.** ****[If you want to protect yourself, your community, and our country, then I’d ask you to sign and submit this petition today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfuremd6mej7mqi4kpabf8e4qji1ru4nlqf53bbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs) **
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1tjsr0eqh9o3i30u0dv5m2r3c6crbl69v6mivh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs)
---
Sending your petition will tell Congress EXACTLY where you stand on deporting illegal alien criminals. And if you can make a donation today of $27, $50, or even $100 or more, you’ll not only become a member of NumbersUSA, you’ll multiply this petition drive into a movement that no one can ignore.Your petition and your best donation submitted in the next 48 hours will let me know that you don’t want to ever hear another story like Hallie and Brady’s. I know I don’t.God bless you and God bless America,
---
**Ted Cruz**
---
| | P.S. I want to remind you that my friends at NumbersUSA are ready and able to SOLVE our immigration crisis -- [**but they need your petition and best gift in the next 48 hours to create change on Capitol Hill. I hope you’ll join us**.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq3egbsvn3gjjmt0lur3go8dh0o1ned5bpbdhk8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs) – Ted
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z62odln7kucumbvge9fr4luhp3qomqg08iuvl53g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j6coj1chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence.
---
**NumbersUSA.com**
---
|
---

---
| | **NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation**1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209
---
| &#820f2;
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Gov. Ron DeSantis REMOVES LGBT crosswalk at Pulse Memorial overnight
body:
Republican Governor Ron DeSantis has removed the painted rainbow crosswalk outside of the Pulse Nightclub in Orlando, Florida, which was painted in memory of the 49 people killed at the site in 2016.And Democratic state Senator Carlos Guillermo Smith is not happy.“We’ve just discovered that the Florida Department of Transportation in the middle of the night ripped the rainbow colors off of this city crosswalk. They illegally vandalized city property without providing the city of Orlando notice or getting their approval to remove this rainbow crosswalk that was painted here,” Guillermo Smith said angrily in a selfie video.“Not only to remember the lives of the 49 mostly LGBTQ people of color who were murdered, but also to keep the pedestrians and visitors who have come here year after year to pay their respects to those lives who were taken here,” he continued. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/xbN7DFuxY4RhlG1zzcuTIw)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD01MTUyMDUifQ/KpPva9pW93YYLOWF1UjP2w)
---
# **[Gov. Ron DeSantis REMOVES LGBT crosswalk at Pulse Memorial overnight](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Republican Governor Ron DeSantis has removed the painted rainbow crosswalk outside of the Pulse Nightclub in Orlando, Florida, which was painted in memory of the 49 people killed at the site in 2016.And Democratic state Senator Carlos Guillermo Smith is not happy.“We’ve just discovered that the Florida Department of Transportation in the middle of the night ripped the rainbow colors off of this city crosswalk. They illegally vandalized city property without providing the city of Orlando notice or getting their approval to remove this rainbow crosswalk that was painted here,” Guillermo Smith said angrily in a selfie video.“Not only to remember the lives of the 49 mostly LGBTQ people of color who were murdered, but also to keep the pedestrians and visitors who have come here year after year to pay their respects to those lives who were taken here,” he continued.

name: Senator Markwayne Mullin
subject: I’ve bled in The Octagon as a professional fighter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Buddy Carter for Senate
body:
I’ve cut weight, gone on runs before the sun rose, and grinded as a college wrestler to make something of my life.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvt083u717r4fm2ekiju5o871d413ge2eph3fjg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)Hey - this is Markwayne Mullin.
I've bled in The Octagon as a professional fighter.
I've cut weight in a sweatsuit, gone on long runs before the sun rose, and grinded as a college wrestler to make something of my life.
Fights don't scare me - especially when we're standing up to a bully.
That's just how my brain is wired. And that's how I think about politics, too. I'm not afraid of a knock-down, drag-out political brawl to make the country a better place.
[So here's my tale of the tape about the biggest race in the country.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs3lbtdpfqactqn0rcdg4e8av1idqh48a79hnvrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv9utc6st1ujmspni8om497skvk9ojldot1l2bc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)The Georgia Senate seat is the main event in the Midterm Elections. Without a doubt, this will be the biggest, most expensive race in the country. The Democrat machine knows it. That's why they're ready to unleash hell against anyone who dares to stand up to them.

Luckily, we have a tough-as-nails fighter who is 100% MAGA in this race - his name is Buddy Carter.

I know Buddy well. I served with him as he represented Georgia in the US House. He's been on Team Trump since day one, and he's never backed down to the liberal mob bullies.

Not once.

He's got the chops to bring down Senator Jon Ossoff and return this Senate seat to the voters who helped send President Trump back to the White House. That's why I've personally supported his campaign. [Now I'm respectfully asking you to support Buddy Carter's Senate campaign.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm48e8cvv78e3k67ptgtk5ctdbmc9mc6jgtp7tp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)[SUPPORT BUDDY CARTER
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z83icci18oc8ppa0nusfl3q75u05gesjf666681g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z329ddmcp1s8accgie05r59krknnrtgg78449g5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)The truth is - whatever happens in this race will send shockwaves through the entire country.
The ONLY path for Democrats to win back the Senate runs through Georgia. And if they do, they'll build an ANTI-TRUMP FIREWALL that will bring the President's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt.
If that's not a fight worth having, I don't know what is.
Jon Ossoff may have the entire liberal mob in his corner, but he's VULNERABLE. He's got a rap sheet of ultra-liberal votes a mile long. He even had the gall to vote against banning men in women's sports AND voted to kill no tax on tips AND called for the President's impeachment.
He's going to have to answer for all that. Unfortunately, he's WAY ahead in the fundraising race.
That's why I'm taking the time to write all this. Buddy Carter needs our help to win. And if all of MAGA comes together and pitches in a few bucks a piece, that's how we catch up and win back this Senate seat.
I've seen what real grit looks like. Buddy's got it.
[I'm kindly asking you to pitch in a few bucks directly to Buddy Carter today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zm3kngrd3nj7sarr531pg6jt7pjq2rtksjju75mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)
Thank you,
Markwayne Mullin
MAGA Senator (R-OK)
* * *
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0nbhafp03e9eh5qqscre131f6sfg0pb4dt48mt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)Thank you for reading this message from Buddy Carter for Senate HQ!
Before you go, consider this...
This next election is our best chance to send Jon Ossoff packin' and win back the all-important Senate seat in Georgia. But this won't be easy - Ossoff's been rakin' in more cash than any other Senate fundraiser this year.
That's why I'm sending out this urgent plea. Now that I've officially thrown my hat into the ring, I'm countin' on good folks like you to lend a hand.
[Can you spare a few bucks to help me defeat Democrat Jon Ossoff and win back this seat for MAGA?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0rhir9ops6mthqmcb9qgdcihhlqd17pjnn6cnf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)[PLEASE DONATE HERE
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7848m97h80l8s1gajtf3e4310nntutc8rahmh20_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)[Buddy Carter for Senate Website](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrq4dudlgd1vmtkgf1re0rv1m6tgimgf5hd8ks6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)| | Paid for by Buddy Carter for Senate

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt7mjvdu8r1oq17vhu6sm9apqk7q7llteg6uuuco_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjm79j5tknai8cimj89qjqp7i8qgv48q2n4joj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv93a16ofr99r604ckfdmsbt4pbgmvomubi6jtjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zthsjdme9cd40p77am22s6avi7410c9u3194cvro_rp22sh2s8i6epb3c1j62p36cdh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Help me stop violent crime in our cities
body:
Once and for all.

| | | | |
---
Friend, President Trump declared that he needed federal legislation to END dangerous cashless bail once and for all, and I am proud to answer the call!
This is a huge honor but it’s also a massive responsibility.
**The President is counting on me to get this bill across the finish line, and**** _I can’t do it without you._**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Cashless bail is killing people. Violent criminals are being arrested and released the same day - without _bond, without accountability_ \- only to commit more**assaults** ,**robberies** , and**even murders**.
Families are grieving loved ones who should still be alive because radical Democrats decided the comfort of criminals mattered more than the safety of law-abiding citizens.
President Trump knows that if he doesn’t take action to keep Americans safe, nobody will...

**_[That’s why he is backing this effort and why I am proudly leading the charge to ensure that we are able to protect American lives](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
But to win the tough political fights ahead, we need a massive show of public support to send a message the Left cannot ignore.

[MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriot, I urgently need your support so we can stand up to the radical, Soros-funded Leftists who will do everything in their power to block this life-saving effort.
Every day we delay, more criminals walk free, more innocent people are hurt, and more families are shattered.
_**[We cannot let this stand. So please, add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor today to endorse our efforts and help us to end cashless bail once and for all](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_**.**
Your generous support and contributions are what will help us take this fight across the line.

_For Law and Order,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b1Tg/?__vbtrk=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzMzM0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

# Sunday, August 24, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1814, First Lady Dolley Madison [saved George Washington's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQxfHTmM7IDOZjCxdp6DZtSmTjMUxk8MqeXcTto41yg9Q_6enp_3Wf75YiHeun3dFwSPOBZ4nIjHl-ljVbV-hgjGWzGZOzu8ULZ1DQSTVK0LO3FK9ZV94ERMC2QtMMXa_gNt5u1WYc6B673jVdwM5DC03o1QCN64awjI2ryLzX1Ai6UUp3Y70so3dB91q7flDQCq3QE6dcfyc6eMMQr_TCXC9pr6LZmB9FtB8CJgHTeZ71RoVTvt4uYOKNivT2knTIPxEw2ef6LCxBC5h8ihEvuVtPJR2y2BcW-UiZsyWWIaddukxMZauy8Y-TYqTSD0KrdbcUf3_wv-K9DPwEAAD__1yBhdQ) iconic portrait from being looted by British troops during the War of 1812. Lee Majors is best remembered for the 1970s hit TV series _The $6 Million Man_ , but he's still working well into his 80s. ## US Buys 10% Stake in Intel
President Trump announced on Friday that the U.S. government has [secured a 10% stake](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDmO4zAURE8jZTSoL64Bg0mcedIJBS6fFqeppUnKhm7fkK_QYaGAKrz37zE9bMppff61C5oWt2nFd83YGpbpqM9iXU1rw1xnW3BzdrF44gQUOKGKAJuCTfmcWB9MRAQcezSD5IKCVlr3s7FeckcBNQw2OCs8A0CgjoF3UnHVJ3OtUQVsoJRxdfNeBReZYMwJSWHsGMWQ2lZu_7e0thljPrcXlpvflj6bubW9duOfDu4d3O1-AVzVFUpLPmMH91aOZScfEnJUgt9HaiepzX4hcXxUHIQTQqso0YVxQK0xxiBBCj32xYT9nXJOVciO0ediU_6ct18Zexn4CQAA__-mWX6_) in struggling Silicon Valley pioneer Intel. Including $2.2 billion in CHIPS grants that Intel has received so far, [the total investment is $11.1 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ9Gu2vwiqgFxd_Yzd9uaRCvyg7CBHCIb79xqu23O8mXnJzvfD2mhzLWuO2_Okim1U-OcrSUEoXpjFtQczQukY27CuRndSi6aEKGLbAekE-LMvaaeLnIlQipKUnWXSsYDv0wlLusSQyDpnap12Eg6jXTNUPqW90sbSPa0si7jfXIa8Z421da98u8csH5LDqGTcEZLSb5UH1749JOq738m0Kl_VFauaf0ikXzr8CxwDHnXLlZ3xY3L3Ccz2gcxfgrwo0LHD9moLZAFOGMEJN6EhgH2h8v5S7YfYbj1DvkXSVIHp7OZwjaKUQhRFcGubyysdZE0RWcbYcy9rMr_enMt8SfAAAA__8OJIsX), or 9.9%. Intel is valued at about $108 billion on the stock market. The deal makes the U.S. government one of Intel's largest shareholders at a time when the company is shedding more than 20,000 workers as part of its latest attempt to bounce back from years of missteps. The American semiconductor chipmaker recorded [an annual loss of $18.8 billion in 2024](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAUhJ_GdEbmYDApXKRxtdl2S2TgELzXP1z7EMTbXyWvcLsZjTSa-f49xod13sXnXxtQ05rGiGfxSIR5PMoz26m4SOjLZjOmyQaLF44goONi4CDHxTp_jbJa9IoI2FaoG9X1Am7D7VZtWinsG2UbGNqlVXIdJkSlJuxXKVFAVzn9bhMDyEYI2Q31PA_LtMpeyqlXAlomBS6OUq7_Jxdpw9Vf6YW5nlOovN6I9sLaOwPDwJznWYcS3xkDg5HPloEJKeLFwFDaC6XssDAwR-GUONkv5I3g-H04unj5eBf55_VbUD7Czgv3lrAQn1PeU7aEPKQXMjA28_u9-dPuLlVZL_vpvHelV0yKZ7DOf2bSr9i-NPwEAAD__1X8j1c), its first loss since 1986. The company's last fiscal year of positive adjusted free cash flow was 2021.
## Maxwell Provides No New Information
Transcripts and audio from [Ghislaine Maxwell's two-day interview](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAUBODT4G4teH6LcUGRxt2mTYn4ebaJsFkBWWtvHzlXSDfSSJ808_UwDxtTPNZPu5NuSzYHnTVRa1TMT12LdTUejVLdbKHs7G7pTQY43G9c3QBNsDG9DXZBL0RAQ0dajHfJYVLT1G1aBeElWc_FKAflyCvhOQa5oApeCeyivjSuAAXneFe99yq4BSWikyOHgSGnEFsu_XeOR9toSe_8otL7vHdJb609Kxs-GMwM5vM8e-f81TGYrzEMZlta9Imu6EMYniSFmtbcFR2eZ0wpVjky5OtuY_pT27-ueGn4DQAA__-UmXIf) with a top official of the U.S. Department of Justice were released, revealing that President Trump and Jeffrey Epstein were friendly but weren't close friends. Maxwell, who is [serving a 20-year prison sentence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMo88jQFP4GATsr_phsjgBvrL2JbdMyy3X7FX-FmpSnqqqj9f05ejQHH77Q60vKYp4lkDMmOZ3nUrbq4UGUPdXcE0u8PhhRMo6KQyEvTkHYVr0o23KyJg26B9Dl2v4GVer2a3rVLYPRGeszFruwzQdgZWvaL2rTHz0JC9acqAfiqlO_NYFuPnVfdaz_2goBVaoSdO5fGdKPKOa7jSB8tjSUcT7M6cq2h_CRgFjPHKqfIdCRhvsIBRmVuDgPFd5b1PwMjlfWR5utv4YJEUXc4l5UKOUZ7Eu3TxmpO_JObKSFG6ZUlHDrSg3HaqwVFEebi_J4YgOQUvffoWMDbF-nxSCFT7QWi1HY7C_7L8o4c_Fv4FAAD__-2IkTk) after a December 2021 conviction for sex trafficking and conspiracy charges, provided virtually no new information on names associated with Epstein, including Trump, former President Bill Clinton, and others. She also added that Trump "was never inappropriate with anybody." While believed to have the most direct knowledge of Epstein's decades-long sex-trafficking operation, she claimed there was no client list, no blackmail scheme, and [no high-profile Epstein associates who committed illicit acts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOpDAURL_GZEbGmFfgYKUVWW-yWm2IrvEF7sgPZLu7h78fMb8waZVUqnP-P5YHkKOw_wGPumxxCfjODkvBtDzznsBkCgVdPiBhNOABL1ykkB0XI5dqsUDuWlRl9YYosa1QN0PXCzmN01Qdukccm61DhL4XG05gAFoxGdVY04quqUjfa2KUqhFCdWO9rqM1m-qVMv0gZMuUQEslpvojUigHbu6KL0z1Gn3l9FHKmVn7i8mZyRnMehPUe7xrJud_f5mc94OyAwrIPXy-0Tl-pvgii5aHyCmsiTwFKBR2TmGLyUOhGLhHvLPMLZ7PcnHYmZxzieli7UyWtb8bqcZJyaGpkrbnm5yj3A9Mid0Due-L5UdeX1p-BQAA__9N2Y6S) in connection with the notorious sex offender's crimes.
## Trump to Beautify DC, Address Chicago Crime
President Trump said Friday he planned to ask Congress for [$2 billion to make improvements around Washington, D.C.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO8yAUhE-DOyzyjIldUPyNu_ztlugBzzYrDBGQWLn9ynuF7Uaa0Yzm-3qYB4YY0vYfD9JtzSbRWSO1RsW86lbQ1pAaxbpjoWzxQPqQAQEjFxMHaTyG-DGy83olAho60rf7qATM0zx3u_bjDChwnuw4oiKgWclhUIOnFbzFWxf01SYmkDch5Dj1zk3erlJJadVdwMCkIB9aLv13DqnttMZPflPpXT66qPfWnpUN_xgsDJbzPHtn6_Xi8hksl2SwtPI6nhy4DTGGnLjLaStUK_eOF0r5jY08g6Ur2j_PK1TVnUmxHRji71T7E5-3hp8AAAD__9pVets) Trump said, _"I'm giving out a contract very soon...we're going to be raising about $2 billion from Congress, and Congress is happy to do it. And we're going to wisely spend the money."_ In the wake of deploying hundreds of National Guard troops across D.C. to crack down on crime, Trump said on Friday the federal government will next [turn its attention to Chicago](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO2yAUxfGngc0RvsaAB4Yu3tK1o4XxxVCBieAmUd6-Sl_hm4_0k87_z327u5TTdf52BS2Ful347hmJsG3Pfja393QR5h5dw7q74vCDGwiYB2EGkNvhUv5skh82IAJOHO2oZyVgMcvCo3WTN3jsY9BmWRCMXlSYtEYZpuD9qHmyX00YkKMQcjY3782xB6mk3JUWMDEp8EhU2-1vTRdFDPlTX9huvhaebSR6dDb9YrAyWCliTDl_NwZrrAW_hxiss1RKCDlQe5bHQK6dSH3wMXl31sG3VJDByps9Hu-Uc-pKMynO4tJ_jNOP6rws_AsAAP__dCZ5Dw). [Illinois officials have pushed back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGupCAURVeDMwwCIg4YdNJxVp2e9dAAPvV1oVR4VFXc_U_9LfzxTW7OOf9u881jwnP74w9wdc3zCW9KUCuU-Ulb8YHwrJBo9wVy8IeHC2YpZM-F5VLPi8d0zbpZ3AogQTXguqE3Qo52HJvdrWEcFIBRJkDolYi997brvejWRffCNOg-b8JK3Qmhe9vGaJewaqN1MIOQimkBC9Zc2v8Zz7rDmq78gtLGfDTJ7bU-iKlfTE5MTj7Ej0G75c_M5PQ3J6wYicmplufx4ASVOOG2V-Jxx-i3zA9_B05-hcIJ4E5cBiYnqrlcTE24MPW7k9raQSvTFLc83pgSkhmYFtvhMX2z1B8FfDn5FQAA__-174Sn) against suggestions that Trump might send in the National Guard.

Nobody--until veterinarians discovered a breakthrough. After helping older Navy dolphins, they learned that higher levels of C15:0, an essential fatty acid, led to healthier aging for dolphins... and humans. **Whatever happened to actor Lee Majors?** Actor Lee Majors, the _$6 Million Man_ , rose to fame in the 1970s as the star of the TV series of the same name. He went on to another starring role in _The Fall Guy_ in the 1980s--but what's happened to him since? In fact, Majors has [never really stopped working](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyqzAQgOHTQGdmWQshFypeQ_WcNqVmkRZYRyCPpNjj22ecK6T8m6_4P6_uShLlWD9oZ1uX5A5-lsi1cnbfZc00Fzkqx7JR5jTTTvxih4DDCcwJlQsk8eVUG-zCjHxu2fbjoAEv5nJpN-sB9EIwexxHUGoIPJPxY69p6dF43Yp9a2BQ9QBqMJ33JsyL0krNegQ8Nwo4SE25uyU56sZLfKUH586nvY12q_VemvO_BqcGJz66p3zJnYNQl_La4PTuBqf_zO5Kt5RLm224PyVGKXpsFKw7SfzV6p8WPCz-BAAA__9U5nAZ). He's had lower-profile supporting roles in many TV shows and movies, provided voice work for _Grand Theft Auto, G.I. Joe,_ and _Robot Chicken_ , and showed up in a cameo just last year for the movie version of _The Fall Guy_ starring Ryan Gosling. Majors had heart bypass surgery in 2003, but is still active in his mid-80s, showing remarkable longevity for a Hollywood star. He truly is the $6 million man. _What do you remember most about Lee Majors? What were your favorite movies or shows of his? Let us know by replying to this email._

name: sales01
subject: Reliable Wood Pellet Production – OPM’s No-Bearing Roller Technology
body:
Dear Dpwillis67,

Good Morning.

How are you today ?

We’ve noticed your expertise in wood pellet production and would like to introduce OPM’s innovative **ring-die pellet mills** – engineered to maximize uptime and minimize operating costs.

Our patented “no-bearing inside rollers” design eliminates frequent maintenance issues, while energy-efficient motors ensure stable output (40-45 kWh/ton) across capacities from 3T/H to 10T/H models. Many clients upgrading older mills report 30%+ productivity gains through our retrofitting services.
Beyond equipment, we provide:
✔️ Flexible financing options for turnkey projects
✔️ Global spare parts support (compatible with major brands)
✔️ Customized solutions for EFB, bagasse, or agricultural residues
Let’s schedule a call to discuss optimizing your production line.

Besides, we can offer spare parts (ring die/flat die/rollers) for all other brands in the world of good price as well.

Waiting for your comment and early reply.
Thanks a lot.
Best Wishes,
Watson

## Texas Senate Passes Redistricting Bill
The Texas Senate [passed](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdEb2xphQuLiGLtdeiQy7Jis5GNlWCG9_ItIVV__l7mhG882fx_TwHHlbf_sXufoJadroKJFqpTxlQi4181J5W3dfCpUlHXM6J1DQSXWXYCb0HM_JNOhmhYNuyOm-s-p2gx6apyPEWXdeB0KrjTEKUPeocAAVBj_Yht0Vpu5gtFZaDW0w3QKDMrbrLGGwwihCrim39UmVPr6EeKY35XZJrya6Z617EbdfAkYB43Ec7TKXi-LSBYxfi4Dxev07ZaHNV5J74kIoa5IXnlzTLv-DljPHKENm9KeAsckO94Nj5GJ7YdT68hy_NerPxns7-BsAAP__NNyGcQ) House Bill 4 early Saturday morning, sending the bill that would create five new GOP-friendly congressional districts to Gov. Abbott's desk for signing. The measure passed the House along party lines 88-52 on Wednesday after weeks of controversy, including Democrats leaving the state. The bill's passage would cap off a months-long effort started by President Trump, who [urged](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOrDAQRE9jMlC7MQwEDn5CNj_dEHlwAy0ZjOzeYbj9ir3CJqUKSvWk9_Ucn44D78t_t5GVzxzHnc4cSITSmMhzlsST8L4cLmfKUzxf8RoRsCmhK9GM3nG4RlN4-wLf64KsfjQt1DU-sFgtkDPYd0Z740zbwgy6axr9qn3tsDZzwfY-gw6N1qChr2bTTNiDaZumJT-3ygB5lpgqWUno4_IcrvimVE1xK4JdRY6s6n8KB4XDeZ7V6fLK-yJxP2KWe6ZwOGJg4SkrHG6gwgG6O-4m6Xs7yiNRZk_7dJW3BIVDkaw_Tg6Bc_tQBpbNcfjFyt9kvS3-BAAA__8WXn2I) Gov. Abbott to call a special session on the subject. Gov. ## List: Texas High Schools Named in Top 100
The School for the Talented and Gifted in Dallas [ranked No. 9 nationally](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd7ZgDCQuKLZxl223tDCMDRIxETOJk79f5f3Cq690j875d1tuPpd87H_9HR2_t7oceFJBZmxLw5iJWw6cj_3hiZBCPdf6WUCC6eW1B71En8tn0V10q4yT6tCpi7FyHOECXXJjsNpYUGjDKvWkorfW2G0006pHZW2X3fdMXkErJZWchk2bAJPU1hiLcbNCS4yZaxs4IePb01Y-9YVtCPXeFZeYHyTGPwJmAfN5nsOTvhLfWcCM8Rk853oImFck7lPeU08h1VpIwEzoW0hdc_Fx5lIy2YvQcr_7XH4A_LssLwf_AwAA__9Nn3eF) and No. 1 in Texas on a list of the best U.S. high schools. More than 24,000 public high schools were ranked on college readiness, state tests, curriculum, and graduation rate, with Texas placing 11 schools in the top 100. The School for the Talented and Gifted [earned a 99.95 score](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOgzAQBNCvMR3IXowJhYtr6HLtlcjYC6zOwZG9Ccnfn8gvXD3SG838XKero0j7-u1uaPm1pGnHo0RkxjxlDFQ4k2fa17srBYtPx5zeE0joanmpQU_BUXxPugp2lmFQFVrVd0a2LfRQbTYM3gTllQHdm9A7GYy7-NkYnB0Ovq3Inpi8gFZKKjk0i-48DFKbrjMYFiO0xECccsMbMr5cWeI7PTE3Pt2qaDfmexHtl4BRwHgcR_Mo54gzFjBieHjHlHYB44yF643WrS5-SykWAeNHFDBmt__SvpYq23A_KEYqphdarjdH8VPF_zvoaeEvAAD__1RLfH0) and tied for first nationally in state assessment proficiency. Dallas also placed two other schools in the top 25, with Irma Lerma Rangel Young Women's Leadership School at No. 15 and the School of Science and Engineering at No. 23. Texas tied with Arizona for the most representation in the top 50. ## Texas Woman Finds Ice Age Fossil at Thrift Store
A woman shopping at a Houston thrift store [thought she was buying](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAUhJ8Gd1hwwH8FxUaRiyg3SpWUFgvHayQMFpy9vvv2kfcV0o000mi-7-_H8mFDDOnxy-5o6GvNS8KzRiTCshT0oVIJjkJ6HLZWrC6f9_xaQEDHxchBL96G-Fp0481d-Ek2aOTQ9UIpGKDZzDjdldXejxJGMdleudENepIAnRic900w15gYQUsppJjaVXcOJqH7ruvRrz3TAn2gXFrakPDL1jW-8ieW1uW9iWYjOipTNwYzg_k8z3av6eoYzJj4szKYLygG8zsXW5Dvdt8zbXzNtYbI1_xMnlviW35WyonTVsJKvFIuyGC2hd9u8qdKP34zNWcXPFPfv13e8Kx_sBxNMf44Q4yh9gPT4rHbEN8H6f-0fhr4FwAA__-cbI12) rocks for her art students, but later discovered one was actually a mammoth tooth. Studio artist Wendy Wight bought 10 rocks, including one that looked a bit odd. After inspecting the rock, a friend ran a reverse image search, revealing it was a mammoth tooth estimated to be at least 25,000 years old. A paleontologist confirmed the findings and suggested it was likely a Columbian mammoth due to its distinctive features, like its layered enamel plates and root structure. Wight's plans for the tooth are currently unclear, but for now, it’s on display in her studio. You can see a photo of the tooth [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGutCAUhJ9GOw0goFtQ_M12-7e3NAiH5SQoBs5d17e_cXPf4DaTLzPJTDJfj_lhMeH2_G9XMPQOed7gqAmIoMwFPFYq6Ai3525rheryseRzFkyojk2dkLO3mM5Ztt4szN94C4aPSrNhEKNoo-HSjePClYKJTz4wt9jgRscGN2gtFbRorjI2Cck54-zWB6mcuDGpldLgg24kA4-US08RCN62hnTmF5Te5bVNJhLttRn-NeLeiPtxHL2LJW9X2oh7wgCXjcn_oi2ELl202nXNmWJHH435u1LeOsEmoTRX_R73thi_H5gSVj02kj1Xi-kzTH-762XETwAAAP__OvJ_ug).

Abbott's desk for signing. | | | | | | Sunday, August 24, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1882, the town of county seat in Tom Green County--was destroyed in a flash flood that killed 65 people. San Angelo became the county seat the following year. An Austin restaurant with walk-up-only service as one of the best breakfast spots in the country. Read more in Et Cetera. Abilene ☁️ 95/71° | Amarillo ☁️ 91/69° | Austin ☁️ 96/74° | Brownsville 🌦️️ 91/75° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 88/76° | DFW ☁️ 100/76° | El Paso ☁️ 94/70° | Houston ☁️ 95/74° | Laredo ☁️ 94/76° | Lubbock ☁️ 91/68° | Midland ☁️ 93/70° | San Antonio ☁️ 97/72° | Tyler 🌤️ 95/72° | Waco ☁️ 98/74° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas Senate Passes Redistricting Bill The Texas Senate House Bill 4 early Saturday morning, sending the bill that would create five new GOP-friendly congressional districts to Gov. Abbott's desk for signing. The measure passed the House along party lines 88-52 on Wednesday after weeks of controversy, including Democrats leaving the state. The bill's passage would cap off a months-long effort started by President Trump, who Gov. Abbott to call a special session on the subject. Gov. Abbott vowed to sign the bill "swiftly" into law in a on Saturday. You can view the proposed map in HB 4 . List: Texas High Schools Named in Top 100 The School for the Talented and Gifted in Dallas and No. 1 in Texas on a list of the best U.S. high schools. More than 24,000 public high schools were ranked on college readiness, state tests, curriculum, and graduation rate, with Texas placing 11 schools in the top 100. The School for the Talented and Gifted and tied for first nationally in state assessment proficiency. Dallas also placed two other schools in the top 25, with Irma Lerma Rangel Young Women's Leadership School at No. 15 and the School of Science and Engineering at No. 23. Texas tied with Arizona for the most representation in the top 50. You can see the full list . Texas Woman Finds Ice Age Fossil at Thrift Store A woman shopping at a Houston thrift store rocks for her art students, but later discovered one was actually a mammoth tooth. Studio artist Wendy Wight bought 10 rocks, including one that looked a bit odd. After inspecting the rock, a friend ran a reverse image search, revealing it was a mammoth tooth estimated to be at least 25,000 years old. A paleontologist confirmed the findings and suggested it was likely a Columbian mammoth due to its distinctive features, like its layered enamel plates and root structure. Wight's plans for the tooth are currently unclear, but for now, it’s on display in her studio. ---

On Thursday morning, August 21st 2025, my husband -- Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran and lawful permanent resident of more than two decades -- walked into his naturalization interview in Seattle expecting to become a citizen. Instead, he was taken into federal custody without explanation and transferred to the Northwest Detention Center in Tacoma. He is now being held in near-isolation, denied access to communication, and denied basic disability accommodations. A man who gave his body in service to this country is being treated as disposable, while his wife and two American children suffer profoundly in his absence.
This is not only about Zahid. His case exposes the moral stakes for all of us: whether the United States will stand by its promise of liberty and justice for all, or whether we will allow masked agencies and political overreach to erode that promise into cruelty, silence, and fear. At the first emergency protest for Zahid's release, I spoke to supporters from across many communities -- Muslim, interfaith, pro-Palestine, pro-justice, pro-family -- about what this moment means. Below is my full speech, a call not only for Zahid's freedom and naturalization, but for courage, unity, and a renewal of the values that must guide us if we are to remain a democracy worth fighting for.
* * *
Brothers and sisters, friends and neighbors, people of conscience -- thank you for coming on such short notice.
We are gathered here because something profoundly wrong has happened. My husband, **Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry** , a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran, a peaceful, law-abiding pillar of this community for more than twenty-five years, a husband and father of two American children, came to his naturalization interview expecting citizenship. Instead, he was taken. He was disappeared into a detention center with no warning, no explanation, and no mercy.
This is not just about Zahid. This is about the soul of America.
The promise of this country is as simple as it is profound: **liberty and justice for all.** Those words are not conditional. They do not apply only to the wealthy, or only to the white, or only to those who wield power. They apply to veterans in wheelchairs. They apply to mothers and fathers. They apply to immigrant families who have built their lives here in peace. They apply to all of us.
⸻
When I left home this morning, I kissed my nursing baby goodbye, and I told my two-year-old daughter that I was coming here to stand with people who love us, to do our best to bring her Baba back home. She put her tiny hands on my cheeks, pressed her face to mine, and kissed me. And then she said, in her sweetest little voice: _" Bring him back to me."_
That's what this is about. A little girl who just wants her father. A baby boy who needs his Baba. A family that belongs together.
And yet when I spoke to Zahid for a grand total of five minutes on Friday morning, he told me he was being held alone -- nearly incommunicado. Every other detainee has access to Wi-Fi on tablets to call their families. He does not.
As a permanently disabled veteran in a wheelchair, he has been denied accommodations that are his right. He was given no accessible bathroom. No accessible bed. The bed he was assigned was so high that it took three other people to lift him into it. His medications -- thyroid medication, pain relief for his broken back, medicine he needs to keep him from going blind -- are not being administered in a timely or consistent way.
This is not just cruel. This appears to be a violation of the **Americans with Disabilities Act.** Think about that: a disabled veteran, an honorable soldier who gave his body for this country, a man who counseled suicidal veterans, sheltered abused women and children, and volunteered as a paramedic and firefighter -- is being treated like this, in a federal facility on American soil.
That should enrage every single one of us. Because if this can happen to Zahid, it can happen to anyone.
⸻
When masked, unidentified people kidnap our neighbors, our friends, our coworkers, our family - that is not law enforcement. That is terrorism. And we must all stand against it, together.
Right now, my husband's body is held in a cell, but the principle we are fighting for is so much bigger. We are fighting for the principle that **families belong together.** That veterans deserve honor, not cruelty. That this government cannot override the Constitution and turn civil immigration into a criminal dragnet run by violent, unaccountable agencies.
And I need to say this: our family is incredibly well-supported. We are resourced, connected, and yes -- we are white-privileged. And if this is happening to us, what is happening to the thousands and thousands of families who don't have these networks, who don't have the press, who don't have lawyers and elected officials who take our calls? I feel that in my bones. My fight is not just for Zahid, but for _all of them_. All of you. All of us.
⸻
And let's be clear about the context: we are living in a moment where federal officials are threatening our state government simply for following the Constitution and Supreme Court precedent. For the Attorney General of the United States to threaten our governor with jail time for not diverting state resources to federal immigration enforcement -- that is federal overreach, pure and simple.
So today, we say enough. Enough of the fear. Enough of the targeting. Enough of the ethnic cleansing policies that treat people with brown skin as if their lives and service and families do not matter.
We know the truth. America is at its strongest when it is a **multicultural democracy** , where people of every background stand side by side, defend one another, and lift one another up.
⸻
And I must speak plainly about the times we are living in. We are now up against a government that is openly embracing fascism. History teaches us something chilling: once fascists win elections and consolidate power, they have never been removed through democratic means. Not once.
Right now, they have not fully consolidated power. That means _this_ is the moment of decision. This is when we must be brave. If we do not get uncomfortable now -- if we do not take risks, raise our voices, organize, and seize our rights -- we will be forced to get far more uncomfortable later, with far less say in what happens to us.
This is not alarmism. This is the weight of history. And the question is whether we, today, will have the courage to claim what it means to be American -- liberty, justice, and democracy for all -- before it is too late.
⸻
**Our three calls are clear:**
1\. **Free Zahid.** Release him now, back to his family, back to his community.
2\. **Naturalize Zahid.** Give him the citizenship he has earned through his service and his life here.
3\. **Return immigration to its rightful place as a civil process.** End the militarized, masked, violent dragnet that terrorizes our communities.
⸻
Friends, the eyes of history are upon us. My husband's case is one case, but it is also a test: will we stand for the Constitution? Will we stand for families? Will we stand for justice, or will we allow fear and cruelty to define us? It is trying for every one of us to claim what it means to be American, and live those principles out loud - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Government of, by, and for the people. Liberty and justice for all. Lifting our lamp beside the golden door.
I ask you -- not only for Zahid, not only for my children who need their father, but for the America we still believe in -- stand with us. Speak out. Fight back. Refuse to be silent.
Because liberty and justice for all must mean liberty and justice for **all**.
Thank you.

clean_body: On Thursday morning, August 21st 2025, my husband -- Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a decorated, disabled U.S. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | | Aug 24 | | | | | | | | | | | | On Thursday morning, August 21st 2025, my husband -- Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry, a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran and lawful permanent resident of more than two decades -- walked into his naturalization interview in Seattle expecting to become a citizen. Instead, he was taken into federal custody without explanation and transferred to the Northwest Detention Center in Tacoma. He is now being held in near-isolation, denied access to communication, and denied basic disability accommodations. A man who gave his body in service to this country is being treated as disposable, while his wife and two American children suffer profoundly in his absence. This is not only about Zahid. His case exposes the moral stakes for all of us: whether the United States will stand by its promise of liberty and justice for all, or whether we will allow masked agencies and political overreach to erode that promise into cruelty, silence, and fear. At the first emergency protest for Zahid's release, I spoke to supporters from across many communities -- Muslim, interfaith, pro-Palestine, pro-justice, pro-family -- about what this moment means. Below is my full speech, a call not only for Zahid's freedom and naturalization, but for courage, unity, and a renewal of the values that must guide us if we are to remain a democracy worth fighting for. Brothers and sisters, friends and neighbors, people of conscience -- thank you for coming on such short notice. We are gathered here because something profoundly wrong has happened. My husband, Muhammad Zahid Chaudhry , a decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran, a peaceful, law-abiding pillar of this community for more than twenty-five years, a husband and father of two American children, came to his naturalization interview expecting citizenship. Instead, he was taken. He was disappeared into a detention center with no warning, no explanation, and no mercy. This is not just about Zahid. This is about the soul of America. The promise of this country is as simple as it is profound: liberty and justice for all. Those words are not conditional. They do not apply only to the wealthy, or only to the white, or only to those who wield power. They apply to veterans in wheelchairs. They apply to mothers and fathers. They apply to immigrant families who have built their lives here in peace. They apply to all of us. ⸻ When I left home this morning, I kissed my nursing baby goodbye, and I told my two-year-old daughter that I was coming here to stand with people who love us, to do our best to bring her Baba back home. She put her tiny hands on my cheeks, pressed her face to mine, and kissed me. And then she said, in her sweetest little voice: " Bring him back to me." That's what this is about. A little girl who just wants her father. A baby boy who needs his Baba. A family that belongs together. And yet when I spoke to Zahid for a grand total of five minutes on Friday morning, he told me he was being held alone -- nearly incommunicado. Every other detainee has access to Wi-Fi on tablets to call their families. He does not. As a permanently disabled veteran in a wheelchair, he has been denied accommodations that are his right. He was given no accessible bathroom. No accessible bed. The bed he was assigned was so high that it took three other people to lift him into it. His medications -- thyroid medication, pain relief for his broken back, medicine he needs to keep him from going blind -- are not being administered in a timely or consistent way. This is not just cruel. This appears to be a violation of the Americans with Disabilities Act. Think about that: a disabled veteran, an honorable soldier who gave his body for this country, a man who counseled suicidal veterans, sheltered abused women and children, and volunteered as a paramedic and firefighter -- is being treated like this, in a federal facility on American soil. That should enrage every single one of us. Because if this can happen to Zahid, it can happen to anyone. ⸻ When masked, unidentified people kidnap our neighbors, our friends, our coworkers, our family - that is not law enforcement. That is terrorism. And we must all stand against it, together. Right now, my husband's body is held in a cell, but the principle we are fighting for is so much bigger. We are fighting for the principle that families belong together. That veterans deserve honor, not cruelty. That this government cannot override the Constitution and turn civil immigration into a criminal dragnet run by violent, unaccountable agencies. And I need to say this: our family is incredibly well-supported. We are resourced, connected, and yes -- we are white-privileged. And if this is happening to us, what is happening to the thousands and thousands of families who don't have these networks, who don't have the press, who don't have lawyers and elected officials who take our calls? I feel that in my bones. My fight is not just for Zahid, but for all of them. All of you. All of us. ⸻ And let's be clear about the context: we are living in a moment where federal officials are threatening our state government simply for following the Constitution and Supreme Court precedent. For the Attorney General of the United States to threaten our governor with jail time for not diverting state resources to federal immigration enforcement -- that is federal overreach, pure and simple. So today, we say enough. Enough of the fear. Enough of the targeting. Enough of the ethnic cleansing policies that treat people with brown skin as if their lives and service and families do not matter. We know the truth. America is at its strongest when it is a multicultural democracy , where people of every background stand side by side, defend one another, and lift one another up. ⸻ And I must speak plainly about the times we are living in. We are now up against a government that is openly embracing fascism. History teaches us something chilling: once fascists win elections and consolidate power, they have never been removed through democratic means. Not once. Right now, they have not fully consolidated power. That means this is the moment of decision. This is when we must be brave. If we do not get uncomfortable now -- if we do not take risks, raise our voices, organize, and seize our rights -- we will be forced to get far more uncomfortable later, with far less say in what happens to us. This is not alarmism. This is the weight of history. And the question is whether we, today, will have the courage to claim what it means to be American -- liberty, justice, and democracy for all -- before it is too late. ⸻ Our three calls are clear: 1\. Free Zahid. Release him now, back to his family, back to his community. 2\. Naturalize Zahid. Give him the citizenship he has earned through his service and his life here. 3\. Return immigration to its rightful place as a civil process. End the militarized, masked, violent dragnet that terrorizes our communities. ⸻ Friends, the eyes of history are upon us. My husband's case is one case, but it is also a test: will we stand for the Constitution? Will we stand for families? Will we stand for justice, or will we allow fear and cruelty to define us? It is trying for every one of us to claim what it means to be American, and live those principles out loud - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Government of, by, and for the people. Liberty and justice for all. Lifting our lamp beside the golden door. I ask you -- not only for Zahid, not only for my children who need their father, but for the America we still believe in -- stand with us. Speak out. Fight back. Refuse to be silent. Because liberty and justice for all must mean liberty and justice for all**. Thank you. | | ---|---|--- ? ? You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. name: Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Ret.)
subject: $5 to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
humbly asking
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29a6f030-8b27-4155-8d02-dfa840d24504/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b6ddb21-efc1-42be-a6f2-5ef473afe010/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) $5. That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5. $5 because I am the retired Navy Rear Admiral and Democrat running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado. $5 because Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country. $5 because Lauren Boebert has never been more unpopular than she is now. And $5 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, and I need your help now to fight back if we’re going to send Boebert packing and flip this seat. I know $5 probably doesn’t seem like much, but combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. But we cannot stop here or let up. We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, and right now, we are still dangerously short. [Please, can I count on you to split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – any amount you can afford – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb59b5474-ebe3-4faa-854f-310baac4f945/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Having the support of people like you means the world to me. Thank you, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85d4aac9-8e04-4774-8d64-b1e8bbf9a1e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113881716/565266482/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-24_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ZTY3ZTgtZTU4MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OtbMz7198Ue7N2dIS1A_PQVBzOPUU2B6yFh3EqJftk4=)
We'll come right out and say it:
_Your contribution of $10 today to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor would make all the difference._
See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can to compete. It may not sound like much, but with Trump planning to endorse our opponent, we could soon be up against his billion-dollar war chest.
Your $10 is the _difference_ between us having the resources to win and us coming up short.
In other words, your $10 is the _difference_ between electing a leader who protects our fundamental freedoms and someone who takes them away. It's the _difference_ between a Governor who puts Virginians first or one who will only do Trump’s bidding.

clean_body: = We'll come right out and say it: Your contribution of $10 today to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor would make all the difference. See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can to compete. It may not sound like much, but with Trump planning to endorse our opponent, we could soon be up against his billion-dollar war chest. Your $10 is the difference between us having the resources to win and us coming up short. In other words, your $10 is the difference between electing a leader who protects our fundamental freedoms and someone who takes them away. It's the difference between a Governor who puts Virginians first or one who will only do Trump’s bidding. = = = = = = = We're grateful to have you on our team, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4a4609b430a44f04b0171ab4705a9c68&_e=lQCI9DzdKUStN4mjQ9Pim5MMGkkVFwnDG2jgW0-czB4dNmjgDdP42FoZMwS-xg--WVdCeEeUL6qB5onotwJMdpROLrpDnzMHNGt3PZ8Jbz0bBKjCWi41ngDGkhKPlIqQcWYjntlETivXleC02e_MC2NXDz1fsmUj5bbn__UJBj7eRpYbg3vQJKMq-NoouZ5SIOmzjKp9FMcQ8gztIT2wAUBTPfUsOGXX3aZNn-4-ossjWjEJ5H6ry315srqDiwubFjXBmtWAckOBRUwCiB0kQ6CFeVRDkFjVq5rDMVDVMXmHvwAozT9NiAJSMO4Mbz_vM-hS6ub-LaNMFAiZncR9zAsx_A-xMbY7b0hykkiVqeISt6jLbbmMhmNys07fJy2W9QAKu7xAv5-PRYfAKdPH58vtv5j46Kbl-tmSPEYyocJxifpS7t00VFckZY8iiOjYYWwvmEJjUciux5fHiMI1yHfnnj8DX9rdBIYILYvNgxFl0mYaFQVUg7qdA59vZHyKndpXo7n9eJ5FvpvcbjfVpr1KNdghj4qv7W7VG6vsEypblzyecAJB0OC59i2tzbEf-1ZSLu6-QxlNOiE9jLinxXreeG4-Ad2deNML726EwQl3gi2rdZ87NLonHk4jnuRq)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4a4609b430a44f04b0171ab4705a9c68&_e=lQCI9DzdKUStN4mjQ9Pim5MMGkkVFwnDG2jgW0-czB4dNmjgDdP42FoZMwS-xg--WVdCeEeUL6qB5onotwJMdpROLrpDnzMHNGt3PZ8Jbz0bBKjCWi41ngDGkhKPlIqQcWYjntlETivXleC02e_MC2NXDz1fsmUj5bbn__UJBj56lK7TdubHqMNs8qsvPtXqAuY8Roj6S-L6AO2G__QP1VqLSx2tOHjlO4eW6JLMw86CKowYJHWzGYty2CdBSPXPPqjipMY9cHrj3aVFK-EGQSX8KNSFmbASgXtBQqHOhuQvbadpPYyRBohhDstfpVox4mS9YVVDaMf0tVNcf1qmtSoYOQRPuMNE4ApZvrTMQXh85_vkQFzV5Cf-GRlRNK3J1it1g9OiRz7Yc174kqVMwDYRcbLyjXynDIISELTaD-ohObRxt8xlcLHnR1GYrqOp4vFuVc8yu2cZ-uaNIhPJzVZysNPP1Fhv5o5hAPPjmNc6pDELc0rG8a6Oi5L1EKbZeidevR3ias4gkvd-DvP0g7vHtu-QNGv89rhUVJGs_etso6oNBzk6HmGRhqP-L4lDuDte73oUpE85tUE-X4qyc1kC6AMoOCvtvabT93kMz4QA-e0e5Nf9asjejLDsMANm)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.
