clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e355551/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNUV3R3MzUkM2ZQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsOVJCdW01ag/qP2hpZHM9bmNRb0J1QXgxdTl4UjRscw/gaKsK-A/scqb0461f14)
| | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | Friend, I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library! Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/scpf839129f)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/sci982d17f8)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/s9nec735bc8)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/s5j5e6ad7eb)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/s2r04b94d04)
---
| But that’s just not true. <\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[ ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/seg94629dcc)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! [**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/s3lfa1c377b) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress! What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year. But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/sbi27a49a8c)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/sflb2f26201)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/sfhbe28e163)_**
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-A/scpace9f844)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Krasner's challenger shakes up Philly DA race
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1f4aad4430&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[An interview with Judge Patrick Dugan](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5ed970efc0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Paul Davis_
Judge Patrick F. Dugan is running for Philadelphia District Attorney against incumbent District Attorney Larry Krasner in November. He sat down with _Broad + Liberty_ ’s Paul Davis earlier this week. **Davis:** What are your qualifications to be the District Attorney? **Dugan:** Time of service. I’m a native Philadelphia. I was a judge for seventeen years and I was elected by my fellow judges to be the President Judge for five years. I was one of the people who started the Veterans Court, which is a fantastic restorative rehabilitative-type justice program in the court with less than ten percent recidivism rate. I sat in Criminal Court predominantly for the last seventeen years and I saw the ends and outs of how things work. I started something called Covid Court. During Covid, I went into the prisons to have hearings because the world was shut down by the leadership, and I was not afraid to go into prisons during Covid to have hearings sooner rather than later, as to not delay justice for both the victims as well as the defendant. I served our nation as a soldier on active duty in the Army and as an Army reservist for 23 years, five years overseas, including in Iraq and Afghanistan. As the President Judge, I oversaw three divisions: civil, traffic and criminal, with thousands of cases a year with 250 employees and 27 judges that we had to staff and assign. Basically, I was the CEO of Municipal Court. So, I could be the CEO of the District Attorney’s Office. I saw firsthand sitting on the bench how the District Attorney’s Office began to not prosecute people. Some of the days I saw 95 percent of the cases in front of me were withdrawn by the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, the District Attorney’s Office. On average, 70 percent of the cases that were charged and presented in the courtroom were withdrawn due to the policies and incompetence coming out of the District Attorney’s Office. I think that’s insane and a disservice. The District Attorney is forgetting what his oath is. His oath is to the law and to the citizens of Philadelphia. I had a front row seat on it. That’s why I resigned from being a judge, a job that I thoroughly loved. I enjoyed going to work. I loved what I was doing, helping people, helping victims, upholding the law, being fair to defendants, victims, witnesses and to the entire system. I resigned from my job because I’m so disgusted by what was going on in the DA’s office. Somebody had to step up and take this mission on. Besides stepping down in December to do this, that’s why after contemplating for the last two months, I decided, yes, I’m going to take this opportunity and run again in November for the same reason that I resigned. I quit my job to help our city be safer. **[Read more questions and answers here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=170cd65572&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Five reasons County Council’s new “wisdom” has people talking](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c6778a48b6&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Wally Nunn_
County Council, in its infinite wisdom, has decided that what Delaware County really needs is yet another layer of bureaucracy. Enter the shiny new Human Relations Commission, created under 43 P.S. § 962.1. This body will consist of seven to 13 “volunteers” handpicked by the County Executive and rubber-stamped by Council. These unelected appointees will wield the power to investigate, conciliate, adjudicate, and fine citizens who somehow stumble over the 18 pages of protected classes and prohibitions. In other words — Big Brother (who now identifies as female) is alive and well at the Courthouse. As my late friend often said, “inside every progressive is a totalitarian screaming to get out.” **Why It Matters.** We've got an election coming. Last time,[ you raised taxes 30 percent after promising otherwise](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dd441b45f8&e=b7b3eddce2). This time, will you admit in advance you’re readying another tax hike? Or will you again “omit important information for political gain”? (Translation: lying) Progressives claim to be forward-thinking, but with every new bureaucracy, tax, and ordinance, the policies become more regressive. Delaware County families, already burdened by soaring costs, are now footing the bill for council’s latest power grab. How can progressives be so regressive? **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ad9a78eeed&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[LNP denies trying to ‘water down’ or ‘silence’ Smucker op-ed, despite wanting to ‘qualify’ it](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=de21a8026f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: A college that loves America — imagine that](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4df550ce3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Another victory with the return of the Frank Rizzo statue](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=19f9f528be&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Shocker — Redistricting is political!](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9378d81cc8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: From Peking to Philadelphia — The East, the West, and Pearl S. Buck](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=196a28a493&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Gag order in Abington? Police chief targets outspoken resident](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4c2e5ed008&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ben Mannes: Why invoking January 6th doesn’t work](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8eb74734fc&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Richard Kosich: The curious case of John Fetterman](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6204453dcc&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
This week, as the SEPTA funding crisis remains unresolved, our friends at the Philadelphia Inquirer note — perhaps a little too gleefully — that the Democrats “[hope to use SEPTA cuts to flip the State Senate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c7742ef5fd&e=b7b3eddce2) for the first time in 31 years.” A more accurate headline might be, “Democrats hope SEPTA mess continues.” Because it’s clear that they have more interest in winning elections than reaching across the aisle to make things work in Harrisburg. It’s an old play from the Democratic playbook. And it used to work all the time. Democrats in Washington would refuse to compromise on government funding, the government would shut down, and their friends in the media would place all the blame on Republicans. The j.v. Dems in Harrisburg are now running the big boys’ play, but the league has long ago figured out how to stop it. Alternative media sources — like the one you’re reading now — allow both sides of the story to get out. It takes two to tango, Democrats. Instead of hoping for a disaster you can blame on the other side, how about reaching out a hand in compromise and daring them to do the same. Passing bills, not winning elections for their own sake, is the point of politics.
---
|
# **5\. Download our app!**
If you’re reading this, you already know we’re the only place you can find certain stories in Pennsylvania—the ones other outlets won’t touch, the ones that dig deeper, and the straightforward political news that keeps you ahead of the spin. Now, we’re bringing that news straight to you — faster, clearer, and without the noise.

The _Broad + Liberty_ mobile app is here, and they’re the fastest way to get Pennsylvania’s real news. [Read all about it here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2ee0c09cc4&e=b7b3eddce2)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eb6aee27df&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|
---

Enter the shiny new Human Relations Commission, created under 43 P.S. § 962.1. This body will consist of seven to 13 “volunteers” handpicked by the County Executive and rubber-stamped by Council. These unelected appointees will wield the power to investigate, conciliate, adjudicate, and fine citizens who somehow stumble over the 18 pages of protected classes and prohibitions. In other words — Big Brother (who now identifies as female) is alive and well at the Courthouse. As my late friend often said, “inside every progressive is a totalitarian screaming to get out.” Why It Matters. We've got an election coming. Last time,. This time, will you admit in advance you’re readying another tax hike? Or will you again “omit important information for political gain”? (Translation: lying) Progressives claim to be forward-thinking, but with every new bureaucracy, tax, and ordinance, the policies become more regressive. Delaware County families, already burdened by soaring costs, are now footing the bill for council’s latest power grab. How can progressives be so regressive? | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading This week, as the SEPTA funding crisis remains unresolved, our friends at the Philadelphia Inquirer note — perhaps a little too gleefully — that the Democrats “ for the first time in 31 years.” A more accurate headline might be, “Democrats hope SEPTA mess continues.” Because it’s clear that they have more interest in winning elections than reaching across the aisle to make things work in Harrisburg. It’s an old play from the Democratic playbook. And it used to work all the time. Democrats in Washington would refuse to compromise on government funding, the government would shut down, and their friends in the media would place all the blame on Republicans. The j.v. Dems in Harrisburg are now running the big boys’ play, but the league has long ago figured out how to stop it. Alternative media sources — like the one you’re reading now — allow both sides of the story to get out. It takes two to tango, Democrats. Instead of hoping for a disaster you can blame on the other side, how about reaching out a hand in compromise and daring them to do the same. Passing bills, not winning elections for their own sake, is the point of politics. | 5\. Download our app! If you’re reading this, you already know we’re the only place you can find certain stories in Pennsylvania—the ones other outlets won’t touch, the ones that dig deeper, and the straightforward political news that keeps you ahead of the spin. Now, we’re bringing that news straight to you — faster, clearer, and without the noise. The Broad + Liberty mobile app is here, and they’re the fastest way to get Pennsylvania’s real news. ! | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site – and local stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. Our mailing address is: Broad + Liberty323 West Front StreetSuite 200Media, PA 19063 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Broad and Liberty, Inc. is a Pennsylvania Domestic Nonprofit Corporation classifed as a public charity under Internal Revenue Code Section 501 (c) (3).

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I owe you an explanation
body:
|
#
Friend, I’m sure you’ve been getting a ton of emails lately, including these ones from our campaign. I figured I owe you an explanation as to why we’re reaching out to you so often. So, if you’ve got a minute, please: let me explain why I’m in this fight in the first place. **Here it goes:** I grew up in Portland, Michigan. My dad worked construction – 70 to 80 hours a week during the season, snow removal when it got cold. He didn’t mind getting calluses on his hands if it meant putting food on the table. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113883680/565268303/1362877131?refcode=em-8.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM4MjgzYi1lYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdXy8SHfgTOuXjQnnZWjQgjYxIer_fbYvD2cv7IUpoc=) _My dad, sister, and me. _ That experience shaped everything I’ve done since: from leading Head Start programs to serving at the Michigan Department of Education, to ultimately running for Congress, I’ve spent my career fighting to make it a little easier for working families. **Unfortunately, we all see that the playing field is increasingly stacked against working families.** Child care costs are up. Groceries are too expensive. Public schools are under pressure, and too many families are being forced to make tradeoffs they shouldn’t have to make. Since I was sworn in earlier this year, I’ve been focused on changing that – from fighting to keep our local Social Security office open to pushing back against cuts to SNAP and Medicaid, you have my word that I’ll never stop showing up for the families who need someone in their corner. But none of this has stopped national Republicans from attacking me with nearly a **million dollars** in attack ads... In fact, it’s put a target on my back. They see this district as critical to winning the House Majority, and for Democrats to win, we need to win here. [**So friend, I hope that explains why you’ve been hearing from us so often. Because the truth is, we can’t afford to fall behind. Not now. And if you’re still with me – and you’re in a position to chip in, your $3 donation would mean a lot**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113883682/565268308/1362877131?refcode=em-8.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM4MjgzYi1lYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdXy8SHfgTOuXjQnnZWjQgjYxIer_fbYvD2cv7IUpoc=)[**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113883684/565268311/1362877131?refcode=em-8.24.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM4MjgzYi1lYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdXy8SHfgTOuXjQnnZWjQgjYxIer_fbYvD2cv7IUpoc=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113883685/565268313/1362877131?refcode=em-8.24.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmM4MjgzYi1lYTgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdXy8SHfgTOuXjQnnZWjQgjYxIer_fbYvD2cv7IUpoc=)**

📍 **California:_Republicans filed suit asking the State Supreme Court to stop Democrats from moving ahead with redistricting_ **
This week, California Democrats responded to Trump-led Republican attacks in Texas by introducing a package of bills to create new district boundaries that could help Democrats protect and expand their power. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, August 24th, 2025. | | | | | | 📍 California:Republicans filed suit asking the State Supreme Court to stop Democrats from moving ahead with redistricting This week, California Democrats responded to Trump-led Republican attacks in Texas by introducing a package of bills to create new district boundaries that could help Democrats protect and expand their power. 🗺️ States of Play:State Legislative Leaders Call Out Ramifications of Trump’s Tariff Fiasco DLCC hosted a press conference with Illinois Speaker Pro Tempore Kam Buckner, New Mexico Speaker of the House Javier Martínez, and Washington Senate Deputy Majority Leader Manka Dhingra on how Republicans’ disastrous economic agenda – from tariff taxes to the billionaires-first budget law – is fueling the affordability crisis facing families nationwide. 🫏 DLCC Press Release:Countering Republicans’ Blatant Power Grabs The DLCC recently called for state Democrats to use all state legislative power available to pursue mid-cycle redistricting, while focusing on winning battleground chambers to put the party on offense. As Republicans launch a full-scale assault on our democracy to protect their vulnerable House majority, Democrats aren’t backing down. 👀 Special Election Watch:Key Special Elections in Iowa and Georgia on Tuesday On Tuesday, Iowa and Georgia voters will head to the polls to vote in special elections where DLCC Spotlight Candidates Catelin Drey in Iowa and Debra Shigley in Georgia are vying to flip GOP seats. 🗳️ Upcoming elections:Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months, and some are happening as soon as this Tuesday. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Not authorized by any candidate. subject: Appeals Court Ruling:

body:
Urgent update in the FINAL witch hunt against President Trump.
Urgent update in the FINAL witch hunt against President Trump.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1695376/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvS0NFS1ZmQ3ZEZw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsQjcwSTc5bA/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOTdXSTZyTTBscw/gaKsSUw/s5oc55442b0)

---
Patriot,
---
When President Trump was first arrested in New York City on bogus charges, he declared, "_NEVER SURRENDER_.”
---
It would’ve been easy to throw up our hands and say that a weaponized legal system is too powerful to overcome.
---
But as Americans, we don’t give up. Justice is always worth fighting for.
---
And thanks to YOUR refusal to surrender our Republic to legal warfare, a major victory was just achieved in the _LAST_ remaining witch hunt against the President in New York:
---
**“New York court throws out $500M fraud ruling against Trump after blockbuster lawsuit from Letitia James”** _-The Independent_
---
This is exactly why we can never surrender – even when the odds seem stacked against us.
---
**Tish’s $500 MILLION FINE against the President has been thrown out. Her polling is the WORST it’s been in history. And now she’s under FBI investigation for committing FOUR types of fraud.**
---
But make no mistake: _Letitia James will not go down without a fight._
---
That’s why we now have to win the final battle: **_to OFFICIALLY REMOVE Letitia James from office._**
---
**I am the ONLY Republican running to FIRE Tish James.**
---
Our campaign is surging, grassroots donors are rallying by our side, and this has become a _single-digit_ race.
---
And most importantly, while Tish James is only fighting for _herself_. We’re fighting for something bigger: _a free and fair legal system that puts YOU first._
---
**This is a battle we MUST win. We’ve come so far. We can’t give up now.**
---
**_Are you with me?_**
---
[**So, please make a contribution – and per the benchmarks set by New York’s campaign finance laws, we will be able to 600% MATCH your grassroots contribution.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $1,750](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Michael Henry
_Republican for New York Attorney General_
---

body:
Can you help us beat the summer slump??
| Hi friend, my name is Heather and I help run the Voter Protection Project!

**I’m reaching out because I noticed that you have yet to confirm your supporter status to help us stop Trump and elect Democrats across the country.**

Summer months are always the toughest for fundraising — and with our entire Democracy at stake, _we absolutely can’t afford to fall behind._

**There’s no better time to step up.** Trump is threatening to serve an unprecedented third term. MAGA Republicans are building their warchest to defeat Democrats in 2026. Grassroots support from Democrats like you is vital right now.

[So today, I hope you’ll help us get through August strong: Will you confirm your status as a top Democrat so we can take back the House and Senate from the MAGA majority and save our Democracy? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93146?t=6&akid=20976%2E878179%2EKiS4PD) | [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93146?t=7&akid=20976%2E878179%2EKiS4PD)
---
Thank you for all your help!

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20976%2E878179%2EKiS4PD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20976%2E878179%2EKiS4PD).**

subject: Key PA endorsements >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
An essential line of defense against gerrymandering in PA
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113899037/565310035/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzZjQ0ZjlkLWYyODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lBJRPwgJ722v-RLOl13ZWgPiQHzHP-C-I8cjCAjTw-g=&emci=c8f331bb-8f7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=33f44f9d-f280-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

**2025 ELECTION ALERT:** _**Critical seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for grabs in November.[Donate now to support our endorsed Democracy Defenders and fight for fair maps >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113899038/565310036/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PADemDefendersNOR_email_20250824-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefendersNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250824-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefendersNOR_&utm_campaign=PADemDefendersNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzZjQ0ZjlkLWYyODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lBJRPwgJ722v-RLOl13ZWgPiQHzHP-C-I8cjCAjTw-g=)**_ Hey Peter — We announced our official endorsement of three new Democracy Defenders in the critical state supreme court races coming up this November in Pennsylvania! **Justice Christine Donohue, Justice Kevin Dougherty, and Justice David Wecht** have each demonstrated their commitment to protecting free and fair elections, safeguarding fundamental rights, and holding corporations accountable. They have proven they will always put Pennsylvanians and the rule of law first.
**This is particularly important in Pennsylvania, a key battleground state with a recent history of gerrymandering.** In 2021, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court stepped in to redraw new electoral maps after the governor repeatedly vetoed gerrymandered maps drawn by the then-Republican legislature. Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court is a critical line of defense in protecting voters’ rights to “free and equal” elections as outlined in the state constitution — particularly since Pennsylvania lacks an independent redistricting commission that oversees congressional redistricting. **This November, Pennsylvanians must choose to retain Justice Donohue, Justice Dougherty, and Justice Wecht** to ensure continued balance on the court and defend against potential gerrymandering efforts in the future. [**We’re doing everything we can to make sure democracy wins in Pennsylvania and across the country — and your contributions, especially right now, go directly toward making sure we’re able to fight whatever redistricting battles lie ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113899039/565310037/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PADemDefendersNOR_email_20250824-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefendersNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250824-NDRC-Tier1-PADemDefendersNOR_&utm_campaign=PADemDefendersNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzZjQ0ZjlkLWYyODAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lBJRPwgJ722v-RLOl13ZWgPiQHzHP-C-I8cjCAjTw-g=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: An essential line of defense against gerrymandering in PA | 2025 ELECTION ALERT: Critical seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court are up for grabs in November.= Hey Peter — We announced our official endorsement of three new Democracy Defenders in the critical state supreme court races coming up this November in Pennsylvania! Justice Christine Donohue, Justice Kevin Dougherty, and Justice David Wecht have each demonstrated their commitment to protecting free and fair elections, safeguarding fundamental rights, and holding corporations accountable. They have proven they will always put Pennsylvanians and the rule of law first. This is particularly important in Pennsylvania, a key battleground state with a recent history of gerrymandering. In 2021, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court stepped in to redraw new electoral maps after the governor repeatedly vetoed gerrymandered maps drawn by the then-Republican legislature. Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court is a critical line of defense in protecting voters’ rights to “free and equal” elections as outlined in the state constitution — particularly since Pennsylvania lacks an independent redistricting commission that oversees congressional redistricting. | | | The freedom to vote is on the ballot in 2025 and beyond, and **Fair Fight is teaming up with the Georgia Senate Dems** to help flip this seat from red to blue. Winning races like this one is vital to stopping Georgia lawmakers from passing new voter suppression laws. Keep reading to learn more — Election Day is coming up fast!
---
Big news, friend: **The date of the Special Election in GA Senate District-21 has been set for August 26th!** In less than two weeks, Democrat Debra Shigley has an opportunity to flip this critical seat blue in the Georgia State Senate.
This seat is being vacated by a far-right Trump appointee. Debra Shigley is running as a common-sense Democrat — she’ll bring pragmatic leadership focused on lowering costs for families, investing in our public schools, and expanding access to healthcare.
[**Georgia Senate Dems are going all out to help elect Debra Shigley and other Democrat challengers in key districts across our state. Seats like this one could swing the State Senate blue and we only have a couple weeks to fundraise our way to victory. Can you chip in a split donation with Fair Fight today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113901242/565313938/1468145729?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250824_T1_GASenDemsSplitNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg3MjBiNS1mNDgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3fMX_ilY4mwvPMzQS-CLs0Aj6z-shmOFe-FkVVIj6gI=)

August 26th is just around the corner. The nature of the Special Election means that every dollar raised must go out the door immediately to amplify Debra’s message to every voter in the district. _And while these races often get less attention than they deserve, the consequences are enormous._

clean_body: The date is set for this crucial Special Election | | | | The freedom to vote is on the ballot in 2025 and beyond, and Fair Fight is teaming up with the Georgia Senate Dems to help flip this seat from red to blue. Winning races like this one is vital to stopping Georgia lawmakers from passing new voter suppression laws. Keep reading to learn more — Election Day is coming up fast! Big news, friend: The date of the Special Election in GA Senate District-21 has been set for August 26th! In less than two weeks, Democrat Debra Shigley has an opportunity to flip this critical seat blue in the Georgia State Senate. This seat is being vacated by a far-right Trump appointee. Debra Shigley is running as a common-sense Democrat — she’ll bring pragmatic leadership focused on lowering costs for families, investing in our public schools, and expanding access to healthcare. = = August 26th is just around the corner. The nature of the Special Election means that every dollar raised must go out the door immediately to amplify Debra’s message to every voter in the district. And while these races often get less attention than they deserve, the consequences are enormous. We can’t afford to wait. It’s time to replace the far-right Republican with a candidate who has Georgians’ best interests at heart. = Let’s do this, Georgia Senate Dems = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: 140,000 Minnesotans will lose their Medicaid coverage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Republicans voted to kick millions off their healthcare plans, and make everyone else’s healthcare more expensive too.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=2&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)
Friend — We are starting to see the real-world consequences of Trump and Republicans’ disastrous budget bill.
A new analysis by the Minnesota Department of Human Services shows that **140,000 Minnesotans could lose their Medicaid coverage** as a result of this bill. I’m appalled.
I can’t imagine how painful this will be for my neighbors here in Minneapolis. When poverty makes everything in life difficult, when every day is a struggle to get by, the last thing one needs is to be forced off their healthcare plan and cut off from affording life-saving care.
Experts also say that the huge loss in Medicaid funds coming through our health system will force rural hospitals and health centers to close and drive up the cost of healthcare for **everyone,** not just those on Medicaid, as providers attempt to cover the funding gap.
Our goal between now and the midterms must be **to remind the American people every day that Republicans voted to kick millions off their healthcare plans,** and make everyone else’s healthcare more expensive too.
We need to win not just a Democratic majority in Congress, but a Democratic majority that will tear up Trump’s ugly bill, restore this Medicaid funding on day one, and fight to create a comprehensive Medicare-for-All system.
I have led this fight since I was first elected in 2018, because I believe at a fundamental level that your income or your background should have no bearing on your ability to get the healthcare you need.
**[Friend, I am asking everyone in this movement who is ready to fight for Medicaid and our working class friends and neighbors to support my mission today with a contribution.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=3&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)
Democrats suffered a historic loss with working class voters in the 2024 election. We have to show who’s side we’re really on — and make the case that Trump and Republicans turned their backs on millions of Americans so they could pass huge tax breaks for billionaires.
Please, **[use this link**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=4&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc) or one of the buttons below to add your donation and power our movement to victory:**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-aug25.l9ypIT&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=23&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-aug25.hA29K4&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=24&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-aug25.xQD3kt&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=25&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-aug25.E8Gh2z&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=26&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-aug25.RQVE1H&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=27&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-aug25.cfZhOB&refcode=em250824-1-180&t=28&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**

****
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**.

Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=1776_791427_kgtQLc&akid=1776%2E791427%2EkgtQLc)**.

name: David Hogg
subject: This is why our legislatures are so out of touch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re doing the work — and it’s working.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250824-1&t=1&akid=2561%2E587540%2Ebz1qYx)
Peter —
A new study just came out on who holds power in our state legislatures. And I’ll be honest — it didn’t surprise me.
Most state lawmakers are over 50, white, male, married without kids at home, and financially secure outside their legislative salary. That’s not a bad thing in and of itself — but it _is_ a problem when that’s overwhelmingly who’s making our laws.
Because that’s not what this country looks like.
**It’s why we launched Leaders We Deserve — to elect young people, women, Black and Brown leaders, LGBTQ+ folks, and working people from all walks of life. People who actually look like and live like the communities they represent.**
We’re doing the work — and it’s working. But we’re up against political machines, billionaire donors, and a system that was never built for us to win. So we’ve got to fight harder, organize smarter, and yeah — raise the money to go toe-to-toe with the status quo.
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250824_1_average?refcode=em20250824-2561&amount=5&refcode2=2561_587540_bz1qYx&akid=2561%2E587540%2Ebz1qYx)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250824_1_average?amount=5&refcode=em20250824-2561&refcode2=2561_587540_bz1qYx&akid=2561%2E587540%2Ebz1qYx)**
Representation is more than a buzzword. It’s the foundation of real democracy.
If you’ve ever wondered why our legislatures are so out of touch — this is it. And it won’t change unless we do the work to change it.
Thank you for being in this with us.
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250824-1&t=2&refcode2=2561_587540_bz1qYx&akid=2561%2E587540%2Ebz1qYx)**

Team, it’s Senator Blunt Rochester. One of my biggest priorities in the Senate so far has been improving the availability of affordable housing. I’ve introduced three important bills that would expand the number of homes and rental properties available by increasing the amount banks can invest in affordable housing projects, helping local governments streamline the housing permitting process, and tasking HUD with creating improved zoning laws for local governments to adopt. **I’m proud that these bills are moving forward under the bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act. This is a great step towards improving our housing crisis!** [**But now we need to show there’s widespread support for these measures, team. Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my ROAD to Housing Act today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113903386/565316327/-1842421571?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.24_Citizen-Housing_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVhY2VkMC1mNjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUCaiykwxQF7GlCqpjSx6MvYerUdDEVzYJ05FJVYjto=&emci=6d407de7-d17e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=55eaced0-f680-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11913588) | | [**BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113903388/565316331/-1842421571?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.08.24_Citizen-Housing_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWVhY2VkMC1mNjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUCaiykwxQF7GlCqpjSx6MvYerUdDEVzYJ05FJVYjto=&emci=6d407de7-d17e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=55eaced0-f680-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11913588)

name: Eugene Vindman
subject: I blew the whistle on Trump 6 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113903466/565316522/-530215862?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.24_OTS-Eugene-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VhY2VkMC1mNjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emLdaakDKzMtboD1tqJzPR886YkB1D72ayvZlL2zT88=)
6 years ago, Trump made the phone call that forever altered the lives of me and my twin brother. On July 25, 2019, my brother, Alexander Vindman, listened as President Trump attempted to extort our ally, Ukraine, by withholding military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated Joe Biden. At the time, I was serving as the senior ethics official at the National Security Council in the White House. After Alex reported the call to me, my brother and I made the fateful decision to do our patriotic duty and stand up to Donald Trump at the risk of our decades-long military careers. **We blew the whistle on him and reported his corrupt phone call with Ukraine up the chain of command. Our actions eventually led to his impeachment, and Trump retaliated by firing us from our posts.** The decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump cost my brother and me our military careers. But over two decades ago, I swore an oath to protect our country and our Constitution from threats, foreign and domestic, and I would not let Trump deter me from that duty. I ran for Congress last year to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy. I’ve done everything in my power to hold Trump and his MAGA cronies accountable — no matter the political cost — because I’ll never stop defending truth, democracy, and working Americans. But speaking out comes with consequences. I’m already one of the GOP’s top targets in the House, and National Republicans have already dumped millions into ads smearing and attacking me. Republicans have made it clear that they’ll spare no resources in kicking me out of Congress, and it’s only going to get worse from here. So today, on the 6th anniversary of the day that changed my and my brother’s lives, I am asking you to support my campaign so I can continue defending our democracy and fighting for you in Congress. **[_Can you please split $10 between my campaign for Congress and Off the Sidelines PAC today? Every dollar will help us fight against the MAGA extremists who will do anything to take our movement down._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113903467/565316523/463250139?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.24_OTS-Eugene-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VhY2VkMC1mNjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emLdaakDKzMtboD1tqJzPR886YkB1D72ayvZlL2zT88=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eugene Vindman and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113903468/565316524/463250139?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.24_OTS-Eugene-Vindman-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2VhY2VkMC1mNjgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emLdaakDKzMtboD1tqJzPR886YkB1D72ayvZlL2zT88=)

clean_body: President Trump left you a message about our race in South Carolina. | Fellow American, I wanted to share this message from President Trump >> President Trump knows how important this race is to protecting our America First majority in the United States Senate. That's why, at a recent campaign stop, he called in to tell you exactly why! I am incredibly thankful to have President Trump's support, but I want to know, | Thanks for your support, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. body:
This is step one in taking back the Senate from the Republicans.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93708?refcode=em20250824-9313&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9313%2E614464%2ECKJyqA)
Peter, it’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because **[I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93708?refcode=em20250824-9313&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9313%2E614464%2ECKJyqA)**
Look... **It’s been months of Trump 2.0,** and we’ve seen more than enough to call this a failure.
Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn't a safe blue seat, folks._
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans. **[So if you can, please split $10 between Chris’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93708?refcode=em20250824-9313&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9313%2E614464%2ECKJyqA)**

Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
[ ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=084fb6c910ea459dbfcafb54fc199578&_e=0tAipzIKAxJ6uvApg_PWytWGVdT80Zyhq2X6Gz6vRboQ0-GmCGEclkZT26msgremu7HZOQB1sNHN-27sE5wyZ1yPp-W7WueYMhCfMO533PF7udf1MResb3pea4JtFVHX77xryc8wKfUCyfB7WSR-fQAyEOpz5oL7siCfzQYaT6hC-YPKKvOwTtBJql09uOxEseJRqTkUVWwKHhS_qGASmPr2KoTHqqhYXDz_BFUsziIC2CotWYDVHTFnZTkElMr0UKLHZzzqrOggwFZ_TN4zb5Us6sH7nAgIRhnOlYTGMuiua1q2Dv2MvHsrOI-qt5GIWXfpl0WfgiZQOCurTQBve-AmvgA5DC_rBnB8a7WPv_tFx4IvAjd12X0qZb-0lJNV_q5TxkN7xqRfYNNCML2B_A-KTESoFvZq0V3LiR93CLRxBA6To5yfAldDkyq_2vn6vyBb5BF1-zcHprFSD4MwNRv7XmhhRzZ9emhL82FpJoAMLsdbm4wJ0dDYqSH22IuIqcJiXRVURv5MQ0MVaNlOW7VkXl23mg4ZGIo5xUO8eYemczcvCsI8aZU2DkSjQlgIqnSLEvzOua3nNDQjk0no9IbNJDjazovoaOWZ9hOHO9WJ9SR2ULDvKX20XEV6hDLzCjex3H7JwZi_IZv1xecd0g%3D%3D)
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---

name: Ken Martin
subject: Derek, Democrats are done fighting with one arm tied behind our back.
body:
---
Derek, Donald Trump is so terrified about Republicans losing power next year that he’s trying to rig the game at halftime with gerrymandered maps in places like Texas. For months, we promised that if Republicans wanted a showdown, they would get a showdown. Well, last week, Gavin Newsom and California Democrats sent a booming message to the entire country: **We are done fighting with one arm tied behind our back.** California Democrats have called for a special election to pass the Election Rigging Response Act — which will redraw the state’s maps and defend fair representation in our country. This is a game changer. The Election Rigging Response Act will level the playing field and help ensure voters decide who runs the House of Representatives — _not Donald Trump._ The DNC will support this ballot measure every step of the way, but with Republicans undoubtedly about to throw everything they’ve got at stopping it, **I’m personally asking you to contribute to help Democrats win:** $3 to help defend our democracy. $3 to ensure voters pick their representatives, not the other way around. $3 to make sure Trump can’t rig the 2026 election to prevent us from electing a Democratic House of Representatives. [**Please use this link to pitch in $3 — or any amount that makes sense for you — today. We’re looking for a lot of contributions today to send a powerful message to Trump about the strength of our opposition.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250824_4404_fr&refcode2=4404_22930333_qgThp8&akid=4404%2E22930333%2EqgThp8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250824_4404_fr&refcode2=4404_22930333_qgThp8&akid=4404%2E22930333%2EqgThp8)**

clean_body: Derek, Donald Trump is so terrified about Republicans losing power next year that he’s trying to rig the game at halftime with gerrymandered maps in places like Texas. For months, we promised that if Republicans wanted a showdown, they would get a showdown. Well, last week, Gavin Newsom and California Democrats sent a booming message to the entire country: We are done fighting with one arm tied behind our back. California Democrats have called for a special election to pass the Election Rigging Response Act — which will redraw the state’s maps and defend fair representation in our country. This is a game changer. The Election Rigging Response Act will level the playing field and help ensure voters decide who runs the House of Representatives — not Donald Trump. The DNC will support this ballot measure every step of the way, but with Republicans undoubtedly about to throw everything they’ve got at stopping it, I’m personally asking you to contribute to help Democrats win: $3 to help defend our democracy. $3 to ensure voters pick their representatives, not the other way around. $3 to make sure Trump can’t rig the 2026 election to prevent us from electing a Democratic House of Representatives. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** We can’t — and won’t — let Trump rig his way through the midterms. But we can only do it with your help. Thank you, Ken Ken Martin Chair Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

subject: Will you add your name to endorse Chris Pappas?

body:
Chris would be honored to have your support.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1988%2E582294%2EgF9MYw)
Chris Pappas is running for U.S. Senate — and he’s building a campaign powered by the people of New Hampshire, not Washington insiders or special interests.
Chris has never backed down from a tough fight. He’s defended one of the most competitive districts in the country, delivered for working families, and stood up to the MAGA agenda time and again. That’s why grassroots organizations, labor unions, and Granite Staters from across the state are lining up to endorse him.

Vaccines save lives. |

Peter, it’s in the national interest to keep the American people healthy. **Moreover, it’s the duty of every public official to help keep our people safe.** The Trump Administration is already failing in that duty. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy recently cut $500 million in vaccine development projects — threatening research into a cutting-edge technology being explored for cancer treatment. This is a dangerous political stunt, Peter. The far-right has long stoked conspiracy theories about vaccines and other public health matters, and national Republicans have decided to play into them. The swift development of vaccines is a lifesaver and a miracle of science. We know that vaccines have saved millions of lives from infectious diseases like polio and measles. The Trump Administration’s decision to gut vaccine research is shortsighted and dangerous. **[I’m asking the Trump Administration to reconsider their decision on vaccine development, and I need you to stand with me. Please add your name to our petition here >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113909577/565330913/1048290154?refcode=ea.5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM0ZjhhZC1mYzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LT5YdgBEKOB9xyMlmo2W2JsHxaVj-WFVrigyrtuRfjo=&emci=96ae4e9f-877f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113909579/565330916/1048290154?refcode=ea.5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM0ZjhhZC1mYzgwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LT5YdgBEKOB9xyMlmo2W2JsHxaVj-WFVrigyrtuRfjo=&emci=96ae4e9f-877f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5c34f8ad-fc80-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: Vaccines save lives. | Peter, it’s in the national interest to keep the American people healthy. Moreover, it’s the duty of every public official to help keep our people safe. The Trump Administration is already failing in that duty. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy recently cut $500 million in vaccine development projects — threatening research into a cutting-edge technology being explored for cancer treatment. This is a dangerous political stunt, Peter. The far-right has long stoked conspiracy theories about vaccines and other public health matters, and national Republicans have decided to play into them. The swift development of vaccines is a lifesaver and a miracle of science. We know that vaccines have saved millions of lives from infectious diseases like polio and measles. The Trump Administration’s decision to gut vaccine research is shortsighted and dangerous. | Thanks so much, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Team Swalwell
subject: The “One Big UGLY Bill” is a gift to the wealthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
It’s been just over 50 days since Trump’s so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” was signed into law. Around here, we call it what it really is: the One Big UGLY Bill .

Why? Because while Republicans never stop talking about “fiscal responsibility” and “lowering the deficit,” this bill adds more than $2 trillion to our national debt. And it doesn’t lift a finger to help working families.

Instead, the OBBB is a massive giveaway to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations. Tax loopholes for billionaires. Handouts to Trump’s donors and friends. Benefits for hedge funds, oil companies, and pharmaceutical giants — while the rest of us are left footing the bill.

RESIST THE OBBB [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Aug2025-FR-August?&refcode=E14870-20250823-OBBB-SB-GOP&amount=25]

You would think if Republicans were so eager to spend, they’d invest in things that actually benefit the American people — like lowering the cost of prescription drugs, investing in schools, repairing infrastructure, or protecting Social Security and Medicare. But this is the GOP we’re talking about. They’ve made it clear: their priority is padding the pockets of the rich, not serving the people they swore an oath to represent.

We can’t let them get away with it. If we’re going to hold them accountable, we need grassroots supporters like you standing with us.

Chip in now to help us fight back against Trump’s One Big UGLY Bill and the MAGA agenda that puts billionaires ahead of everyday Americans.

CHIP IN NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Aug2025-FR-August?&refcode=E14870-20250823-OBBB-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Together, we’ll prove that people power can beat corporate power.

- Team Swalwell
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E14870-20250823-OBBB-footer-GOP&amount=25]
http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP [http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP]
Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Join Swalwell's Circle, Eric's inner circle of supporters, by committing to a $50 or more monthly contribution today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-14-email-Footer-FR-SwalwellsCircle?refcode=E14870-20250823-OBBB-footer-GOP&amount=50&recurring=auto]
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd like to receive only the most critical updates, sign up for his Break Glass in Case of Urgency list to receive less email. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rS_HmHYcFEmvPz8NXOFevw2] If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=x%2BxGKxIUzYa7qey1tyarzWRhQcckDOlo0cAvD1cNxCO3%2Bgu11J6UZJCuvLcf4B64Jadm%2BwYhpxgp1X%2Fkhw3bHp3g6HgSw3mcnz%2B%2BvmHyb3qPjJbJYm2gyNt7w6EUR4o%2F%2FCGWwETmkFfbWGLXFE2yfG6A6oxufzGD2kj5ja2JmVULpwdQt6dGSkLxbuini6NWodVgNJkVqiryvVsOyp2waxvbEO0lP61FyJ%2Beuxmtj4SMwl8WP4zOkJCRwn%2BfQImwfZyFsbtpkwW5C90GVZ33crKbLigKG96Dbqu5lkRRDpQrf1hP8YCGTfReYAPpWDqc1v3eqmDn4SZmPBCOnt%2FZfrS2Di2T7hAF3mAD0Hy1hAQQZLWafXMI8%2FNrkWGnol5%2BXBGMNN1DvAcdoU0zDX82uCgwHr1Y8tp0CXCvc6Ketls%3D

name: Transform the Democratic Party  via Our Revolution
subject: The Democratic Party is facing a registration crisis. It’s time to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1011&refcode=email-20250824_v&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

The alarm bells are ringing: the Democratic Party is facing a voter
registration *crisis*.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25622?source=email-20250824&t=1060&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]Headline: The Democratic Party Faces a Voter Registration Crisis

New data shows the party is bleeding voters at a staggering rate.
Meanwhile, the establishment seems more eager to protect corporate donors
than energize the grassroots. They're sidelining progressives like Zohran
Mamdani and ignoring calls for bold action on urgent issues.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250824nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]Our Revolution is working around the clock to change that – and we need
your help. Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can so we can fight to get
dark money out of our politics, elect real progressive champions, and
transform the Democratic Party?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

The stakes couldn’t be higher. Our entire democracy is at risk if the
Democratic Party keeps driving its own base away. That’s why Our
Revolution members like you are stepping up, building grassroots power in
all 50 states.

It’s already making a difference. We just succeeded in pushing the DNC to
introduce a resolution that would FINALLY ban dark money in Democratic
primaries. Progressives like Mamdani are inspiring the grassroots and
showing billionaires and corporate Democrats that their days are numbered.

But insiders are stonewalling at every turn. The pattern is clear: the
Democratic establishment isn’t just ignoring activists – they’re actively
fighting change.

That’s why we’re going on the offense. We’ve organized on the outside AND
the inside, and now we have a shot to push the DNC to officially ban dark
money from primaries, fundamentally reshaping how our party runs. We’re
mobilizing voters in key districts and ramping up support for candidates
who won’t sell out when it matters. And we’re doubling down on local
organizing to build trust, register new voters, and bring working people
back into the fold.

But this work depends on you. Corporate lobbyists have bottomless wallets.
Grassroots movements like ours have millions of people willing to give
what they can.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25621?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250824nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9232%2E5885482%2EVl9TO8 ]Will you make a contribution to fuel Our Revolution's fight to transform
the Democratic Party?

If we don’t call the party back to its roots – fighting for working
families, not wealthy donors – the crisis will only deepen. But together,
we can build a party that earns trust, breaks corporate power, and
actually *wins* for the people.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Vice President JD Vance **[flipped the script on a question from a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/a27d73f1-2501-47a0-8d0d-226908f9845b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who pressed him about the administration's treatment of the homeless in Washington D.C. amid President Trump's crackdown on crime.
**[Vance's answer was perfect... ](https://substack.com/redirect/a27d73f1-2501-47a0-8d0d-226908f9845b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a27d73f1-2501-47a0-8d0d-226908f9845b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What is happening to the people who are homeless, often poor, often have a mental health or drug problem, where are they actually going when these encampments are being torn down?" the reporter asked Vance.
**["The question portrays a certain misunderstanding](https://substack.com/redirect/a27d73f1-2501-47a0-8d0d-226908f9845b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of what we're trying to do," Vance answered, recounting a time when a "crazy person" shouted at his kids at D.C.'s Union Station.
"Wait a second, why have w2e convinced ourselves that it's compassionate to let a person who is obviously suffering from mental illness to fester in the streets?!" Vance returned the question. "These are your streets, paid for by your tax dollars, and you ought to be able to use them!"
