# Mamdani fails to bench 135 lbs unassisted at humiliating campaign event
Democratic mayoral frontrunner Zohran Mamdani was **[unable to execute a single unassisted bench press](https://substack.com/redirect/265abf0c-830f-4b3d-b85b-d4eccf5a97d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** rep with a 135-pound bar at Brooklyn's Men's Day event, requiring full assistance from a spotter for two attempted reps before giving up.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9068642c-7494-431b-a99c-c4e5efa4a253?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Political rivals mock "Mamscrawny" display** : Mayor Eric Adams and ex-governor Andrew Cuomo seized on the viral moment, with Adams posting his own successful bench press video and writing "64 vs 33. A lifetime of hard work vs. a silver spoon," while dubbing Mamdani "Mamscrawny."
* **Mamdani shows soccer skills after gym failure** : Despite the embarrassing bench press attempt, the 33-year-old socialist candidate redeemed himself by removing his designer boots and skillfully kicking a soccer ball at an inflatable target, demonstrating competence in Uganda's national sport where he was born.

* * *

# RFK makes big move for transparency - FDA launches real-time adverse event reporting
The Food and Drug Administration began **[publicly reporting adverse events for drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/ced036ce-8c77-4bb8-9b7d-c21047666005?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and some vaccines in real time through its FAERS dashboard, ending the previous months-long delay in making this safety information available to the public.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ced036ce-8c77-4bb8-9b7d-c21047666005?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Commissioner promotes "radical transparency"** : FDA Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary called the change part of promoting "radical transparency," stating that people shouldn't have to "wait months" for adverse event information to become public after navigating "clunky" government reporting websites.
* **Part of broader safety modernization strategy** : The FDA described this as a significant step in modernizing its safety monitoring infrastructure and part of a broader data modernization strategy to streamline adverse event reporting systems and identify safety signals faster across all platforms.
* **[Aligns with RFK Jr.'s HHS reforms](https://substack.com/redirect/826ded17-4df4-4d33-aa62-c33e51e3c3d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[:](https://substack.com/redirect/826ded17-4df4-4d33-aa62-c33e51e3c3d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The change comes under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who has made significant changes to vaccine oversight, including gutting the Advisory Committee for Immunization Practices and appointing new members like Dr. Robert Malone, a critic of mRNA COVID vaccines who worked on early mRNA vaccine research.

name: Katie Hobbs
subject: Consider this your wake-up call:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Katie Hobbs is running for Governor in Arizona and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Katie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250824-1-90&t=1&akid=6160%2E6688874%2EtVMBM8)
---
It’s no secret that this race is going to be one of the most competitive gubernatorial races in the entire country, team.
In 2022, I won by less than one percentage point. And last year? Trump won Arizona by 5 points.
**Now, he’s endorsed TWO of my GOP opponents, millions have already been spent on TV ads, and the attacks on me have already begun.**
So if you thought this campaign was going to be a cakewalk, _consider this your wake-up call._
If you care about Arizona having a governor who delivers results and doesn’t play partisan games, _consider this your wake-up call._
If you believe in protecting reproductive rights, the rule of law, and all our fundamental freedoms, _consider this your wake-up call._
If you want to stop Trump’s MAGA allies from turning Arizona into their next stronghold, this is your wake-up call.
[**So, now that you know the stakes of this race, will you split a contribution of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Mark Kelly?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hobbs.0syrPb&refcode=em250824-1-90&t=2&akid=6160%2E6688874%2EtVMBM8)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Polluters think they can poison us and get away with it under the Trump administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
That's why electing strong Attorneys General matters more than ever.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113910715/565333631/1328794144?refcode=ea.b5a24450-0081-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b5a24450-0081-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YTI0NDUwLTAwODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ih3sPHNSkjy8_Jj7aywrdzNSZc_MAc8XvE9MaSNkexs=&emci=44254be5-7c7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b5a24450-0081-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there, it’s Jane Fonda. **I read something in the _New York Times_ recently that I found deeply unsettling: Civil lawsuits against major polluters plummeted during Trump’s first six months in office — dropping by nearly two-thirds compared to the previous administration.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113910717/565333633/2105508926?refcode=ea.b5a24450-0081-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b5a24450-0081-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1YTI0NDUwLTAwODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ih3sPHNSkjy8_Jj7aywrdzNSZc_MAc8XvE9MaSNkexs=) Settlements that once forced these companies to pay millions for environmental violations have all but disappeared. When the federal government refuses to hold polluters accountable, it’s up to state Attorneys General to step in and protect their people. **That's exactly what we've seen from JanePAC-endorsed champions like Attorney General Keith Ellison in Minnesota and Attorney General Rob Bonta in California, who have led the charge in filing lawsuits to protect their states from Trump's destructive agenda.** But not every Attorney General is willing to fight. Some are more interested in protecting their corporate donors than protecting people. Just look at Virginia's current Attorney General, Jason Miyares. While polluters poison and threaten Virginia's coastal communities, Miyares stays silent. He's accepted $700,000 this year from Dominion Energy — Virginia's largest corporate polluter — and it shows. Instead of holding these companies accountable in court, he's spent his time suing to block EPA pollution limits and fighting clean energy standards. So we’re not holding back in Virginia this year. We can elect Jay Jones — a leader who understands that corporate polluters must be held accountable, not coddled. He'll use the full power of the Attorney General's office to take polluters to court and demand justice for communities on the frontlines of environmental destruction. **When federal enforcement fails, we need state leaders who will fill the gap. We need Attorneys General who work for people, not polluters. clean_body: That's why electing strong Attorneys General matters more than ever. | Hi there, it’s Jane Fonda. I read something in the New York Times recently that I found deeply unsettling: Civil lawsuits against major polluters plummeted during Trump’s first six months in office — dropping by nearly two-thirds compared to the previous administration. = Settlements that once forced these companies to pay millions for environmental violations have all but disappeared. When the federal government refuses to hold polluters accountable, it’s up to state Attorneys General to step in and protect their people. That's exactly what we've seen from JanePAC-endorsed champions like Attorney General Keith Ellison in Minnesota and Attorney General Rob Bonta in California, who have led the charge in filing lawsuits to protect their states from Trump's destructive agenda. But not every Attorney General is willing to fight. Some are more interested in protecting their corporate donors than protecting people. Just look at Virginia's current Attorney General, Jason Miyares. While polluters poison and threaten Virginia's coastal communities, Miyares stays silent. He's accepted $700,000 this year from Dominion Energy — Virginia's largest corporate polluter — and it shows. Instead of holding these companies accountable in court, he's spent his time suing to block EPA pollution limits and fighting clean energy standards. So we’re not holding back in Virginia this year. We can elect Jay Jones — a leader who understands that corporate polluters must be held accountable, not coddled. He'll use the full power of the Attorney General's office to take polluters to court and demand justice for communities on the frontlines of environmental destruction. When federal enforcement fails, we need state leaders who will fill the gap. We need Attorneys General who work for people, not polluters. And we need your help to elect them.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Team — The 2026 midterms could come down to one state: **Michigan.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113912108/565337450/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250824_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTJjYjdlOWQtMDM4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=felG9Hw63ZfmVNBY5lYECIkHyqBJXKx-TxMmxzYbnPY=) **Control of the House?** _In play._

Already rated by experts as a toss-up. Down-ballot races that will impact voting rights, education, and reproductive freedom for years? It’s all on the line. But with Washington Republicans and their megadonors pouring in millions to flip our state red, we can’t afford to take anything for granted. name: [UPDATE] Team Bohannan
subject: Who's afraid of Christina Bohannan? Mariannette Miller-Meeks should be
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113912323/565338169/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQzNmVjZC0wMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maw4TB7xtFZqLRhSAsbyKkbfGga-AhtSd4S-1wQs14U=)
Peter,

Speaker Mike Johnson recently announced that he’s raised an eye-popping $50 million this year. **And from that massive pot, he sent a record-breaking $10.5 million straight to vulnerable incumbents, the largest amount funneled by a House Speaker directly to candidates ever.**

One of the first in line for the bailout? **Mariannette Miller-Meeks.**

It says a lot, doesn’t it? The election is still more than a year away, but Miller-Meeks is already leaning on her party bosses to come rescue her. _She knows her record in this district is indefensible, and instead of answering for it, she’s counting on millions from Washington to paper over her failures._

**And she has good reason to be worried. In 2024, Christina came within just 799 votes of defeating her.** That near miss shook Miller-Meeks, and it’s why she’s scrambling now. She’s scared of what’s coming, and frankly, she should be.

But her donors in Washington can’t buy momentum. We’ve proven this seat is winnable, and we’re building the campaign to finish what we started. The more nervous Miller-Meeks gets, the harder she’ll lean on party bosses, and the more important it is that we show her money can’t shield her from the truth.

Help us make sure she stays terrified that she’s going to lose this seat, because we know we have what it takes to make that happen.

**[Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help Christina flip IA-01 and send Miller-Meeks packing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113912327/565338174/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250824_FRJohn_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250824_FRJohn_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7dd36ecd-0381-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQzNmVjZC0wMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maw4TB7xtFZqLRhSAsbyKkbfGga-AhtSd4S-1wQs14U=)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113912331/565338177/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250824_FRJohn_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250824_FRJohn_fnd_gq_act___UTB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=7dd36ecd-0381-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQzNmVjZC0wMzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=maw4TB7xtFZqLRhSAsbyKkbfGga-AhtSd4S-1wQs14U=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Speaker Mike Johnson recently announced that he’s raised an eye-popping $50 million this year. And from that massive pot, he sent a record-breaking $10.5 million straight to vulnerable incumbents, the largest amount funneled by a House Speaker directly to candidates ever. One of the first in line for the bailout? Mariannette Miller-Meeks. It says a lot, doesn’t it? The election is still more than a year away, but Miller-Meeks is already leaning on her party bosses to come rescue her. She knows her record in this district is indefensible, and instead of answering for it, she’s counting on millions from Washington to paper over her failures. And she has good reason to be worried. In 2024, Christina came within just 799 votes of defeating her. That near miss shook Miller-Meeks, and it’s why she’s scrambling now. She’s scared of what’s coming, and frankly, she should be. But her donors in Washington can’t buy momentum. We’ve proven this seat is winnable, and we’re building the campaign to finish what we started. The more nervous Miller-Meeks gets, the harder she’ll lean on party bosses, and the more important it is that we show her money can’t shield her from the truth. Help us make sure she stays terrified that she’s going to lose this seat, because we know we have what it takes to make that happen. = = – Team Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. Chip in to support her campaign today >> | = = | PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52240 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: We can’t wait until next year’smidterms: We need to act now.
body:
We’re empowering progressives to fight for our communities and our rights. | | |
---
Friend, We can’t wait until next year’s midterms to organize the resistance to Trump’s authoritarian takeover or to build a more equitable world. This weekend we just wrapped up our six-week Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship, where we’ve trained 16 fellows—ranging in age from 15 to 24—on the skills they need to organize their communities right now. All are BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), and they’ll each receive a $1,000 stipend thanks to your support. Next, we’ll launch our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re giving high school students a chance to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change. **But we’re not just training the leaders of tomorrow. We’re also supporting candidates who are on the ballot this year,** some of whom have been through our candidate training program: [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJToeWGAhx9fKERF9q4bIp-GG6lH8Ntv4xliViEkyOzY_Zwe6B4cUEijb0QGTG_jYMaM-uJxeJsXrtxRwRlTwNX-HcEb1NnLTDxw_mNo_VUMyHU8vqlGlBy9FoAYize3Yh1wLUxxLK_-yuyJhVP2RaOCwqXYpl9V3Rh9FzU5XybQfRVP8FJDeQH8KK7bw1o3vQZq7dDe42mA2XKXtcD-f1gIxEvWJnGIA5KbMdDLAG5lhEmNCqCXOVYiaYlaU0OspWN20RMTzDys-cYyZXBcyR2-TXRG95CNH-rtPCZYOCaofIQl0Rb870YZ8sGPSZGEf77CHOKIwxGkSEaQ5ShU2to6SZKVMaX9SSl4gCwwsb1WE4WQ/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h0/h001.tNewNWcRiU80r01hWRFvg1RdzqDRWEOM0AVXZb5bEMI) In solidarity,
Rashida

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Aug 23, 2025
Subject: We can’t wait until next year’s midterms: We need to act now.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In response to Trump’s authoritarian takeover, we’re organizing for today and for our future.
This weekend, we’re wrapping up our summer Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship. With your support, we’ve trained 16 fellows ranging in age from 15 to 24 years old. This year’s cohort is 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 62.5% female, and 37.5% male.
By the end of this weekend, our youth fellows will have each completed 20 hours of field work and 30 hours of training and instruction from community leaders and experts in issue areas including environmental justice, education justice, the labor movement, knowing your rights, and criminal justice reform and the abolitionist movement. They’ve also been attending community meetings such as city council, school board, and board of police commissioners.
They’ll each receive a $1,000 stipend and they’ll move forward in their communities with skills on personal leadership, political and community organizing, and campaign communication. These young people are ready to make our world better.
**After this weekend, we’ll prepare to launch our next big youth leadership program:** our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re offering high school students an opportunity to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change.
[**Click here to watch our new video, which gives you a glimpse into the Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship and how we’re training the leaders of tomorrow. Then could you donate to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today to power our work, including supporting the progressive candidates we need right now?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTodyf0f4ningGQAYrn6E9LnaubQoYkv6-t_1i9-09ch7VmvWiYXLIajlfYFbkoUZFks43g8dbpqgvBlT_lj1nbA3BRPi0wUhnddL8DcsRZWe9HAp41qpEGdnzUbphR_v7Bvv_i0-K41ipBcuSiPoxgWw57iD6JakZEuQajsNX1378MbvuNK5D0n7XfxTx9fKEFm_woZNsQuvXunKFVsy_sxL80vvEkLSP4dFNq9ZfHC0srev-2POityqhGE37wUj4lGWaQL73-8SZXcP9Hi6Ly9S7NEeOwLBUlioSqRz365gWZzFY32eAQgeItROelpSYnK6_8DnPt6B3TQwcC_B02_rjbDsAqdkTPcB3GZ9AZluIw/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h4/h001.zZcjP_TLbIrHudebxrWW5_my7NQYBGoD68BkyUJwjBs)
**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTocbgc8pYaLjoPncmLXxTgy3LjR37YYtE1QlVMCJZ0nTEkfCX7sf6kscxaah8A_j1zcQlb26fynr1X0oGnf5PEb_TSahAInMoikCEsETGrb2S9idKQa-eTuoOizT-MWJ637tRZGvrqSGGf9jTfiorzaYePH9pZP8l9rBvnHJ0v6-fnyznf9ADuoocrnFoz7TtfGXD3ygk0PpesZUJlu6F6k6kjSWXcqdf2ApsqDLbSzfq8W32SAwLmsEPe-Jk1rQ1PbQ_pHQeFAA6H6hxBmm-fIxPo4GJmhSxQpzpZ3ekr3wOCT1BXF0VTs7aM0diAnr-sKpeZDOw8j7I9GC_KFSKpuIYqWaPuCKMxghWcijcX2b5w/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h5/h001.ixa4FTZ-J-ER74igahpy7u0gWMZaGPgwCltz3c2I9xE)**
[WATCH & DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTodYbYqufpm3xeLvdOScH--hDbyJOU37kqcUtJHfI1wAdiqzf-SBlpiw06g-Fb6wJSD0Mus4yCHxzTsth9VsGrCm_Ypj7tnkIXdadO9hQpkhimuk0UK6xOpyVLxGlp-AexSykfaAHED4m-QkEgbpwU0C4LWUqBlsUZ11yj1UZ7u8K59MNcA1lA5meSOCO_3RmUPErHamHD5DYYN-_loYop7-vfISNM-Wjkbe08qTOX6ZwrtNrj3Ex-g2zFg7Qp7yok37pWcJcJTT7F7gTVZDyFfjJ6p1fd7CaXX88WNW8aL8e4qOQFIBRehgfU-2hc60veLki9aqmxE1REPDwEUMmqJSjJVoD0G9X5jClph0PPce3w/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h6/h001.MliFMmJ78KX6z-IXb2MMRDNue9_AHdCNhThPoNk3A1s)
---
In addition to supporting future leaders, we’re endorsing and supporting candidates who are rooted in their community and fighting for equity. One of these candidates is people’s champion Detroit City Council candidate Denzel McCampbell, who came in first in his recent primary election!
[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTodbmGqSSNITv4CMcu9oMETHrP47WdrWvLOtUR58oJryyGagKN_pWRT4vn7e3DuXloM3y2GDhKaw068RNhDT3XktbyYBfFxGRJVrRw2cWJT7ozOh1RweMbleTi19K1gO5zq_Ph45ZiQhkPRGp34gEvLsPu02McD9OlFxjoULX7CHswT7PNce7ZE44qvNyw5TB1gX-1BjJZPQNmxMfSpPLx2Vjcnmf40W6MGC8PLP6WDQiWdJiyFfpfGHE3_rY5xu-nf7ouSozZ2zrRUoB9UFjWJAXyKWt3Uu_E56czRgFof3DsPlWLJoYWDcNzlYY2w8uJrHEr7JFdLljARBXtiygG93Xor3GL24A0hfHawxW8q1nw/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h7/h001.0FLQWprVMnAI1F65KGPAXA9XqDR9T8fpnl4IPCyKqC4)
Next year’s midterms will be important, but we can’t afford to wait another year to bring positive change to our communities—which are struggling under high prices and authoritarian threats right now.
Local elections are underway across the country, and we will keep contributing to progressives’ campaigns to grow our power.
[**Click here to watch our new video, then donate to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtm4mR3rR5-gdsy2SqfTCd2CyGg30ums2YejE2rNfJTof5fEI_hUyWQx32SL1RJ22gQLeIWic-HbY3n_CWC-YheYpDVt1y6-dfBR_bju4gCmlahgRNWliat4BJ_2NxLlYSDX0b8DJVQqIShQGg5w0qzncAVA7bkUCW93toq0oGI24kepQnqe0IVhR3Djt0k2hm_yzDjfoQ-Pr_ww2VKeUEEhAWDbCdS7HdXmlxtnvyWQc0Sfi0aEoC_SJ-2kNzvr7-E7_PKeL7uZy8Hma7K44i5SdzVcXUO5-2xgg7CTZgR6NlL8Y1uphmFifFHruqMBqoXnjHB4yBbT9-AE7C_hnUjRUBTOw4bN8DotQpgyaA3lT9xpeyX8ToNZJqLopZ4YkLB0Oih_v6FAZc3TLY6x-XFg/4jb/L34itZ9OS7OSLCQexC1K6A/h8/h001.LcmluAphebYM520BqYs0__EHs1oybCdR6vwdzrpmsqk)
Together, we are empowering people of all ages to fight for our communities and our rights.
In solidarity,
Rashida

This weekend, we’re wrapping up our summer Youth Civic Engagement Fellowship. With your support, we’ve trained 16 fellows ranging in age from 15 to 24 years old. This year’s cohort is 100% BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, or people of color), 62.5% female, and 37.5% male. By the end of this weekend, our youth fellows will have each completed 20 hours of field work and 30 hours of training and instruction from community leaders and experts in issue areas including environmental justice, education justice, the labor movement, knowing your rights, and criminal justice reform and the abolitionist movement. They’ve also been attending community meetings such as city council, school board, and board of police commissioners. They’ll each receive a $1,000 stipend and they’ll move forward in their communities with skills on personal leadership, political and community organizing, and campaign communication. These young people are ready to make our world better. After this weekend, we’ll prepare to launch our next big youth leadership program: our Youth Advisory Council, where we’re offering high school students an opportunity to work alongside me and other policymakers to create meaningful change. In addition to supporting future leaders, we’re endorsing and supporting candidates who are rooted in their community and fighting for equity. One of these candidates is people’s champion Detroit City Council candidate Denzel McCampbell, who came in first in his recent primary election! Next year’s midterms will be important, but we can’t afford to wait another year to bring positive change to our communities—which are struggling under high prices and authoritarian threats right now. Local elections are underway across the country, and we will keep contributing to progressives’ campaigns to grow our power. Together, we are empowering people of all ages to fight for our communities and our rights. In solidarity, Rashida * | Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003, not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m taking on Republicans in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
We’ll win this race together.
#
Peter, our mission is clear: _Stand up for the American people who are being pushed aside in favor of billionaires and corporations._
Elected leaders need to stand for something more than a political party or personal power. Our people deserve nothing less than leaders who will do everything possible to make their lives better.
_That’s why I’m running for Senate._
**[This is the most competitive Senate election of 2026 — and The Hill is already calling it the #1 most likely to flip. Join me in taking on the GOP and split a donation between me and State Democrats Committee to our campaign here >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250824-9322&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9322%2E614464%2ErZFOXJ)**
Look, politicians in Washington are not serving their constituents — the millions of Americans just trying to get by day in and day out. They’re serving Donald Trump and the billionaires he wants to befriend.
**I will take them on.**
I will speak up for the people and speak out when those in power do us harm. I will defend the rights Americans hold dear and the democracy that is at the very core of who we are.
I am deeply grateful for the thousands of supporters who have stepped up in the last few days. Your enthusiasm, courage, and commitment to our shared cause is inspiring. **You are the reason I believe that our best days are ahead of us, Peter — but only if we stop the damage that’s happening now.**
**[But we have a long road ahead to Election Day, and I still need dedicated supporters to chip in. Can I ask you to split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94169?refcode=em20250824-9322&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9322%2E614464%2ErZFOXJ)**

There are 9 VoteVets endorsed challengers running for seats in the House next year. If every VoteVets challenger wins their campaign, that’s already a 3 seat majority.
#
**Republicans in the House:** 219
**Democrats in the House:** 212
**Vacancies:** 4 (3 Democratic, 1 Republican)
By that math, Democrats need to win six seats if we want to take back the House.

subject: CAUGHT: Congressional Director, “Trump’s Racist, Right-Wing Base”
disclaimer_text: paid for by our tax dollars
body:
When I reviewed the footage with Bhatt, my jaw was on the floor. Watch for yourself here.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvalRnRmNrVGVBUQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP2hpZHM9bmNFbThTalhqZm1lalBscw/gaKs8Kw/s0v55148127)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)
Dear Patriot,

One of OMG’s brave undercover journalists was able to sit down over dinner with Keane Bhatt, the Policy Director for the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC).

Now the CPC is an official caucus of the House of Representatives with its own staff, **paid for by our tax dollars.**

To give you an idea of their politics, **the Deputy Chairwoman of the CPC is none other than Ilhan Omar.**

When I reviewed the footage with Bhatt, my jaw was on the floor.

[**Watch for yourself here, and please, keep us going by donating today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)

[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)
So Bhatt, a government employee, not only called Trump supporters his “**racist, right-wing base** ," but he also bragged about getting court injunctions to stop deportation flights while working to pressure local governments not to cooperate with the federal government.

Yep, read that right. The CPC, **an office of the federal government, is pressuring local governments NOT TO cooperate with the federal government**.

How is this even allowed in Congress?

[**Watch the full investigation here, and remember, we don’t exist without your support.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)

August is always a tough month to make ends meet. Families are back to school and distractions abound, [**so we are running behind and have a stack of bills to pay**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)and a growing staff who need to feed their families on their meager salaries.

[**I appreciate any support you can provide**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7).

I want to give a shout-out to the men and women working at OMG**. I have never had a better team.** They are powerhouse workers who are committed to exposing the truth.

Just this past Friday, we were in a secret location with a team until 2 am, which had just arrived from our undercover reporters.

**Their dedication is unparalleled and I am grateful for all of them.**

So please, [**help my team keep going by donating today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11421881/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1iaGF0dC1tYi1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MjQ/LbmNsNFpMUzdONw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9b21nLWJoYXR0JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09b20mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJmFtb3VudD0yNSZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTMyMl93cjE/gaKs8Kw/sfm83769ff7)

Thanks for standing with us,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

Just this past Friday, we were in a secret location with a team until 2 am, which had just arrived from our undercover reporters. Their dedication is unparalleled and I am grateful for all of them. So please, Thanks for standing with us, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Paid protesters tried to intimidate us…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The Left is targeting us and watching our every move
| Peter,
---
This was truly an honor.
---
I just received the “Congresswoman of the Year” Award for deciding to withdraw my nomination to serve in President Trump’s Cabinet in order to SAVE our House majority.
---
And thank God for that decision.
---
Because right now, we're only _ONE_ seat over the threshold to declare a majority in the House — and that seat is _**ours**_. Our razor-thin margin is the only thing that separates a Trump House Majority from a Congress controlled by AOC and Ilhan Omar.
---
And that’s why the Left is targeting us and watching our every move...
---
**...Recently, at a non-political event I attended, dozens of paid protesters from a dark money left-wing group SWARMED the area in an attempt to INTIMIDATE us.**
---
Not only are Democrats furious that our seat saved the majority, _but they also see the nonstop headlines showing that we’re**“closing the gap”** on Kathy Hochul to achieve the “impossible” by electing a Republican governor of New York._
---
**It’s no coincidence that this paid agitation comes just after AOC came to our congressional district.**
---
**From _Wall Street Journal_ : “AOC, Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash...”**
---
The Radical Left sent us _their_ message of intimidation. Now it’s _our_ turn to respond with a message of our own.
---
**I need your help proving that their intimidation tactics didn’t just fail – they BACKFIRED.**
---
I’d love to report our largest fundraising surge to date – not just to send a message, but to build on our momentum to not just close the gap, but TAKE THE LEAD in this critical fight.
---
**Best of all, thanks to being awarded “Congresswoman of the Year,” I’ve secured a 500% MATCH for 24 hours – and given the Left’s tactics, I’m going to put it to use right now.**
---

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Banning congressional stock trading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Last month, a bipartisan bill to ban congressional stock trading passed out of a Senate committee.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113915318/565348937/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzE5MzcyMS0wYzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oFM6PIyIxVpIxMZ0WP-3Aw4nfvPCdoRa5yNAnwnhl-A=&emci=e2193721-0c81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ec193721-0c81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Last month, a bipartisan bill to ban congressional stock trading passed out of a Senate committee — one step closer to finally becoming the law of the land and ending one of Washington's biggest conflicts of interest. I've fought for this reform for over a decade because the guiding principle is clear as day: **Members of Congress should serve the public, not enrich themselves by trading individual stocks.** **That's why I authored the ETHICS Act, the stock trading bill the HONEST Act is based on.** The HONEST Act bans members of Congress (and their spouses) from owning or trading individual stocks while in office. Instead, they'd have to place their holdings in blind trusts or use broad-based funds that don't create conflicts of interest. Why is this so important? When lawmakers are making decisions about health care, energy, tech, or defense policy, the only question on their minds should be: _What's best for the American people?_ It should never be: _What's best for my stock portfolio?_ We've passed a version of this bill out of committee two years in a row. **That means the momentum is there to deliver a huge win for government accountability.** Washington insiders and special interests don't want this reform and are trying to delay and water it down. We need to keep up the pressure because overwhelming public demand is the only thing that will get this across the finish line. I'll keep fighting until we ban congressional stock trading once and for all. At the end of the day, this is about trust: You sent us to Congress to serve you, not ourselves. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

name: Laura (personal)
subject: I know you’re tired. This is important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
If you’re feeling overwhelmed, or like one more political email might push you over the edge, I get it.

|
---
| Peter,

I know the headlines are constant. The attacks feel nonstop. And if you’re feeling overwhelmed, or like one more political email might push you over the edge, I get it.

But I want to be honest about why these emails matter.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916052/565351284/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-08-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRjNzUyNC0wZTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uOj3D7_ChPbH1AjOrdNVv1FoHS4XSLxzcwi8DeYZc80=)
---
Right now, Republicans have complete control of the federal government: the White House, the Senate and the House. They’ve already passed devastating budget cuts, slashing Medicaid, school funding and food assistance. And they’re just getting started... Unless Democrats take back the House next November, we have limited ways to fight back.

**Winning the House won’t undo all of the damage. But it will give us the power to block the next wave of cruelty, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption and finally go on offense again.**

I represent the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House. I’m not going to let that happen and I know you won’t either.

That’s why we send these emails. That’s why we ask for your support. Because without grassroots donors, this campaign doesn’t stand a chance against the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers.

clean_body: If you’re feeling overwhelmed, or like one more political email might push you over the edge, I get it. | | Peter, I know the headlines are constant. The attacks feel nonstop. And if you’re feeling overwhelmed, or like one more political email might push you over the edge, I get it. But I want to be honest about why these emails matter. | = Right now, Republicans have complete control of the federal government: the White House, the Senate and the House. They’ve already passed devastating budget cuts, slashing Medicaid, school funding and food assistance. And they’re just getting started... Unless Democrats take back the House next November, we have limited ways to fight back. Winning the House won’t undo all of the damage. But it will give us the power to block the next wave of cruelty, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption and finally go on offense again. I represent the only toss-up seat in New York and one of the most competitive in the country. If we lose it, we are all but guaranteed to lose our shot at taking back the House. I’m not going to let that happen and I know you won’t either. That’s why we send these emails. That’s why we ask for your support. Because without grassroots donors, this campaign doesn’t stand a chance against the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers. = | | | = | = | = | = We can’t do this without you. Laura * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Fellow American!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Fellow American**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**

We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like YOU , Fellow American! I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we COULD NOT have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth. I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a serious cash advantage. Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a MILLION dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money. Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU! We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity! subject: let’s make history, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. name: Wes Moore
subject: President Bone Spurs
body:
Trump will do anything to get out of walking, huh.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=504%2E1086043%2EvWkkfj)
President Bone Spurs will do anything to get out of walking, Peter.
Including spouting off a bunch of lies about public safety in Maryland on Truth Social...
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=504_1086043_vWkkfj&akid=504%2E1086043%2EvWkkfj)
This is a bunch of hooey. Since taking office, we’ve made major investments in local law enforcement, crime prevention and reduction, and more.
**And we’ve seen some of the most significant drops in homicides and non-fatal shootings in America.**
If the President is unwilling to walk the streets of Baltimore to see our successes first hand, we’re even willing to get him a golf cart to make things easier. No joke.
**[But, Peter, let me be clear: We won’t let President Bone Spurs’ lies stop our progress in Maryland. If you’re with me, chip in to show that our focus is on what matters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250824-1?refcode=em-20250824-1&refcode2=504_1086043_vWkkfj&akid=504%2E1086043%2EvWkkfj)**

Elevate,
Wes

Patriot, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. just removed "prior-authorization!" Doctors in America have always had to waste weeks just to fill out insurance paperwork -- patient by patient.

With all the bureaucracy, patients could be waiting months to even be seen by their Doctor. All the while, $14 billion of our tax money went to illegals and able-bodied individuals who refused to work.

Not anymore. Not in MAGA America.

subject: Republicans are rigging the maps. We're fighting back.
body:
Redistricting is largely reliant on who holds the majority in state legislatures. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113916580/565352971/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE848_20250824_VAMiniSlate_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056849&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg2MjVjZC0xMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTu6G1vUrt_mOpGYS-QZZkFhwHLoZAM3cNzS6PCBMpg=) Hi Peter,

Republicans know they can't win fairly in 2026 — so they're doubling down on gerrymandering. Their plan is simple: rig the maps, rig the rules, and rig the results.

But our team has been working to gain, hold, and strengthen governing majorities in key states _for more than a decade_. We're determined to build power at the state level because we know that state leaders are the ones on the frontlines defending against Republicans' gerrymandering efforts. Between now and 2027, we're working to elect the leaders who will fight for their constituents and conduct the 2030 census in a fair way that protects voting rights across the country. EMILYs List has been here before, and we are prepared, Peter.

That's why we are thrilled to endorse TWO MORE women for the Virginia House of Delegates — **Nicole Cole** and **Stacey Carroll**.

****[**Before I introduce these new candidates, donate today to help Democratic pro-choice women win seats in Virginia and beyond THIS NOVEMBER:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113916581/565352973/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE848_20250824_VAMiniSlate_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056849&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg2MjVjZC0xMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTu6G1vUrt_mOpGYS-QZZkFhwHLoZAM3cNzS6PCBMpg=)**** | [DONATE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113916582/565352974/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE848_20250824_VAMiniSlate_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1056849&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Zjg2MjVjZC0xMTgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTu6G1vUrt_mOpGYS-QZZkFhwHLoZAM3cNzS6PCBMpg=)
---
**Nicole Cole (VA-HD66)** is a Virginia-born business owner, financial advisor, and school board vice chair. On the school board, she led efforts to improve local schools and protect them from radical Republicans. She's ready to bring her results-driven leadership to Richmond.

**Stacey Carroll (VA-HD64)** , a veteran with 19 years of service in the U.S. military, has experience auditing government agencies and a heart for public service, having fostered 22 teens and received 2024 Spotlight Foster Parent of the Year honors. She is a champion for education, economic growth, responsible governance, and health care access tailored to family needs.
Nicole and Stacey join eight other EMILYs List candidates already running to expand our ONE-SEAT majority in the Virginia House of Delegates:
* Elizabeth Guzmán – VA-HD22
* Lily Franklin – VA-HD41
* May Nivar – VA-HD57
* Jessica Anderson – VA-HD71
* Leslie Mehta – VA-HD73
* Lindsey Dougherty – VA-HD75
* Kimberly Pope Adams – VA-HD82
* Kacey Carnegie – VA-HD89

**Together, they're building the Democratic majority we need to hold the line in Virginia and across the country.**

clean_body: Redistricting is largely reliant on who holds the majority in state legislatures. | = Hi Peter, Republicans know they can't win fairly in 2026 — so they're doubling down on gerrymandering. Their plan is simple: rig the maps, rig the rules, and rig the results. But our team has been working to gain, hold, and strengthen governing majorities in key states for more than a decade. We're determined to build power at the state level because we know that state leaders are the ones on the frontlines defending against Republicans' gerrymandering efforts. Between now and 2027, we're working to elect the leaders who will fight for their constituents and conduct the 2030 census in a fair way that protects voting rights across the country. EMILYs List has been here before, and we are prepared, Peter. That's why we are thrilled to endorse TWO MORE women for the Virginia House of Delegates — Nicole Cole and Stacey Carroll. **= | = Nicole Cole (VA-HD66) is a Virginia-born business owner, financial advisor, and school board vice chair. On the school board, she led efforts to improve local schools and protect them from radical Republicans. She's ready to bring her results-driven leadership to Richmond. Stacey Carroll (VA-HD64) , a veteran with 19 years of service in the U.S. military, has experience auditing government agencies and a heart for public service, having fostered 22 teens and received 2024 Spotlight Foster Parent of the Year honors. She is a champion for education, economic growth, responsible governance, and health care access tailored to family needs. Nicole and Stacey join eight other EMILYs List candidates already running to expand our ONE-SEAT majority in the Virginia House of Delegates: Elizabeth Guzmán – VA-HD22 Lily Franklin – VA-HD41 May Nivar – VA-HD57 Jessica Anderson – VA-HD71 Leslie Mehta – VA-HD73 Lindsey Dougherty – VA-HD75 Kimberly Pope Adams – VA-HD82 Kacey Carnegie – VA-HD89 Together, they're building the Democratic majority we need to hold the line in Virginia and across the country. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer, State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Laura Friedman HQ
subject: We must protect voting-by-mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916781/565353521/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMTMyOTYtMTI4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vENiC89kfrqOgIfnEzX19AJlSeF7YrANEaMy-J1gGtY=) Friend, Donald Trump’s war on vote-by-mail is another attempt to march us towards authoritarianism and unfettered oligarchy. He made that clear when his reasoning for removing vote-by-mail came down to, “because the Democrats want it.” So since Trump can’t give you a real reason, here are the facts:
* **Vote-by-mail is popular because it’s safe, secure, and it works. It allows working people, seniors, our military, and more to easily take part in our democratic process.**

* In fact, Donald Trump _himself_ has voted the past two presidential elections using vote-by-mail, and released a video just last fall encouraging its use among his supporters.

Here in California, mail-in ballots are the law of the land, and we’re not about to let a wannabe dictator strip our ability to make our voices heard. [**If you’re with us, sign the petition today supporting the protection of voting by mail in California and across the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916782/565353522/-66092630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMTMyOTYtMTI4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vENiC89kfrqOgIfnEzX19AJlSeF7YrANEaMy-J1gGtY=&emci=74113296-1281-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=78113296-1281-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8447100) | ****[Sign Now: Protect Vote-by-Mail](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916783/565353523/-66092630?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxMTMyOTYtMTI4MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vENiC89kfrqOgIfnEzX19AJlSeF7YrANEaMy-J1gGtY=&emci=74113296-1281-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=78113296-1281-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8447100)****
---

clean_body: | = Friend, Donald Trump’s war on vote-by-mail is another attempt to march us towards authoritarianism and unfettered oligarchy. He made that clear when his reasoning for removing vote-by-mail came down to, “because the Democrats want it.” So since Trump can’t give you a real reason, here are the facts: Vote-by-mail is popular because it’s safe, secure, and it works. It allows working people, seniors, our military, and more to easily take part in our democratic process. In fact, Donald Trump himself has voted the past two presidential elections using vote-by-mail, and released a video just last fall encouraging its use among his supporters. Here in California, mail-in ballots are the law of the land, and we’re not about to let a wannabe dictator strip our ability to make our voices heard. | **** Thank you, Laura Friedman HQ | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! For me, Virginia means everything.

It’s a place that took me in and allowed me to call it home. I’ve spent decades in business here, creating jobs in Virginia. And it’s been the greatest honor of my life to serve Virginia, first as Governor and now as Senator. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916799/565353597/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EverythingRS_250824_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNDdjMC0xMjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYrusXk3qGDwrdAy5NfPc_1JNkrsq65sgqWBrvMKcKU=) I could go on and on about what makes Virginia so special, but this year the Commonwealth has a unique opportunity:

**In November, Virginia voters will send President Trump his first report card.**

If we flip the Governorship and expand our razor-thin majority in the House of Delegates – and do it by voting in record numbers – we will send Trump and Republicans in Congress a huge wakeup call. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113916800/565353598/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EverythingRS_250824_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWJmNDdjMC0xMjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYrusXk3qGDwrdAy5NfPc_1JNkrsq65sgqWBrvMKcKU=) Then next year, frankly, will be a big moment for us again: Senate Republicans think they can expand their majority by defeating me. _And simply put, there’s no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose this seat._

So, Derek, we've got a lot of work to do over the next few months to hand Trump a devastating defeat in Virginia, and I am asking you to join me in this work.

subject: a quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We need to hear from you before 11:59 p.m. tonight!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4904?t=2&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
---
Hi, null! Team Haley here with a simple request: **[Will you endorse Haley Stevens before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4905?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4905?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
Adding your name will only take a few seconds, but it helps a ton – grassroots endorsements are a critical part of our strategy.

Here's why: Right now, we're statistically tied with our Republican opponent among independent voters. But we can pull ahead if everyone can see the power of this movement and the thousands of people who stand with Haley.
[**We need 5,000 endorsements by midnight. Will you be one of them, null?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4905?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
| | [Endorse Haley Stevens >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4905?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
---
Grateful for your support,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4905?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4904?t=8&akid=670%2E49239%2E5vEAe3)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: re: My latest op-ed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hey Peter, I just published a new
op-ed in The Guardian.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250824?refcode=em20250824-36955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36955_1203867_nSKLk9&akid=36955%2E1203867%2EnSKLk9 ]A headline from an article in The Guardian by Alexandra Rojas. It's
titled 'Democrats can win in 2028. But we need to oust corporate
candidates first'. The subheading reads 'They need a new generation of
leaders with fresh faces and bold ideas, unbought by corporate Super Pacs
and billionaire donors'.

Here’s the bottom line: The Democratic Party cannot win back the White
House in 2028 without transforming the Party first in 2026 with working
class primary challenges to the corporate incumbents who overrun the Party
and lack the moral courage to fight for their communities.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250824?refcode=em20250824-36955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36955_1203867_nSKLk9&akid=36955%2E1203867%2EnSKLk9 ]Will you help Justice Democrats replace out-of-touch, corporate
incumbents with new, working-class voices in Congress by pitching in
$5?

We at Justice Democrats believe people-powered primaries will always be
beneficial to the health of our democracy. And it’s clear millions of
voters believe that too – the primaries they’re clamoring for are ones led
for and by working-class people, who put together campaigns with solutions
as big as our crises and ambitious enough to inspire hope again.

But this cycle, as voters make it clear that they want unbossed and
unbought leaders, too many Democratic groups, and even some that call
themselves progressive, are encouraging candidates’ silence in the face of
lobbies like AIPAC and Crypto’s multimillion-dollar threats.

Silence in the face of genocide, silence in the face of Trump’s Crypto
corruption, and silence on anything that might upset the rich and
powerful.

Silence is cowardice and cowardice inspires no one. The path to more
Democratic victories is not around, behind, and under these lobbies but
it’s right through them, taking them head-on and ridding them from our
politics once and for all.

The solution to their fearmongering is not surrender, it’s solidarity.
That courage and solidarity can unite a fractured nation of voters who
distrust the entire institution of electoral politics and its ability to
transform their lives for the better.

Democrats can win in 2026 and subsequently in 2028 by showing voters that
there is a different way to do electoral politics. The leaders of the
future of the Democratic Party will be defined by those willing to take on
the biggest fights.

At Justice Democrats, we’re recruiting and supporting working-class,
progressive candidates for Congress who are unafraid to fight lobby groups
like AIPAC and Crypto, and have the courage to stand up for all people —
even in the face of massive opposition.

The 2026 elections will be here before we know it, and our success depends
directly on grassroots support from people like you, coming together in
solidarity.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250824?refcode=em20250824-36955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36955_1203867_nSKLk9&akid=36955%2E1203867%2EnSKLk9 ]Please contribute anything you can today to help us replace corporate,
do-nothing Democrats with the next generation of bold, working-class
leaders we deserve this cycle.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250824?refcode=em20250824-36955&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36955_1203867_nSKLk9&akid=36955%2E1203867%2EnSKLk9 ]Contribute $5

Thanks for all you do,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Hey Peter, I just published a new op-ed in The Guardian. [ ]A headline from an article in The Guardian by Alexandra Rojas. It's titled 'Democrats can win in 2028. But we need to oust corporate candidates first'. The subheading reads 'They need a new generation of leaders with fresh faces and bold ideas, unbought by corporate Super Pacs and billionaire donors'. Here’s the bottom line: The Democratic Party cannot win back the White House in 2028 without transforming the Party first in 2026 with working class primary challenges to the corporate incumbents who overrun the Party and lack the moral courage to fight for their communities. [ ]Will you help Justice Democrats replace out-of-touch, corporate incumbents with new, working-class voices in Congress by pitching in $5? We at Justice Democrats believe people-powered primaries will always be beneficial to the health of our democracy. And it’s clear millions of voters believe that too – the primaries they’re clamoring for are ones led for and by working-class people, who put together campaigns with solutions as big as our crises and ambitious enough to inspire hope again. But this cycle, as voters make it clear that they want unbossed and unbought leaders, too many Democratic groups, and even some that call themselves progressive, are encouraging candidates’ silence in the face of lobbies like AIPAC and Crypto’s multimillion-dollar threats. Silence in the face of genocide, silence in the face of Trump’s Crypto corruption, and silence on anything that might upset the rich and powerful. Silence is cowardice and cowardice inspires no one. The path to more Democratic victories is not around, behind, and under these lobbies but it’s right through them, taking them head-on and ridding them from our politics once and for all. The solution to their fearmongering is not surrender, it’s solidarity. That courage and solidarity can unite a fractured nation of voters who distrust the entire institution of electoral politics and its ability to transform their lives for the better. Democrats can win in 2026 and subsequently in 2028 by showing voters that there is a different way to do electoral politics. The leaders of the future of the Democratic Party will be defined by those willing to take on the biggest fights. At Justice Democrats, we’re recruiting and supporting working-class, progressive candidates for Congress who are unafraid to fight lobby groups like AIPAC and Crypto, and have the courage to stand up for all people — even in the face of massive opposition. The 2026 elections will be here before we know it, and our success depends directly on grassroots support from people like you, coming together in solidarity. [ ]Please contribute anything you can today to help us replace corporate, do-nothing Democrats with the next generation of bold, working-class leaders we deserve this cycle. [ ]Contribute $5 Thanks for all you do, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director PS — If you’d like to read my full op-ed, [ ]you can check it out here. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Friend,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._
---

clean_body: The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call. | Friend, Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property. Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani. Why? Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama. You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone... ...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama? If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you? As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a solemn pledge to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power. That’s my pledge. Now I’m entrusting you with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Hey, Jay Jones here – have a sec?
One of the most common questions I get from supporters while on the trail is, “I gave $10, will that really make a difference for your campaign?”
And my answer is yes, absolutely.
If you already know just how important your support is to our campaign, I won’t take up any more of your time. All I ask is that you take 60 seconds to chip in $10 or more to help us defeat Jason Miyares this fall. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=10]

I’m being serious when I say that your $10 means everything to our campaign.
Your $10 could be the difference between having yard signs outside of a polling place or not.
Your $10 helps us pay for the equipment we need to target and reach Virginia voters.
Your $10 keeps our ads on the air to fact-check the lies about our campaign.
Your $10 narrows the 8-to-1 fundraising gap against MAGA Miyares and his billionaire backers.
Any amount you give to our campaign goes miles in our fight to defeat Jason Miyares and remove Donald Trump’s last foothold in Virginia.
And when countless folks chip in $10 whenever they can, grassroots movements like ours don’t just push forward – they win.
So, whether it’s $10 or $100, any amount you can spare would go a long way in helping us win this high-stakes race. Virginians deserve a fighter as their Attorney General, and we can make it happen together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025?amount=10]

In Texas, the map includes five new districts that would favor Republicans.

**Democrats vow to challenge it in court**

The effort by Trump and Texas’ Republican-majority Legislature prompted state Democrats to hold a two-week walkout and kicked off a wave of [redistricting efforts across the country](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r0cM38LlabunduMQ3SHqkWfhYqaoMLHWjzHhywVKrnAqNCRxNP65JmxR9Nqhg7JUDnBwZhvWLHZaj1e0sLHoCtuK7U3BGtZk5694xERZ3JsZxBWMFu56QXe8q8x5zRdKKxcwp7aHpNdLfnjK8n9YdFWX79LNIJPJyBUG-T9eo_GdDj9AaZ2mG4tUGBk73z9p8zTMEAsDxgwS895zlfVMgzS-PRdku94geMYN0RfL-FJUq7TahBjZAQOXDNglCLgTd4yHjHbFtUTLi0wmj_Cq_uyMG1aI0mYqwLOQcdnOaQuzercrJl0qxZU_6NZ3dTS0qZqeIHFxeMFPXeFRRJWgLGnIqB_oACaKnkJoZatofmAMssVMLQo0a0HlCJd56RUmKA8yfTPLbeeff2Jp_9-QxXABiiRiUB127t4rVatJc4-YlaFpSFPPcbsmdBiOHS-rW5AC-8xjNCgsintnYVuR4MMuv0wa77Yvl11zZxlqpNrVWrURbzJ-o0hpgkrOUpqV93dTNjfSnQ8dCDBkjQl5qMd/4jb/UPDXpYJlQTK6I3kNb83enw/h13/h001.LAZSUKwAfUmLuAZAlg_4prYmfED8h5OR6K0cycvkpzA).

Democrats had prepared for a final show of resistance, with plans to push the Senate vote into the early morning hours in a last-ditch attempt to delay passage. Yet Republicans blocked those efforts by citing a rule violation.

“What we have seen in this redistricting process has been maneuvers and mechanisms to shut down people’s voices,” said state Sen. **Carol Alvarado** , leader of the Senate Democratic caucus, on social media after the new map was finalized by the GOP-controlled Senate.

Democrats had already delayed the bill’s passage during hours of debate, pressing Republican Sen. **Phil King** , the measure’s sponsor, on the proposal’s legality, with many alleging that the redrawn districts violate the Voting Rights Act by diluting voters’ influence based on race.

King vehemently denied that accusation, saying, “I had two goals in mind: That all maps would be legal and would be better for Republican congressional candidates in Texas.”

“There is extreme risk the Republican majority will be lost” in the House if the map does not pass, King said.

**Battle for the House waged via redistricting**

On a national level, the partisan makeup of existing districts puts Democrats within three seats of a majority. The incumbent president’s party usually loses seats in the midterms.

The Texas redraw is already reshaping the 2026 race, with Democratic Rep. **Lloyd Doggett** , the dean of the state’s congressional delegation, announcing Thursday that he will not seek reelection to his Austin-based seat if the new map takes effect. Under the proposed map, Doggett’s district would overlap with that of another Democratic incumbent, Rep. **Greg Casar**.

Redistricting typically occurs once a decade, immediately after a census. While some states have their own limitations, there is no national impediment to a state trying to redraw districts in the middle of the decade.

The U.S. Supreme Court in 2019 ruled that the Constitution does not prohibit partisan gerrymandering to increase a party’s clout, only gerrymandering that’s explicitly done by race." Thank you for reading as a FREE subscriber. » Become a PAID subscriber for $7/mo or $70/yr and you will SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED. | AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Texas Gov. Abbott says he’ll swiftly sign new maps on his desk that will boost GOP in 2026,” AP's Jim Vertuno ,Joey Cappaletti and Hallie Golden \-- "Texas Gov. Greg Abbott on Saturday promised to quickly sign off on a new, Republican-leaning congressional voting map gerrymandered to help the GOP maintain its slim majority in Congress. “One Big Beautiful Map has passed the Senate and is on its way to my desk, where it will be swiftly signed into law,” Abbott said in a statement. » Texas lawmakers approved the final plans just hours before, inflaming an already tense battle unfolding among states as governors from both parties pledge to redraw maps with the goal of giving their political candidates a leg up in the 2026 midterm elections. In California, Democratic Gov.Gavin Newsom has approved a special election to take place in November for residents to vote on a redrawn congressional map designed to help Democrats win five more House seats next year. » Meanwhile, President Donald Trump has pushed , including Indiana and Missouri, to to add more winnable GOP seats. Ohio Republicans were also already scheduled to revise their maps to make them more partisan. In Texas, the map includes five new districts that would favor Republicans. Democrats vow to challenge it in court The effort by Trump and Texas’ Republican-majority Legislature prompted state Democrats to hold a two-week walkout and kicked off a wave of . Democrats had prepared for a final show of resistance, with plans to push the Senate vote into the early morning hours in a last-ditch attempt to delay passage. Yet Republicans blocked those efforts by citing a rule violation. “What we have seen in this redistricting process has been maneuvers and mechanisms to shut down people’s voices,” said state Sen. Carol Alvarado , leader of the Senate Democratic caucus, on social media after the new map was finalized by the GOP-controlled Senate. Democrats had already delayed the bill’s passage during hours of debate, pressing Republican Sen. Phil King , the measure’s sponsor, on the proposal’s legality, with many alleging that the redrawn districts violate the Voting Rights Act by diluting voters’ influence based on race. King vehemently denied that accusation, saying, “I had two goals in mind: That all maps would be legal and would be better for Republican congressional candidates in Texas.” “There is extreme risk the Republican majority will be lost” in the House if the map does not pass, King said. Battle for the House waged via redistricting On a national level, the partisan makeup of existing districts puts Democrats within three seats of a majority. The incumbent president’s party usually loses seats in the midterms. The Texas redraw is already reshaping the 2026 race, with Democratic Rep. Lloyd Doggett , the dean of the state’s congressional delegation, announcing Thursday that he will not seek reelection to his Austin-based seat if the new map takes effect. Under the proposed map, Doggett’s district would overlap with that of another Democratic incumbent, Rep. Greg Casar. Redistricting typically occurs once a decade, immediately after a census. While some states have their own limitations, there is no national impediment to a state trying to redraw districts in the middle of the decade. The U.S. Supreme Court in 2019 ruled that the Constitution does not prohibit partisan gerrymandering to increase a party’s clout, only gerrymandering that’s explicitly done by race." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers.
