name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Built by people, not PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40053%2E3422442%2Ei5816g)
Peter,
Katie’s campaign is built on grassroots power—every dollar we raise comes from folks like you, not lobbyists, or Big Oil executives.
This campaign is fueled by people chipping in what they can, when they can, because they believe in Katie’s ability to stand up to Trump and lower costs. They know she’s the real deal.
To reach voters in every corner of the state with Katie’s no-nonsense, problem-solving message, we rely on grassroots donations.
That’s how we keep building momentum—and how we’re going to win.
You’re an important part of this team, Peter, and we wouldn’t be where we are without supporters like you.
**[Can we count on you to chip in your first-ever donation to Katie’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250824_1_ak?refcode=em20250824-40053&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40053_3422442_i5816g&akid=40053%2E3422442%2Ei5816g)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250824_1_ak?refcode=em20250824-40053&refcode2=40053_3422442_i5816g&akid=40053%2E3422442%2Ei5816g)
Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250824-40053&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40053_3422442_i5816g&akid=40053%2E3422442%2Ei5816g)**

name: Team NDRC
subject: Has Stephen Miller read the Constitution?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is just the latest attack in their full-court press to suppress the will of voters.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113918688/565360057/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlZWQ1Yjg4LTFjODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3KtWOyh0PrpqprfTMNl0y6nfTcsthLVeR8ZtS1MBst8=&emci=81fdbaa6-6d7f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=feed5b88-1c81-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, We’ve got to be crystal clear about what’s happening right now: The White House is orchestrating a coordinated attack to steal power away from voters. Their latest move? White House Deputy Chief of Staff, Stephen Miller, went on Fox News claiming that Democrats “rigged” the 2020 Census by including undocumented immigrants — and that states like Massachusetts and California are an “ocean of fraud and abuse.” Has Stephen Miller even read the Constitution? The census has been responsible for counting every person — regardless of their immigration status — since its inception in 1790. His calling for a “correction” to the census is nothing but a blatant power grab and an attack on a centuries-old democratic process. [**They’re attacking the people on all fronts, so we have to fight back on all fronts. This work, in critical moments like this, takes outsized resources. Will you rush in a donation today to help the NDRC continue to defend the census, protect voters’ rights, and hold anti-democracy extremists accountable?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113918689/565360058/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NORMillerRR_email_20250824-NDRC-Tier1-NORMillerRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250824-NDRC-Tier1-NORMillerRR_&utm_campaign=NORMillerRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlZWQ1Yjg4LTFjODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3KtWOyh0PrpqprfTMNl0y6nfTcsthLVeR8ZtS1MBst8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Counting every resident is a cornerstone of the census process that has existed for centuries. It’s how we determine fair representation in Congress and the distribution of federal resources.
We’ve seen this story before, when Trump tried to add a citizenship question to the 2020 Census. But the power of this fair maps movement came together and was able to stop him in the courts.
But what we’re seeing now is a full-court press to suppress the will of voters. Already, Trump and his allies have their sights set on extreme gerrymanders in Texas and Ohio, and potentially other states like Indiana and Missouri.
Now it’s clear that the Trump team wants to sabotage an accurate census count, too — for the exact same reason. They want to fundamentally alter how we allocate representation in America — to amass unchecked power for themselves. This is a time to sound the alarm.
[**Make a donation today that will go directly towards fighting gerrymandering in states across the country and stop this sabotage of our democracy. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113918696/565360134/1256196342?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NORMillerRR_email_20250824-NDRC-Tier1-NORMillerRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250824-NDRC-Tier1-NORMillerRR_&utm_campaign=NORMillerRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlZWQ1Yjg4LTFjODEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3KtWOyh0PrpqprfTMNl0y6nfTcsthLVeR8ZtS1MBst8=)

— Team NDRC

clean_body: This is just the latest attack in their full-court press to suppress the will of voters. | Peter, We’ve got to be crystal clear about what’s happening right now: The White House is orchestrating a coordinated attack to steal power away from voters. Their latest move? White House Deputy Chief of Staff, Stephen Miller, went on Fox News claiming that Democrats “rigged” the 2020 Census by including undocumented immigrants — and that states like Massachusetts and California are an “ocean of fraud and abuse.” Has Stephen Miller even read the Constitution? The census has been responsible for counting every person — regardless of their immigration status — since its inception in 1790. name: Andy Biggs
subject: All I need is a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY BIGGS FOR ARIZONA
body:
My name is Andy...

Hey there, friend,
I’m not sure we’ve met yet, my name is Andy Biggs (and this is my lovely wife, Cindy).[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26l/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)Here’s a little about me, so that you know who you’re dealing with:
-I have six children and eleven grandchildren.-I’ve been married to Cindy for 44 wonderful years.-I love playing the guitar and jamming out with my friends.-I am a die-hard Patriot.
I’m also running for Governor of Arizona.
And lastly, I am the only candidate fully endorsed by President Donald J. Trump and Charlie Kirk.
I’m reaching out to EVERY American to spread the word - the race for Arizona against Progressive Democrat Katie Hobbs is ON, and all I need is your endorsement![ENDORSE ANDY BIGGS WITH PRES. TRUMP
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26l/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)My opponent, Katie Hobbs, is radically liberal. She’s made our state less safe. She’s dragging AZ kicking and screaming towards a California-esque, Pelosi-inspired, Leftist dystopia.
She’s also the pillar holding up Arizona for the Democrats.
The Grand Canyon State is shaping up to be the top battleground this cycle. [If she stays in office, the House, the Senate, and even the White House may go to the Radical Left in 2028.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26l/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We can’t let Progressive Katie Hobbs stay in office, destroying traditional values, decimating the Arizona economy, and perpetuating a Biden-era, progressive Agenda.
Please, friend, all I need is a minute of your time and a quick John Hancock to [endorse me in my fight to save Arizona from the jaws of the socialist machine.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26l/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[ENDORSE ANDY BIGGS FOR GOVERNOR
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26l/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)Thank you, patriot, in advance, for your invaluable support.
Look out for more updates, and I’ll see you on the campaign trail!
Andy BiggsTrump Endorsed Candidate for Governor | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY BIGGS FOR ARIZONA
---
1959 S Power Rd Ste 103-303
Mesa, AZ 85206

[Privacy Policy](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b26m/?__vbtrk=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEzNTEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: when I meet Michiganders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The full force of the GOP and their megadonors are coming after Haley as a TOP target for defeat.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b77bc95-5c02-4137-8266-35a7e56b7da8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter – it’s Haley. I can’t wait to tell you all about the first leg of my Made in Michigan tour. But first, I need to ask: [Will you chip in $10 right now – split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – to help us hit tonight’s $25,000 fundraising goal?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd13c23-92da-4bac-8786-239fcc73c704/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T140485aa-1c09-46d5-adbb-1f3e4b004f76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve got to tell you, Peter – nothing makes me prouder to be from Michigan than meeting the people who make this state what it is: Hardworking, tough-as-nails, and full of heart. We were made in Michigan. And we’re proud of it. I grew up surrounded by grit and grease – my family ran a landscaping business, and my dad was a teacher in Detroit public schools. That’s where I learned the values of hard work, perseverance, and to always fight for what’s right. I’ve fought for Michiganders my whole career – from helping lead the auto rescue that helped save over 200,000 Michigan jobs, to flipping a red seat blue in 2018, to delivering for working families in Congress. Now, I’m running for Senate, and we’re facing our biggest challenge yet: Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers. And a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to support him. The Hill even named Michigan one of the top five Senate seats most likely to flip, and experts say Senate control could be decided by our battleground race. I know the stakes. But I was raised the Michigan way – I don’t back down from a fight. I need you with me to win, Peter. Polls show I’m leading Rogers, but only by a little. I truly can’t do it without the support of this grassroots team. [Will you split $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to help us hit our $25,000 goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75731d69-17f2-4f99-b81e-081a33fd5356/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bfbbf7c-42f8-432e-a08b-6be4878e91c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c9dffa7-c06d-46a0-85f3-c0043b7caec3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te731c5b1-5cc0-4f25-be37-cedbd0148023/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for standing with me. Made in Michigan, Haley Stevens

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ba59581-d8e3-4a81-a01a-e17dbff2c1ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Democrats are facing two special elections in Florida’s legislature. This is a prime opportunity to deal a major blow to Trump, DeSantis, and far-right Republicans in a MAGA stronghold. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Florida is a testing ground for MAGA’s most extreme policies and dangerous ideas – including what has been described as the _“torturous”_ Alligator Alcatraz detention center. We’re reaching out because Democrats are facing two special elections for seats in Florida’s legislature on September 2nd.**This is a prime opportunity to deal a major blow to Trump, DeSantis, and far-right Republicans in a MAGA stronghold.** [Ahead of our final deadline before polls close, will you make a triple-matched donation of $7? | | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7Gzt7xGALSZRspEZtT5xEnD0hWC0VU6lSlh4O2-2FlWGsyCwviWvYVK-2B-2F7R7MH2U-2BitajLfnHCTDnp4-2Bkr0ue9GbTe-2Fxv-2BIV5VbWaPNpGG1Yl1vcsaESuckvrZ8iMQlrPC8-3DQKca_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYfiFn66bBC0g1nS9ZWW6bRhFMH9Osr7kf0Ci9eo1H7tFBxzyZ-2BYZ1xdp6kUAGfggx4kbqfBCVqfl0gQgVRjUYJk9TFOH-2FG9Ixx08G8yUBkD7zY1Q4x0GAOOAUezvAY80MhK71-2BQE9xVEzemKlOBj-2FUls6nBcBNOcSw2E7N3-2FJbq9Z-2BiaNPoqjeLamNksABOPZ)

Fellow activist, In July, a case was filed with the U.S. Supreme Court that asked that they overturn the precedent set in Obergefell v. Hodges – the ruling that legalized same-sex marriage in America.

This case was brought forth by Kim Davis, an infamous Christian former clerk in Kentucky who refused to issue marriage certificates to same-sex couples following the ruling. She formally requested that the Supreme Court revisit the Obergefell decision, despite the fact that public support for marriage equality is at a historic high (_The Hill_).

**As our rights are once again at stake in Washington, we want to remind you about the critical distinction between federal and state courts due to federalism. **

While justices on the U.S. Supreme Court are nominated by the President and confirmed by the U.S. Senate, PA is one of only seven states in the entire country where all judges and justices are elected in partisan elections.

After their 10-year term, voters in PA decide whether to retain our state judges and justices or not through non-partisan retention elections. That means that,**unlike the U.S. Supreme Court, our state courts must respond to the will of the people in order to keep their seats. **

Additionally, while the federal court system mainly handles cases related to the constitutionality of laws, the state court systems have a much broader impact and serve as the final authority on state laws and constitutions. **That is why it’s critical that PA courts remain fair and independent. **

**To be clear: If the U.S. Supreme Court overturns Obergefell v. Hodges, the ruling would most likely return the power to regulate marriage equality to the states.**

We are not going to sit back and watch as our rights get stripped away by Trump-appointed extremists in Washington. We are fighting to ensure that voters in PA understand how important state courts are and how they’re critical in the fight to protect our rights and freedoms.
[**Time is running short to educate and mobilize voters ahead of highly consequential judicial elections in PA. Help us launch a massive GOTV program for the November General Election across Pennsylvania by donating $25 or more immediately.

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, In July, a case was filed with the U.S. Supreme Court that asked that they overturn the precedent set in Obergefell v. Hodges – the ruling that legalized same-sex marriage in America. This case was brought forth by Kim Davis, an infamous Christian former clerk in Kentucky who refused to issue marriage certificates to same-sex couples following the ruling. She formally requested that the Supreme Court revisit the Obergefell decision, despite the fact that public support for marriage equality is at a historic high (The Hill). As our rights are once again at stake in Washington, we want to remind you about the critical distinction between federal and state courts due to federalism. While justices on the U.S. Supreme Court are nominated by the President and confirmed by the U.S. Senate, PA is one of only seven states in the entire country where all judges and justices are elected in partisan elections. After their 10-year term, voters in PA decide whether to retain our state judges and justices or not through non-partisan retention elections. That means that,unlike the U.S. Supreme Court, our state courts must respond to the will of the people in order to keep their seats. Additionally, while the federal court system mainly handles cases related to the constitutionality of laws, the state court systems have a much broader impact and serve as the final authority on state laws and constitutions. That is why it’s critical that PA courts remain fair and independent. To be clear: If the U.S. Supreme Court overturns Obergefell v. Hodges, the ruling would most likely return the power to regulate marriage equality to the states. We are not going to sit back and watch as our rights get stripped away by Trump-appointed extremists in Washington. We are fighting to ensure that voters in PA understand how important state courts are and how they’re critical in the fight to protect our rights and freedoms. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Whether it’s acting as a check and balance on the Trump regime by protecting abortion access and marriage equality or working to ensure that PA has fair congressional maps and defend our election systems, the rulings that state courts make have a drastic impact on our daily lives. We are counting on your support to protect our courts. Let’s do this, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Friend,

Jason Crow couldn’t be more different from his Republican colleagues in the House.

While Republicans worked hard to rubber-stamp Trump’s extreme agenda and give tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy at the expense of hardworking Americans — Jason was fighting for working people.

While his Republican colleagues pander to rich elites and shield them from accountability, Jason has always refused to accept corporate PAC money. He’s only accountable to everyday people like you, not billionaires or special interests.

And while the GOP clings to the same-old politics as usual, Jason is ready to help bring a new generation of leadership to Congress — one that delivers results for working families, not just the powerful.

Jason isn’t your typical Washington politician. Can you chip in today to help him continue fighting to further Colorado values and elect the next generation of servant leaders? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

— Crow for Congress

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: The phone call did happen…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Friend,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._
---

clean_body: The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call. | Friend, Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property. Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself. Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away. In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani. Why? Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama. You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone... ...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama? If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you? As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a solemn pledge to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power. That’s my pledge. Now I’m entrusting you with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

And here’s a less well-known fact about how the President’s reconciliation law made it worse: The bill introduced new caps to student loan programs for medical school loans, which means **_aspiring doctors will struggle to afford their education._**

This is going to hit all of us, especially our rural communities.

In my time in office, I’ve worked to meet with Californians across our District, speaking with constituents to bring their top concerns to Washington. I’ve introduced bills and fought on legislative frontlines to ensure that our healthcare system is fully funded and able to support each and every Californian.

At a time when we need physicians and medical professionals more than ever, it is not the time to force Americans who want to be doctors off this path simply because it’s not financially feasible for them.

Now, I need your help. We need to show that there is a grassroots movement demanding better funding and federal support for our healthcare system, from Medicaid and Medicare coverage to making sure that we are setting up future doctors for success.

[Will you sign on to this petition and make it clear to everyone that our healthcare system is a top priority for Californians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920157/565365064/1897418558?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250824_FR_docshortage_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJhN2VmMS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZASzngzITgUkFRldTLBm3OCfqnHljybYhiY_B_yFjE=&emci=01230feb-2781-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9aba7ef1-2781-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6108787) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920158/565365065/1897418558?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250824_FR_docshortage_0_6MD_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWJhN2VmMS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZASzngzITgUkFRldTLBm3OCfqnHljybYhiY_B_yFjE=&emci=01230feb-2781-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9aba7ef1-2781-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6108787)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Add your name: Rip City Fan Pledge: Keep the Blazers Home
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250824em-blazers-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250824em-blazers-rs]
Hi there, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
Our beloved Portland Trail Blazers will soon have new owners, so I've written an open letter imploring them to keep the team in Portland.
I've also included a pledge of what WE as a city, state, and community will bring to the table in exchange.
If you agree with that pledge, add your name to my petition now. And please share it with your friends and networks. >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
SIGN THE PLEDGE >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
Owning an NBA franchise is more than a business transaction—it’s a chance to shape culture, build community, and leave a legacy. It’s a community trust. And no NBA city embodies that opportunity like Portland.
For more than 50 years, the Trail Blazers have been part of our lives and our identity. From Walton and Lucas lifting the 1977 Championship to Drexler’s Finals runs, Roy’s heroics, and Lillard’s unforgettable “Dame Time” moments, Rip City has built one of the most passionate fan bases in the league.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
That passion spans the entire state. From Bend to Astoria, Medford to Pendleton and everywhere between, fans drive hours to see games, listen on radio and internet, and gather for watch parties—turning game nights into community celebrations. Rip City is Oregon’s team.
And it starts young. A child’s first shirt, a family’s first trip to Moda, generations watching together on rainy winter nights—these moments create lifelong fans. Moving the team wouldn’t just break a business relationship; it would break family traditions and community bonds built over decades.
Recently, the Rip City Forever coalition called on government and civic leaders to do their part to keep the Blazers in Portland. We support their efforts. But this pledge is different—it’s fans speaking directly to prospective owners, from the people who buy the tickets, wear the jerseys, and bring the energy every night. This isn’t politics, it’s pride—and a promise to keep Rip City strong.
I've written the following Pledge to the next owners. If you agree, add your name to my petition now >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
Our Pledge to You, the Next Owners
* We’ll show up: filling the arena, making noise, and bringing Rip City energy every night.

* We’ll invest: buying tickets, jerseys, and supporting local businesses connected to the team.

* We’ll grow with you: embracing your vision and helping build the future here in Portland.

* We’ll share our stories: posting photos and memories with #RipCityStays , showing the passion and history of this fan base.

* We’ll bring new fans: taking friends and family to their first Blazers game and hosting watch parties across Oregon—proving Rip City is alive far beyond Portland.

* We’ll support local businesses: eating, shopping, and gathering downtown on game days—showing that the Blazers are an economic engine for Portland and all of Oregon.

* We’ll support community impact: volunteering and giving through Blazers Foundation initiatives that make our region stronger.
Let's send a message to the future owners that we're ready for this next chapter in the Trail Blazers Story >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
SIGN THE PLEDGE >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oLJJz4nOS0Krn4TukSVmxQ2]
All we ask in return: Keep the Blazers in Portland.
Other cities have passionate fans, but Portland’s devotion is different: a statewide community where generations rally behind the same jersey, and where “Rip City” has grown into part of Oregon’s identity. From the sellout streak to the iconic memories, this isn’t just support—it’s a relationship passed down through families.
As the 50th anniversary of Portland's NBA Championship approaches, we're ready to celebrate the past and build the future—with you, right here in Portland.
We’re all in. Keep Rip City in Portland. #RipCityStays
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250824em-blazers-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=ijm%2BgQTTVXlmqgOxmtF8dCApoZPQlamIy7hpKmdcla%2BHk3BCdTwhWOLqCgS%2F9q8zbpBfz%2FlEgaUGgbVKpTlPdqy%2BaUuRBUKA%2B8GkqN48ZLw7xQuZ6OxH0QutWZKLDdbzrqjVJaXwHVLX6y9e3YBTaQlWxY80rNw3je1pE3AT4mwNJ%2B9ut%2B69tOezr6CbQi9Pa5Y05Qdy3XDSKDf9ZkC8cebXhy0ZG43Jw1Xp5iO4NH%2FLznl%2FIL1kzvmXHB4yIpEH3txk%2FK7DFXjVoRZxaDrNAtxLb10CFL4MrM29exkUiuEJhPf2AdLnzAnPGheokAT1pXNXa%2FNRAZ2t4Hyl8c3clSKSNuL6AQJDLvb3%2BrBbXAiDHZZpWfDxG%2F%2FX6BNmpPrK387eszhfQkoH%2B%2BHvfuwgffyanKG3Y4UWhF7808dZ7ypYhGxkRGCU4eZErrQYacHr .

I’ll be blunt.
[First, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920288/565365456/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250824_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNiZTZiNS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxkXcVMMS2yw-CeQGkgYG4eoP6nrRIgmE2pIBzkotu0=)Trump and MAGA Republicans SLASHED health care and DEFUNDED public radio to pay for tax cuts for their billionaire donors.
[Then, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920289/565365458/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250824_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNiZTZiNS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxkXcVMMS2yw-CeQGkgYG4eoP6nrRIgmE2pIBzkotu0=)Mike Johnson broke the all-time Republican record with $60 MILLION to protect his right-wing Majority.
[Now, ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920291/565365460/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250824_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNiZTZiNS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxkXcVMMS2yw-CeQGkgYG4eoP6nrRIgmE2pIBzkotu0=)if we don’t catch up – and fast – our odds of FLIPPING the House blue will be as good as FINISHED.
[I’m done watching Republicans get away with this. But, TOGETHER, we can make them REGRET it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920293/565365462/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250824_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNiZTZiNS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxkXcVMMS2yw-CeQGkgYG4eoP6nrRIgmE2pIBzkotu0=)

If 2,000 more Democrats join me before my midnight deadline, we’ll have the resources to build an unbeatable Democratic operation, TAKE BACK the House, and ensure Johnson and his MAGA extremists never hold one ounce of power again. Can I count on your $15 to flip the House so we can hold Trump ACCOUNTABLE for his actions? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920295/565365463/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250824_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNiZTZiNS0yNzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxkXcVMMS2yw-CeQGkgYG4eoP6nrRIgmE2pIBzkotu0=)

| The MAGA Machine doesn’t know how to govern — **they just know how to retaliate.** When Californians held demonstrations against Trump’s mass deportation operation, he spent hundreds of millions of dollars. Kristi Noem arrested Rep. LaMonica McIver and detained Sen. Alex Padilla because they dared speak out against her and the DHS. **In true authoritarian fashion, this administration continues to raise the stakes of speaking out against them. But I’ve been the target of their retribution before, and I’m not afraid to continue holding their feet to the fire to demand accountability now.** [**Friend, our path to taking down Trump goes _directly_ through the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees. And as one of the senior-most Democrats on both, I’m ready to go toe-to-toe with MAGA. If you’re ready to help us take down Trump once and for all, split a donation between me and Seth Moulton so we can be ready for any and all attacks they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920381/565365783/265156787?refcode=250824_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjExMjY1My0yYzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5i4yHmdESv63TF0FepLc9h2YlNNWswJIkXYwjzjehc=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113920382/565365784/-288956247?refcode=250824_MFC_Swalwell_Retaliation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjExMjY1My0yYzgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5i4yHmdESv63TF0FepLc9h2YlNNWswJIkXYwjzjehc=) I’ve been kicked off the House Intelligence Committee for my investigations into Trump’s role in instigating January 6. **I’ve been placed on FBI Director Kash Patel’s “hit list” for my work holding corrupt Republicans accountable. name: Tucker Carlson ALERT [via Conservative HQ]
subject: Do you stand with Tucker Carlson, or have you abandoned him?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj206wemhcdmv3tmf92enre8r9u53x2j6wpzt6eipfacm97mfsj4piy0q6keifn4zvqdzp4jxhuog5vzzgk5c&__stmp=t1ins8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1iqhd6bvo0n5usp53fiddphep5mx46v6ecp343sxnfcw9fe1vpv4f4ya9hhpili7dxjz0lp12vhgixyqsz9muwi09q5eltbtc3h7e1nw77uzavap1g5yv3i8i6uqqoediez16psyx2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1iqhd6bvo0n5usp53fiddphep5mx46v6ecp343sxnfcw9fe1vpv4f4ya9hhpili7dxjz0lp12vhgixyqsz9muwi09q5eltbtc3h7e1nw77uzavap1g5yv3i8i6uqqoediez16psyx2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t1ins8&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Foreign interference in our elections?

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Politico: Foreign influence efforts are circling the presidential election. Again. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Politico_ForeignInterference.png]
The Department of Justice has previously seized websites linked to Russian disinformation campaigns. Federal authorities separately accused two employees of the Moscow-controlled media organization RT of being a part of a scheme to spread Russian propaganda, bolstered by millions of dollars.
That comes on the heels of a Beltway think tank revealing that a network of pro-Iranian sites have been circulating disinformation around the election, not long after the intelligence community linked Iran to a hacking of a presidential campaign. U.S. officials have said that Russia, Iran, and China were all trying to influence our elections.
We want to hear from voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you worried about foreign interference in our elections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082425_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=082425_1no&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082425_1&amount=20]

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c510403b-1e69-49e8-b9f9-48c8da18499d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

George Temple and Arnie Jensen Campaigning with Team Goldstein Last Summer
As we previously wrote, its primary season in Connecticut and Oxford's current **First Selectman George Temple and Selectman Arnie Jensen** are running in a primary as challengers to the "party endorsed candidates" _**who were really not endorsed by the party.**_
Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..pMMvGO6gqrd7Nluc6p4OnlLdcru211HxA5DkkLbbNK0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171819419)
Temple and Jensen lost in a narrow margin due to the 90 new "Republicans" that converted to Republican (from Democrat) over 90 days before the open caucus. Temple lost by 5 and Jensen by 2 votes despite these 90 new Republicans.
**As a result, Team Temple/Jensen went out for petitions and are on the ballot.**
An open caucus is really not that open and a handful of members of the public (outside of the RTC member) showed up and were tactically organized to nominate these two new candidates.
_**This tactic happens everywhere and is starting to come to Connecticut.**_
In this case a primary is good to check the "party" forces and go out to the people. At the same it is a demonstration that just because you are an incumbent, your nomination is not guaranteed and you cannot rest on your laurels.
Temple and Jensen have realized that and are eager to serve Oxford for another term and are out there fighting like they have consistently done so.
When I ran for Congress last year I went to events and a diner with the Temple/ Jensen team. People came up to them and they were open and friendly and more than willing to talk to their constituents and listen to what they had to say. I had the strong impression that they were very popular and well liked.
In a world where there are many aloof politicians Temple and Jensen stand out and are true citizen leaders who care about their community.
**We know George and Arnie well and know they are the best to serve Oxford and wholeheartedly Endorse Them!**
**Some notable highlights**
* Incredible emergency response following the tragic storms that devastated Oxford and setup the Oxford Relief Fund to help victims and their families up and down Route 67.
* Despite COVID-19, the Oxford's new middle school on Great Oak Road opened on time in September 2020 and under budget by 3 million dollars. ⁃ A state-of-the-art public library.
* Structural improvements on all three firehouses.
* An upgraded rescue truck, improving Oxford's ability to respond quickly and effectively to emergencies.

**Early Voting Begins September 2nd: Oxford 's 2025 primary election early voting period will be held from Tuesday, September 2, to Sunday, September 7.**
Thanks for reading The Goldstein Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..pMMvGO6gqrd7Nluc6p4OnlLdcru211HxA5DkkLbbNK0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=171819419)
| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 [Subscribe to Jonathan](https://substack.com/redirect/c77be7bd-f954-4937-ba81-4b21c329ce35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Will you answer the call?
body:
|
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf95lIteknop5I7ITmeqfy86i&s=BMABCPFKJOCLAAKI)
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | | [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf95lIteknop5I8ITmeqfy86i&s=BMABCPFKJOCLAAKI)
---
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Many people say America's best days are behind us.

In some ways, this is understandable. For decades, Americans were sold a lie from the radical Left that:
* Unlimited immigration was good.
* Liberty could survive without virtue.
* Freedom merely meant self-expression, not self-governance.

But as president of The Heritage Foundation, I know we have a special opportunity to create **a new American golden age.**

With President Trump in office, there is a renewed push to revive America and restore our nation to its former glory.

And my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation, backed by our 500,000 members, are working to create and promote policy solutions that will bring about this new American golden age.

However, leftists are doing everything they can to sabotage this golden age. If we don't seize this moment now, we might never save our country from leftist decay.

**Will you join this effort today by activating your Heritage Foundation membership?**

[**Become a member >>**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf95lIteknop5I9ITmeqfy86i&s=BMABCPFKJOCLAAKI)

Your generous tax-deductible donation will help promote conservative policies that are pro-worker, pro-family, pro-God, and pro-nation. Policies rooted in the American tradition--not ashamed of our history, but proud of our inheritance.

**Please activate your Heritage Foundation membership using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf95lIteknop5IaITmeqfy86i&s=BMABCPFKJOCLAAKI)

Your courageous action today will rebuild a republic where men are strong, women are cherished, children are protected, and God is honored.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Don 't miss this opportunity to bring about a new American golden age by activating your Heritage Foundation membership: [https://secured.heritage.org/new-golden-age-for-america/](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf95lIteknop5IbITmeqfy86i&s=BMABCPFKJOCLAAKI)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

---

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Major Savings and A Warm Homecoming**_
---
Friends, Just half a year into Governor Braun’s first term, Indiana is already seeing measurable returns from his commitment to lean and accountable government. The Indiana Department of Administration reported more than $72.2 million in cost avoidance and $37.6 million in direct savings. These savings come from common-sense reforms, cutting waste and streamlining operations, and with more initiatives already underway, Hoosiers can expect even greater results in the months ahead. This week also brought an important moment of pride and gratitude as more than 400 soldiers from the 38th Infantry Division of the Indiana National Guard returned home after nearly a year of service in the Middle East. These men and women spent 11 months strengthening America’s defense partnerships and protecting our freedom, and their safe return was celebrated by families, friends, and communities across Indiana. Governor Braun was proud to welcome them as they arrived home, making clear that Indiana will always be proud of their service. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | _**Governor Braun Announces Over $70 Million in IDOA Savings**_
---
---
The Indiana Department of Administration has delivered $72.2 million in cost avoidance and $37.6 million in direct savings—together representing a 3:1 return on investment and far exceeding the department’s budget. From smarter fleet management and procurement reforms to surplus reutilization and property savings, these initiatives are delivering real value to taxpayers. a "Hoosiers expect their government to be lean, effective, and accountable. I am focused on delivering real value, not just promises. These early results show what’s possible when we lead with discipline, innovation, and a relentless focus on outcomes." \- Governor Braun via a [press release](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/18jobpJgM4QFSdX6KficyRMydGD6W6yxoS2piua39qi1826DBOI-l51BdAXVoXYcruDbOsj1vzoh5UM9GgQPGhbDEQ7PsYB16C4zjBdgzwh8HyLUbsbxHrGGZlCy_eeqkl7kzZkzkcgP7M5FZyIMHWtBDH11gLikR5kmf8vDcVGQOyeiIcpMijcBJtYFGUogTFAHN6esQfo0dTd_kQHgBtcr9LtuBUwSe6p1B44H_QY-efnC76Xz6-teedHRCDX-kpOfUhXfwnK7wQJj_T7Ki3bUpKvX4cwwwrRhWIjOZ3qLvwhz9nrIx16NY6PQqzIqHtfktWutNkO92ylSOoNwfnWrBwM2c2lFMmKH5YqKoaDzgEoEz-P-m3-1qP8hLcdEdZ_c2ZGwva1jagC-2QkZki1rsfLcQHEgzIMc6XQwu6BpQeCaNQoH46CD8g9e2w6r-A5yiuJm-2vFr4Er36snUxJX96iQ4W1xfNvom_ABKT920cbXOG2Wx0C_VYS-4Om5xBZsHoS9sVho8OCAdFtf_rVvCrV6DjdE06qjJKvmh-mbnKeuuK5cq4JIs6GFq911K8_3H3JjUFqBmD0zG-ND1RjFJE4aEt3grMyW9gBiq5ljnjs2aNI0IKriW2JxTqWYirLJWe3ozYle7W_5DKld1oc/pRNrrThJl29jOwQeF2COSYmAGIzlRDkk/12)

_**Governor Braun Welcomes Home the 38th Infantry Division**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun welcomed home more than 400 soldiers from the 38th Infantry Division of the Indiana National Guard. After nearly a year deployed to the Middle East in support of Operation Spartan Shield, these brave men and women are finally back on Indiana soil, reunited with their families and loved ones. "Welcome home to the 38th Infantry Division of the Indiana National Guard! Thank you for your 11 months of service abroad. We are glad to have you back." \- Governor Braun via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/R2BqV2SW3-nR8yAJQ2FZTlI3Wo5VC2O1mYYb7-PI-OrFNtwM-YeGhGgiq1zhkH_cucXEJejS4ftlFQNj_3Cmu0C-asQFOIver5V0sLACdiyRz_8yG0ED8imw19gQEotkaP-nuM4Z_WEX3I9gs6aN1yRr8p6wa-Bvx_exshRqrPS6SGP9u0HL_6d51oOx28y_-oYCUHMAn-0oy_0sI_86jJQDm95NnNTjd60E2Ph0f8vVz938qvac1_6b3Lly3i3dkegNY-wBwAdbsP5XMBnXoIkYrWHmL619V4CvU5kAgdnj8Jc-IFDZmueFN6Z-1P9OVBItKhfZ4bxLsHn3ZMdaj4aHmv37BUy_7AK__La6efnJJXTEUxYPklHG0JNFDxDiEI65jR-7mVmVEVX56nweQGDQMjLd3Sxlv1QcrE2GRQ/LMO9PPdW0bqNYddmMnLwPaCFj4AHyJ_E/12)

**📱 _News You Can Use_ **

**Governor Mike Braun **[sat down](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/SVBaHFcSb4tWuUrU4UJ2l-XJd8pbVTWpU2B85SPui1Ki1VqG5OKDRSRG-R2YyRWmOkugfKWmLMg7ynfbgelbl1vPb2S_ETAq4-RqOTONL4W57zcMnZW_tSVFnkQ9qJ7HEIC-nBUxiA8zHN9IZz1wHp-IxPaI2NaIwUfgK5EuETm_ZoSArm_3iEMuOOoRscq4r1jX1UxQGAUBeNGxuk8GWX6GAZ7uW4Tz7Sh7u1Ne00DtA9QLT4-bO1EAnBzbhKo4ZF_3utgzCg5u2DFnEigatMTnhf-YKthslQhiAyJFXZqy0KghyVxY9c101f4wmy-Ub3nY-Zw09qUSWocD4cM4D6mFCl9ZSsddb_UfEmzFPyPn6eoAV2MqJ-7B1AkUKrFp3wS3g-syx_9ejo9WoJoHkg0wIjLiSMyUvaHB0qO7gA/orpvoNFK2Jls9AhrZl-SfFV1Zo6HslBF/12) with the Foundation for Government Accountability to discuss how Indiana is restoring health, creating opportunities for Hoosier entrepreneurs to succeed, and driving healthcare reforms that make the system more transparent and competitive. **Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith** [hosted](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/BSBK-4MRoU2_zFUjGBOAaUI7A66iU2U1KH6VjydifDV2xORn43BHYHVYK2f05fug_asmY-zfYKOgA9_s8rxFuAWxUlh4sCOAjsyEijzr58GFf9iCWfyOzoG-pI94wPitW_Q2sv7YSatt5iQZ9b7bE4fdVMcJUoRbKzZJQ_EmoGmFkxKKC5zZuMI30_jADFLa8_ruiSlB6dmswCzyn1dAa11B03yEdQNZ3CYvmszbLDbvj3GDug9kA32HIbyL41Edn17KGBXhLbwmDfQhoxtKc4EyX4hRxB0FoP5_O3mUTvYjoDc-pWb5skEcPKAKFzhOL1WnCMwreUO3xBz9-i3Q1elh4Tps46-8Ovio2X2e2OKpYBrZszFbap_ghf7sTydTd1aSEMzdDtHS_qf0dao5viwVouoiz3rj-T_zwioJUqXlgJhY4c4TqKETu42G/YXY5KPEwjW6FdlugailJGG3Z1SIqw0iE/12) a meaningful roundtable in Southwest Indiana today, bringing together local pastors to listen and gain a deeper understanding of the challenges facing their communities. He was joined by Rep. Alex Burton and Councilwoman Jill Hahn, who helped foster stronger connections between civic leaders and faith communities. **Secretary Diego Morales** [spoke](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/ALsQ7EHSQO2vSSg45gFZ7rAfCG0myccmphm9_GRbdpd9jE9VFYCs9pGMbkYcm6LNPjSCULS1nGC8DJPFsJLyPg6AWGgZWhUbkpl8k7BxFCByPU89Oz0xWw9pOqgmkzkg-mrQ0wAeizSSez3WbBtukSbSGdCFu5BTYEweg-_j299YyKdw6bTHrvjgh4Y2XVRJ9yZI2C6j7O5O4BDvsxGNOZoR50gh9plW4gotI2vGQF2wsT6Rg5KlnbRerh9hxURfproYtK5RmdIXUUeDVSWB9C_gzCXwlIG3ZkQAEAaDxNwgRLug4Ntm-HA-7QRLMEzW6vr4vzDUKlMBH2z7FvIGO7RWMcduy_DyZvRK8p80JoblfV0z9nF8Sek04AR3wchC44wN2VuBAPvixbc4iZ5GGfWNdVWL_9oCzPZQc5Tf5PQezD_Pka--8EiVNxg0kw/h7RWid6ZofTdadgzz0ncIt3B-jSJHboV/12) at the Indiana Voter Registration Association Conference. He wrote, "As Indiana’s Chief Election Officer, I know conferences like this are important to keeping our elections safe and secure!" **Treasurer Daniel Elliott**[welcomed](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/oZqoP-S-C2edRLmuD_IXNRHiWB2s-KC20z4ZKwVtQe2VRE4ABAvN6xfazSQKWO_vbxnl_gjdzfxceBcDZ1U3BL9sgCHY7gRn1NZTLVOCa_datP_Tv4HXMhjRAWzHIo_ukoxnR765vZkntNvE3TQzfFuCkIRC81XygAwpXs5S1btLiBE4qR7KnjTuQFF-KnS_nncHjjnFdgxyHrddyIFlOk7s8YHzvMc69PRs50aUcTB9ZHuRi-jdsT_BQsGS-qLssqImoXkolahlXgvuVxZTymVRtC9CbCPgtpEOSG2yZQjq-gk9GJS2O_UZzp--GJK7EWSHsgNM_Hcpl2XDSU4MaOGjerkjKqA6S940QUBHgwrTNsLUSB1p-8WkPNz7Of3qRQHgxq8tc1e7CT8ikWhTDpqYvejep8E0-mDvCIPVJiQjTpUs4h8/FKO2vS9x8ppGzX-USQGWecbTh4Vni_mN/12) Israeli Ambassador Yechiel Leiter to his office. Nieshalla**[applauded](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/_YFJXevKz9GiU9Ya52qe7VDkZxTlXQwsDTbYt7gQ20AXmjQMl4ejhbtmHBjRUejtNBBRPPMOramAIagBNuyfXY0kUIFu-BsA5WpS_4iPWHyym4g66n0d_c6faumLqUArWFlSRhufDz1JpeaYlR-YQn-kjGrEI_Vib8l8cnrCpUry4GBdI8-hiUPfMR6YFdmj-Rva49eJoaW9VZsQfO49HKvX-YDszU_HkcTFO7P9vcEPCp2bHMjH1LOcxZBBVftNRD3wcKTWHf1uy_RqJVs7iy7wJiVv_fs_fBvrliQW7YlbvKyzULrqvfk8cFyInClmmeSapUMjyoMHC2jt6Gg5iv-9KdaSaO-RHXETmk8D/JCIaN2rdrE_LpTl0EtMu_C-VtEVHdy1-/11 "http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/_YFJXevKz9GiU9Ya52qe7VDkZxTlXQwsDTbYt7gQ20AXmjQMl4ejhbtmHBjRUejtNBBRPPMOramAIagBNuyfXY0kUIFu-BsA5WpS_4iPWHyym4g66n0d_c6faumLqUArWFlSRhufDz1JpeaYlR-YQn-kjGrEI_Vib8l8cnrCpUry4GBdI8-hiUPfMR6YFdmj-Rva49eJoaW9VZsQfO49HKvX-YDszU_HkcTFO7P9vcEPCp2bHMjH1LOcxZBBVftNRD3wcKTWHf1uy_RqJVs7iy7wJiVv_fs_fBvrliQW7YlbvKyzULrqvfk8cFyInClmmeSapUMjyoMHC2jt6Gg5iv-9KdaSaO-RHXETmk8D/JCIaN2rdrE_LpTl0EtMu_C-VtEVHdy1-/11") the American Legislative Exchange Council (ALEC) for recommending Indiana Senate Resolution 51, that sounds the alarm on the national debt, serve as a model for state legislatures to pass across the country. **Attorney General Todd Rokita** , in coordination with Governor Mike Braun, [announced](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/YbudRjx92I0qHBskNk9S4b8Fftej3ACvDj6QoqapdUHsFu73M-JvxbziijymxcPk6JxCmhWgA5FqGaI8lE4F5iYvbf3Ph9CEP343_YCk3FwzAtOTyio5m5XmfPthbe-4uE33Y2Z-pOesy0Eg234nsg9Kl8BH-zezPOpK-cPLgWwGtOi31M6m78a8tQwExeVYPF_D9EvB3KmwqXN2FST5B2OWcRyq7iMOhyqABBecT1dUniUSrJYoK7WzJ8dTjWR6gT7MsaM9UMOiQyKrec5kfJbW47ZmF88yq3xcXMLva4ztFMnaaBEFNpWolPCeEi-9quCRncNAPbTyAVzj2sRIqNf-Q4m1pkBQuP-xaBMt_95aj6MFdR-fN8JgqZvHI3nMNu9hab7cdTcHV5Kz1hI79CE4MEwhUqkFj-WvsDT-leAdVD5b8DADrlV0BGaHAemNLlr0uBXf4pP0fi5OOqkVTrCilJCkJDkLda1RRAiZk7k9Q3jyOMu0rIoEqQ94DZdWvn0fNbngMw6mtxLXremD6H_x8Cjzs_2olughLHtZ-MKKDkTooAQX2_dEBvAXpfJlZMaKHZgLlnb5iOkvwwd8cB3pM7NMvamsELKrqclRgU2RkqCNJ8jpaBv5Z-GaHhEBynanrkhk0x2UAzkpdll_zfx2Ra6nLVmvAPMJ-ZzZTyk-3xsHfXGamshN4msPn0kbyrp2X73FHXdK_8TpwpKWdpuyysQR5IgQ2xjnauSBS0BKT6XCx8mVt0IBHQfl2t-WlLrJNLNwtOUiOkM64dCSnAs2peZSJ7A0Kr5N7FjrtMi5SbgQdxyTwmpCHCNGKRVZZIkyarKsqFSKld0GwqZ4_5q9lPahe-KtMg-UuvKF-eOocnOC5LUNfVlOofgZnW8pcONRy2pgcuEPdytb-uN7Z0rrKYlsLO7aQBOGP0coNAHonVY2niMyOEKWqqgYB6fF4csxjvSnatEdqFmMgT2PteGyvh7XoQ/jMH4oFc1HnlGIEhEGR00b3rQT0MTX0G1/12) updated rules requiring state contractors to certify they do not use discriminatory DEI practices. Rokita emphasized that treating people differently based on race or sex is unlawful and will be enforced under Indiana law. **Senator Todd Young** [visited](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/P_tKx26RkP31L0XrLs5M5EPUNmBNXe5WoNnGWyjHvqU0O47dcbYss2FFjHpMtDKwVhqGD0W-dOAANQd-ScCqiFUmIM70fUfzfsKAvVRoSqL5RpHk3b9zH40jVkNzFu0747_d1G_RsLuQq4eBTzLxK3w34GUECWn-fYeR3r428nysYq4-FjqGurEoYbi9PW1AvaMPTAdpN66Uz8GZL3_SLqM768ykPZc0cZA6BcPIK_BPI5pEh-SdJqGbkvN33iTYqR_BRiqcDkvEwKcK38S4HDDcY4DOCViU6M6nrkPZXaSsRN12WuJnq8WhpoLoSckgg4p03sDiYylfyTEJSbgp6Qhh9i1pKMDMEhguww_DHojGBVDE8ATIqrmvopofdVoDYRfc2W_26kN4Ez0en4z0cHciunKP-7vVpf_KQWMPdgCPyjmpZP_voQ/UKB5ayipjP41TFQyzr-ZPd4hRccTQCHf/12) Waldron to meet with Hoosier farmers and producers. The Indiana Department of Administration reported more than $72.2 million in cost avoidance and $37.6 million in direct savings. These savings come from common-sense reforms, cutting waste and streamlining operations, and with more initiatives already underway, Hoosiers can expect even greater results in the months ahead. This week also brought an important moment of pride and gratitude as more than 400 soldiers from the 38th Infantry Division of the Indiana National Guard returned home after nearly a year of service in the Middle East. These men and women spent 11 months strengthening America’s defense partnerships and protecting our freedom, and their safe return was celebrated by families, friends, and communities across Indiana. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I refuse to sit back and watch the GOP slash Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Will you speak out alongside me today?
| | |
---
100,000.

Friend, more than _100,000_ Nevadans will get kicked off their health insurance because of the cruel Medicaid cuts in the Republicans' extreme budget law. And if that weren't bad enough, the law also guts funding for hospitals across our state.
**All of this to give billionaires more tax breaks. It's shameful, and I'm not just going to sit back and watch it happen. Not when there are lives on the line.**
That's why I helped introduce legislation to repeal the GOP's Medicaid cuts and protect access to quality, affordable medical care for people across Nevada and our country. You can count on me to put the health of hardworking families ahead of billionaires and special interests every single time.
**But as I take on this fight, it's important to know that you're with me, friend. I'm looking for 20,000 people to sign on to condemn the GOP's cuts to Medicaid alongside me by midnight, so please:**
**[Will you speak out against the GOP's cruel cuts to Medicaid now? Our new petition closes at midnight, and we're missing your signature.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113921488/565369724/-70391949?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&code=jtk5588-su-nd&refcode=jtk5588-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZkZTQ2MS0zNjgxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MzTQyy2fTO6WMeGH68SlPxs14IjtCl0Th9Ey8DPxqnU=&emci=87e603c9-667f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=726de461-3681-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=3800590)**

| | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | Patriot, I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library! Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.” Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”

| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.” That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! [**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.” I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here’s the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress! What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year. But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_**

Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,

Kirk Cameron

#

[
---
Peter, it’s Sen. Chris Murphy. **[I’m reaching out to ask you to give $5 or any amount you can to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign before his end of month deadline.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250824-1-f&t=2&akid=672%2E5691347%2E6BxMHW) The stakes in this race for our democracy couldn’t be higher. Here’s why: Since January 20th, Donald Trump has been on a mission to convert our democracy to a quasi-autocracy.
* He’s endorsed political violence on his behalf by pardoning the January 6 rioters.
* He’s weaponized the justice system to punish his opponents and reward loyalists
* He’s attacked the press and sued media outlets to suppress critical coverage.
* He’s used his power and influence to enrich himself — personally making millions by selling a cryptocurrency meme coin.

The Trump administration thinks if they flood the zone and threaten the opposition, they’ll exhaust us. They want to intimidate us into submission. The level of risk to our democracy has never been as high as it is today. **Winning in 2026 may be our last chance to stop our nation’s descent into autocracy before it’s too late.** Peter, we must regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing slide toward authoritarianism. Jon Ossoff is Republicans’ #1 target in 2026 — they’ve already spent millions attacking him, and they’re going to continue coming after him with every lie and dirty trick in the book. Look, I know nobody likes being asked for money. And Jon and I both support overturning _Citizens United_ and getting all of this corrupt money out of our politics. But winning in Georgia will require significant resources, and I believe reelecting Jon is a cause worth supporting. So please: **[Make a contribution — $5 or whatever you can spare — to Jon’s reelection campaign. It would mean a lot, and it will help Jon lay the groundwork for a successful campaign.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250824-1-f&t=3&akid=672%2E5691347%2E6BxMHW) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-august25.JBs1o5&refcode=em250824-1-f&t=22&akid=672%2E5691347%2E6BxMHW)**

name: Vincent Dixie
subject: Protect Every Vote in TN‑07
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee
body:
Trump is attacking mail-in ballots and voting machines. Join me in defending every Tennessean’s voice.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/k9z9H1wZ3ZVoQOeZtHYRVw~~/AAUS1hA~/5s09hpb61EsHoiB1nAq1UXyga_a5DeFJK71Mj1gqw-bXgBMq7Duo63sqsOnOMaijDCkbKh1943ndmZa1utt6n9hkkuiTIqOZ5RPg2J05zR4xkM-XP2MGvCrpKZUhn6qkzWvpe7GBvsEnaqziq2l_6FVLQFoWyVpjITx3lYpiYWs~)
| | | | Peter, John Lewis taught us that protecting democracy takes constant effort. On the anniversary of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, we celebrate that legacy – Trump is attacking the tools that keep our elections safe: mail-in ballots and electronic voting machines. **He just announced plans to eliminate them completely.** I’m running in TN‐07 to defend your vote. The primary is on October 7. In the spirit of John Lewis, let’s stay vigilant and fight for every Tennessean’s voice. [**Tell Trump: Democracy Isn’t Optional >>**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_nSpnL4BtNyKI41C2KlfiQ~~/AAUS1hA~/SWvmNh6pHBTCGiRhkydaRbZnYfwKfKBQS62YtZeUlSyFhA5a8F4I7As5PC9ty4KSRdW__tclEvTasYgmYY_hZGSiyaSo38sqA8VzTvxt8MSSaPB-iuMM2h3MMO95AISi) **[**ADD MY NAME**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_nSpnL4BtNyKI41C2KlfiQ~~/AAUS1hA~/SWvmNh6pHBTCGiRhkydaRbZnYfwKfKBQS62YtZeUlSyFhA5a8F4I7As5PC9ty4KSRdW__tclEvTasYgmYY_hZGSiyaSo38sqA8VzTvxt8MSSaPB-iuMM2h3MMO95AISi)** In solidarity,
Vincent Dixie
Candidate for Congress – TN-07

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/zYJmUhyPNViwutPSP0evoA~~/AAUS1hA~/uOLJKa-UzIFBqbe0VE6cuyJN2CuxivMoT_diWBXscIQAYInzHFMgUNQhni-W_etOW1cEcOIwfJ9JUL4bHcg4yIsoi1jJQQ_w14jfnYVy3h_1jqu5sXwuLpcMdSVKiisJViLYJKKRxSDVs7EFtoDuukBqb4vDN9AItZ6iSM57A-_eB2ptak0_oD7mBOdwciiF) ** **

clean_body: Trump is attacking mail-in ballots and voting machines. Join me in defending every Tennessean’s voice. | ~ | | | | Peter, John Lewis taught us that protecting democracy takes constant effort. On the anniversary of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, we celebrate that legacy – Trump is attacking the tools that keep our elections safe: mail-in ballots and electronic voting machines. He just announced plans to eliminate them completely. I’m running in TN‐07 to defend your vote. The primary is on October 7. In the spirit of John Lewis, let’s stay vigilant and fight for every Tennessean’s voice. In solidarity, Vincent Dixie Candidate for Congress – TN-07 Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first. ** | Paid for by Vincent Dixie for Tennessee Vincent Dixie for Tennessee73 White Bridge RoadSte 103-328Nashville, TN 37205United States ~ "Website"
